**Did you see, friend?!**** ** During his State of the Union address, President Biden called out Republicans and made them say they would leave Social Security and Medicare alone!
But we know better than to take the GOP at their word.** For years, House Republicans have been plotting to use the debt ceiling as an excuse to gut Social Security and Medicare – essential services that millions of Americans rely on.**
That's why we're running a live poll to gauge where Democrats stand on President Biden's State of the Union. **We put together a list of our top supporters – the people with the critical insights we need to help us strategize for the months ahead – and your name is on that list.**
**But, friend, we don't see your response yet, and we want to make sure you have the chance to share your insights before our strategy meeting TONIGHT. So please, let us know:**
|

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. | | Peter,

Happy International Women’s Day! Today, we celebrate the social, economic, cultural, and political achievements and contributions of women around the world. And here at The Collective PAC, we honor and celebrate the remarkable accomplishments of Black women leaders across the country.

From Kamala Harris, the first Black woman to be elected Vice President, to Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman to sit on the Supreme Court, to Jenn McClellan, our newest congresswoman and the first Black woman to represent Virginia in Congress — we have so much to celebrate.

[Peter, here at The Collective PAC, we are committed to uplifting Black candidates — especially Black women — and creating a government that truly represents its people. Can you chip in $10 this International Women’s Day and help us fight for more History-Makers like Kamala Harris, Ketanji Brown Jackson, and Jenn McClellan? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwI862NHve7ljnSJgtQ9E-0UUz87lspwCWF4m_mDw7dBYfgU2Z8GspC76TP8InwPtQc4992ClM556OBYy0Z-FgQJUO5hn8ak0W0OsupHv_adRlY3n31_Y2LDnPER6p20grZCzcuRvtyeXwJOS-mgMmZJtPf2oAGIJb3ruk-qrUQew4nasiW4Yu_N66BPWWYE6g_WgvN_WMIVIyWXOy8CK0-18cZXFZeDf79_AYptIoad505-yBJK-L6uN4zLSSYpcWgZnAilr8yE28QGhr2gzs4k6d1XAJs_srK6tjwTvNaw_oqkLgd-i8GpG8ch-PRY9VBmv4G5hdWHVowuuzUYN2syf0UEoqWZ7ntcQ9q5sDL2xEuH3burg-RVOjXa4BMwQOIfcFeQkNqE-hPf_J-uUYliQ/3uc/5C7IeHbyReSBMgmaLx5oLA/h1/nPOiTbOv5Z9boysGOpfbP8hVsHGODqZ9ZoQGpAXRQJI) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

But as we celebrate, we must also recognize how much work is left to do — which is exactly what our Co-Founder and Senior Adviser, Stefanie Brown James, told the New York Times:

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwI862NHve7ljnSJgtQ9E-0UUz87lspwCWF4m_mDw7dBYfgU2Z8GspC76TP8InwPtQc4992ClM556OBYy0Z-FgQJUO5hn8ak0W0OsupHv_adRlY3n31_Y2LDnPER6p20grZCzcuRvtyeXwJOS-mgMmZJtPf2oAGIJb3ruk-qrUQew5g7qYDd7Tv47Ke1d2cj3kCv1oEpejcmVZmBgcGJtOGUfi-e20O0eMAymKLJHqTVdyyUiQd6uAgZT-crUlIJiAQMIOPylzlz2xETrcSe_jichJsBIwIzV2CjvfBYjWc4FER_hzQceNMlTvqZ6Uf6tikWOpkGLF65INH1NH9j1jqFh35MRWxz2UBbpAOlwphFxQZhRpo03avWPW2CFRx1pD2k9nCQF4SQgUK_ku944Thrw/3uc/5C7IeHbyReSBMgmaLx5oLA/h8/Fu170wq4WjpgDpCoM3KDxSsApshrY7B9aeArNc-Ktzk)

Here’s the stats, Peter:
❌ **Only 2** Black women have served in the Senate in its 233-year history.

❌ Out of 64 Black women who have run for the Senate since 2010, **only 8** have secured major-party nominations.

❌**No** Black woman has ever been elected governor and, out of the 22 who have run since 2010, only four have become major-party nominees

[It’s HIGH TIME we elected a Black woman to the Senate, the first Black woman governor and so many more history-making Black women. Please, Peter, if you can, rush $10 to The Collective PAC right now to commemorate International Women’s Day! ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwI862NHve7ljnSJgtQ9E-0UUz87lspwCWF4m_mDw7dBYfgU2Z8GspC76TP8InwPtQc4992ClM556OBYy0Z-FgQJUO5hn8ak0W0OsupHv_adRlY3n31_Y2LDnPER6p20grZCzcuRvtyeXwJOS-mgMmZJtPf2oAGIJb3ruk-qrUQew6l5y3WrxVJ6D_j9HpW8Ycyr71fWvX4xLw4ROF5KAydNVHlYJ9FOVikRvgaNkNlL0iMAs-BSkqtDIKcoN2F8rY8buoeKsI0VDhW7pJOWqXDZpGo3fVkrCMBlFhQ5APn7ArpZgv2gnUNCt8tE8dydAtN4u5b8baSYvQdOdOflia-XOp_NdwERxTbRAVF1QtI3TsJNz-cNrYt6y101KQ3ZqGiM9kUTNv2y8fU2LYg-CtvsA/3uc/5C7IeHbyReSBMgmaLx5oLA/h9/fh3Y2Bu7YRT2LAM-WxRHUtSPz4XVxZqY42pRAdJvSKU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Happy International Women’s Day! Today, we celebrate the social, economic, cultural, and political achievements and contributions of women around the world. And here at The Collective PAC, we honor and celebrate the remarkable accomplishments of Black women leaders across the country. From Kamala Harris, the first Black woman to be elected Vice President, to Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman to sit on the Supreme Court, to Jenn McClellan, our newest congresswoman and the first Black woman to represent Virginia in Congress — we have so much to celebrate. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | But as we celebrate, we must also recognize how much work is left to do — which is exactly what our Co-Founder and Senior Adviser, Stefanie Brown James, told the New York Times: Here’s the stats, Peter: ❌ Only 2 Black women have served in the Senate in its 233-year history. ❌ Out of 64 Black women who have run for the Senate since 2010, only 8 have secured major-party nominations. ❌No Black woman has ever been elected governor and, out of the 22 who have run since 2010, only four have become major-party nominees | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: HER Time
subject: let’s protect abortion for International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59893506/395418947/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230308_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUyOTk0ZmYtMTJiZS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pFsUXX9-fT63Y3y2OcPTr3FQgyYMV4KO2EBZvG4dFnQ=)
---
We have big news, Peter: the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , the bill that would codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and protect abortion rights nationwide, was just reintroduced in the Senate in honor of International Women’s Day. **Let’s be clear: Abortion rights are human rights. ** When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, they rolled back the clock on 50 years of human rights. Now, extremist judges and state legislators are working overtime to restrict access to abortion all across the country. When the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ came to a vote last year, it failed. But now, Democrats have one extra vote in their majority. Passing this bill is still a long shot, especially with a Republican controlled House. But that doesn’t mean we give up before we start. Now is the time to organize and apply immense pressure on our lawmakers to restore our human rights and undo the damage done by the Supreme Court last year. [_**Will you add your name to this petition telling lawmakers we demand their support for the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ this time around? We’ll need as many voices as possible joining together to get this done:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59893507/395418975/1323268000?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230308_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUyOTk0ZmYtMTJiZS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pFsUXX9-fT63Y3y2OcPTr3FQgyYMV4KO2EBZvG4dFnQ=&emci=992994ff-12be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9e2994ff-12be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1720400) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59893508/395418976/1323268000?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230308_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUyOTk0ZmYtMTJiZS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pFsUXX9-fT63Y3y2OcPTr3FQgyYMV4KO2EBZvG4dFnQ=&emci=992994ff-12be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9e2994ff-12be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1720400)
---
Katie announced her campaign exactly six years ago today, on a mission to improve the lives of women everywhere. Today, we still follow that same mission.
Thanks, and Happy International Women’s Day.
— HER Time
HER Time PAC
2120 University Ave
Berkeley, CA 94704
United States **[her-time.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59893509/395418977/-1008269585?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230308_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUyOTk0ZmYtMTJiZS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pFsUXX9-fT63Y3y2OcPTr3FQgyYMV4KO2EBZvG4dFnQ=&emci=992994ff-12be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9e2994ff-12be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1720400) | [team@her-time.com](mailto:team@her-time.com)** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| Peter,

Joe Biden forgave $400 BILLION in student loan debts. **But there 's a catch - he wants YOU to pay for it.**

That means millions of Americans who haven't gone to a college or university - or those who took out loans and worked their butts off to pay them back - will _pay for someone 's tuition to attend a gender studies class._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: IL GOP Leaders Pushing DeSantis Run
body:
The IL GOP may be adding Ron DeSantis to its list of disastrous endorsements, amid Alan Keyes, Richard Irvin, and Bruce Rauner.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ca9ca64ba700/alert-il-gop-leaders-pushing-desantis-run?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Anti-Trump IL GOP Leaders, Who Endorsed RNC Chair Ronna Romney, Now Throwing Support Behind Gov. Ron DeSantis' Potential Presidential Run (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/anti-trump-il-gop-leaders-who-endorsed-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-now-throwing-support-behind-gov-ron-desantis-potential-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/anti-trump-il-gop-leaders-who-endorsed-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-now-throwing-support-behind-gov-ron-desantis-potential-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Rep. Adam Kinzinger, R-Ill., wipes his eyes as he listens to testimony before the House select committee hearing on the Jan. 6 attack on Capitol Hill in Washington, Tuesday, July 27, 2021. (Chip Somodevilla/Pool via AP)

Since 2002 (https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-2005-feb-20-na-gop20-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , the IL GOP has been politically irrelevant – and virtually everything they touch, dies.

In 2004, the
IL GOP (https://www.nbcnews.com/id/wbna5652009?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) recruited Maryland resident Alan Keyes to run against then IL state senator Barack Obama for US Senate.

Keyes would lose the race to Obama by
43 points (https://www.cnn.com/ELECTION/2004/pages/results/states/IL/S/01/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , 70-27.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/anti-trump-il-gop-leaders-who-endorsed-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-now-throwing-support-behind-gov-ron-desantis-potential-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
The IL GOP’s candidate Alan Keyes, a resident of Maryland is defeated by IL state senator Barack Obama by 43 points in the 2004 US Senate race.

In 2014, IL GOP-establishment candidate Bruce Rauner, a wealthy private equity executive, would defeat Gov. Pat Quinn, D, 50-46, but in 2018, billionaire JB Pritzker, heir to the Hyatt Hotel fortune, would defeat Rauner’s re-election hopes by a significant margin, 54-38.

And in 2022, the IL GOP recruited Aurora Mayor Richard Irvin to run for governor in the primary, despite Irvin pulling Democratic Primary ballots in 2014, 2016 and 2020, and spending the last several years praising Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker – referring to him as a “great friend and a great leader.”
https://twitter.com/MarkMaxwellTV/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://twitter.com/DemGovs/status/1483091889607909379?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Irvin would lose the primary to conservative grassroots candidate Darren Bailey by 43 points (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/chicago-politics/illinois-primary-election-results-republican-darren-bailey-to-face-jb-pritzker-in-race-for-illinois-governor-in-november/2869100/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – and ironically, by the same margin as Keyes back in 2004.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/anti-trump-il-gop-leaders-who-endorsed-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-now-throwing-support-behind-gov-ron-desantis-potential-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Republican conservative grassroots candidate Darren Bailey defeats the IL GOP’s candidate Richard Irvin by 43 points in the 2022 Illinois Republican gubernatorial primary.

And now, fresh off a humiliating loss in the primary, the IL GOP is laying the groundwork to support yet another potential candidate – Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis, who may run against presidential candidate Donald Trump for the 2024 Republican nomination for president.

But this comes as no surprise.

Since the 2015 presidential campaign, the IL GOP has remained anti-Trump.

During the 2016 national
GOP convention (https://abc7chicago.com/republican-national-convention-gop-illinois-republicans-donald-trump/1430839/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , many IL GOP leaders, including then Gov. Rauner, former Gov. Jim Edgar, US Sen. Mark Kirk and Rauner-appointed Comptroller Leslie Munger, skipped the convention because they did not support Trump.

Kirk even ran an
ad (https://abc7chicago.com/republican-national-convention-gop-illinois-republicans-donald-trump/1430839/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that said that Trump was not “fit to be Commander in Chief.”

But the Never Trumpism doesn’t stop there.

When President Trump visited
Illinois (https://abc7chicago.com/governor-bruce-rauner-president-donald-trump-granite-city-in/3829187/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in 2018, Gov. Rauner skipped the event – choosing to attend other events across the state instead of sharing the stage with the President of the United States.

In 2020, during the height of the pandemic, IL GOP chairman Don Tracy’s family-owned business, Dot Foods – where he is an owner, donated to Democratic presidential candidate
Joe Biden (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/dot-foods/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000044109&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – who at the time, was running against President Trump.

And in
2022 (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/dot-foods/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000044109&toprecipcycle=2022&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , owners made a $3,900 donation to US Sen. Lisa Murkowski, R.; a $4,900 donation to US Rep. Rodney Davis, R.; and a $51,000 donation to the Republican Party of Illinois.

Sen. Murkowski remains one of Trump’s most vocal critics. After January 6th, she supported his impeachment and removal from office. On January 9, 2021,
Murkowski said (https://www.adn.com/politics/2021/01/08/alaska-sen-lisa-murkowski-calls-on-president-trump-to-resign-questions-her-future-as-a-republican/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , “I want him to resign. I want him out. He has caused enough damage.”

Murkowski went on to say that, “if the Republican party has become nothing more than the party of Trump, I sincerely question whether this is the party for me.”

In 2020, US Rep. Rodney Davis was one of 35 House Republicans to support the January 6th Commission to investigate the attack on the US Capitol – a move that angered Trump.

Davis (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vak4KN5euTQ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) has also said that he’d vote for Liz Cheney for president; he supported some forms of Black Lives Matter ideologies; he said Trump needed to “grow up;” and in 2016, he withdrew his endorsement of then GOP nominee for President Donald Trump.

Tracy has remained a staunch and loyal supporter of Rauner, and it’s why when Rauner became governor in 2014, he rewarded Tracy’s loyalty and financial support, by naming him to lead Illinois’
gaming board (https://www.sj-r.com/story/news/politics/state/2015/02/02/don-tracy-nominated-to-lead/35298021007/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

During Rauner’s campaign for governor in 2014, Tracy
created (https://www.sj-r.com/story/opinion/columns/2014/08/14/springfield-lawyer-don-tracy-running/36669158007/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) an independent expenditure fund, and later changed the name to support Rauner’s gubernatorial run – even running ads on the radio to promote and support Rauner’s candidacy.

In one of those ads, Tracy
says (https://www.sj-r.com/story/opinion/columns/2014/08/14/springfield-lawyer-don-tracy-running/36669158007/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“In Springfield, our economy and quality of life depend on a healthy state government that pays its bills, educates and employs us, and keeps promises to retirees. Quinn has failed on all counts. That’s why it’s now or never for central Illinois voters to elect a proven leader like Bruce Rauner. ... Our Springfield future depends on it.”

On March 23rd, Tracy and the IL GOP are traveling down to Naples, Florida to host a private reception featuring former US Attorney General Bill Barr, who served as AG under the George HW Bush and Donald Trump presidential administrations.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/anti-trump-il-gop-leaders-who-endorsed-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-now-throwing-support-behind-gov-ron-desantis-potential-presidential-run.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
The IL GOP is hosting a private event with former US AG Bill Baar, a critic of former President Donald Trump, in Naples, FL.

Barr remains critical of Trump, and in November, he published a scathing opinion piece in the New York Post (https://nypost.com/2022/11/21/trump-threatens-to-burn-down-the-gop-its-time-to-move-on/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , writing,

“Unless the rest of the party goes along with him, he will burn the whole house down by leading ‘his people’ out of the GOP. Trump’s willingness to destroy the party if he does not get his way is not based on principle, but on his own supreme narcissism. His egoism makes him unable to think of a political party as anything but an extension of himself – a cult of personality.”

And sources have recently confirmed to Illinois Review that senior IL GOP officials are quietly recruiting anti-Trump, Republican-establishment candidates to challenge US Rep. Mary Miller IL-15 and US Rep. Mike Bost, IL-12 – both of whom were endorsed by Trump in the last election.

And while school board candidates are battling it out, and Gov. Pritzker is dumping $500,000 to viciously attack every day, conservative grassroot moms and dads, the IL GOP is in south Florida, fawning over anyone critical of Trump, and gathering support to prop up DeSantis. When they should be here in Illinois helping these candidates raise money and supporting their campaigns in any way that they can.

But when you translate the words, “IL GOP,” it literally means, “to be irrelevant.” And they continue to prove it year after year, decade after decade.

And if history is any indication, DeSantis is better off staying as far away from the IL GOP as possible. After all, anything they touch, or endorse, becomes irrelevant, dies, or both.
https://youtu.be/SiHXBvAvuyA?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas joins Newsmax to discuss NYC Mayor Adams' warning to Democrats amid Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot's embarrassing re-election loss.
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9a47f4cc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_03_08_11_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9a47f4cc-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: March e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2023 March e-newsletter
News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d2b570a8a9&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
# **Please join me for Coffee with Canepa**
---
| Dear friends, Please join me and some special guest speakers for our monthly Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa series 10 a.m., Saturday, March 25, Drip & Melt Café-Deli, 301 87th St., Broadmoor. We will hear about the resources the county provides related to health equity in partnership with the San Mateo County Office of Diversity and Equity’s Latino Collaborative, which strives to eliminate stigma, oppression, racism and poverty.
---
The Latino Collaborative promotes holistic practices designed to build safe, strong, resilient families in San Mateo County. We work to increase access to stigma-free services and treatment involving mind, spirit and body to all San Mateo County residents, regardless of insurance eligibility. We believe that services that integrate Latino heritage, culture, spirituality and family values will nurture and strengthen the health of Latino individuals and families.

[RSVP HERE!](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=da4b9cae32&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
|
# **The COVID health emergency is over**

---
| The San Mateo County Board of Supervisors voted to end the county’s state of emergency due to COVID-19 Feb. 28. It’s been a long and exhausting three years and I’m glad the worse of the pandemic is behind us.

But keep in mind, COVID still lingers and the county remains committed to combatting the virus, educate the community on continued risks, vaccination recommendations and efforts to fully restore the economy.

---
We owe it to the 749 people who have died in the county from COVID to remain vigilant and I’m proud to say that more than 730,000 county residents, 94 percent of the population, have been vaccinated against the virus.

Anyone 12 and older who has symptoms and tests positive for COVID-19 should ask a doctor about treatment as medications to treat COVID-19 are free, widely available, and effective for stopping COVID-19 illness from getting serious. To learn more, go to: [https://covid19.ca.gov/treatment/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=379ac47e7b&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
|
# **County seeking millions for farmworker housing**

---
| In light of the mass shooting of farmworkers in Half Moon Bay in January that put a spotlight on the many of these workers poor living conditions, the county is seeking $5 million in state funds to help local farmworkers become homeowners.

The money would fund the purchase of manufactured homes, potentially in partnership with the city of Half Moon Bay if the state awards the county through the Joe Serna grant program.

These homes would be located on an as-yet unidentified area of the coast. Local farmworkers – including families and individuals displaced by the January mass shooting – would be eligible to live in and purchase the homes, according to the county communications office.
---
The Joe Serna, Jr. Farmworker Housing Grant Program is a competitive funding opportunity from the California Department of Housing and Community Development. The program is named after Serna who was the former mayor of Sacramento, the son of migrant farmworkers who grew up in labor camps near Lodi.

The Board of Supervisors is also looking into investing up to $10 million in county funds to purchase additional homes to house coastal farmworkers as the county works to finalize its budget in June.

The average farmworker makes only $20,000 a year, not nearly enough to rent in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
| **I’m proud to stand with local Ukrainians to end Russia’s war**
---
| The Ukrainian American Coordinating Council invited me to attend two events on the one-year anniversary marking Russia’s illegal invasion of Ukraine.

I was proud to speak alongside Dmytro Kushneruk, Consul General of Ukraine in San Francisco at a “Unite for Peace Rally and March” at the Ferry Building Feb. 25. Special thanks to Grace Cathedral for hosting a “Sing for Ukraine” fundraiser the night before.
---
It’s clear that Vladimir Putin wants Ukraine to crumble as Russia continues to kill innocent women and children and destroys critical infrastructure that will take the country decades to rebuild. With President Biden’s surprise trip to Ukraine last month, we must send a strong message that we will continue to stand with the Ukrainian people who have shown incredible bravery and resolve during this illegal invasion. Ukrainians want peace not war.
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=cd651514f9&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=43d3ac6b85&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=56ae58a5cf&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9. You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mrichardson@smcgov.org

**Follow the Office on Social Media**
If you want to get more insight into our office please connect with us on social media. It’s also a great way to interact with the office and to get notifications on upcoming events. Click the icons below and like us on Facebook and follow us on Twitter.** ** In friendship, David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=907673ee90) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=907673ee90).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&afl=1)
---

But keep in mind, COVID still lingers and the county remains committed to combatting the virus, educate the community on continued risks, vaccination recommendations and efforts to fully restore the economy. We owe it to the 749 people who have died in the county from COVID to remain vigilant and I’m proud to say that more than 730,000 county residents, 94 percent of the population, have been vaccinated against the virus. Anyone 12 and older who has symptoms and tests positive for COVID-19 should ask a doctor about treatment as medications to treat COVID-19 are free, widely available, and effective for stopping COVID-19 illness from getting serious. To learn more, go to: | | County seeking millions for farmworker housing | In light of the mass shooting of farmworkers in Half Moon Bay in January that put a spotlight on the many of these workers poor living conditions, the county is seeking $5 million in state funds to help local farmworkers become homeowners. The money would fund the purchase of manufactured homes, potentially in partnership with the city of Half Moon Bay if the state awards the county through the Joe Serna grant program. These homes would be located on an as-yet unidentified area of the coast. Local farmworkers – including families and individuals displaced by the January mass shooting – would be eligible to live in and purchase the homes, according to the county communications office. The Joe Serna, Jr. Farmworker Housing Grant Program is a competitive funding opportunity from the California Department of Housing and Community Development. The program is named after Serna who was the former mayor of Sacramento, the son of migrant farmworkers who grew up in labor camps near Lodi. The Board of Supervisors is also looking into investing up to $10 million in county funds to purchase additional homes to house coastal farmworkers as the county works to finalize its budget in June. The average farmworker makes only $20,000 a year, not nearly enough to rent in San Mateo County. | | I’m proud to stand with local Ukrainians to end Russia’s war | The Ukrainian American Coordinating Council invited me to attend two events on the one-year anniversary marking Russia’s illegal invasion of Ukraine. I was proud to speak alongside Dmytro Kushneruk, Consul General of Ukraine in San Francisco at a “Unite for Peace Rally and March” at the Ferry Building Feb. 25. Special thanks to Grace Cathedral for hosting a “Sing for Ukraine” fundraiser the night before. It’s clear that Vladimir Putin wants Ukraine to crumble as Russia continues to kill innocent women and children and destroys critical infrastructure that will take the country decades to rebuild. With President Biden’s surprise trip to Ukraine last month, we must send a strong message that we will continue to stand with the Ukrainian people who have shown incredible bravery and resolve during this illegal invasion. Ukrainians want peace not war. | Battling food insecurity Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: CalFresh: Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: Contact: (650) 802-6576, mailto:antorres@smcgov.org Daly City Partnership: DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: Second Harvest Food Bank: Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 Interns wanted to join our team We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: . You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mrichardson@smcgov.org Follow the Office on Social Media If you want to get more insight into our office please connect with us on social media. It’s also a great way to interact with the office and to get notifications on upcoming events. Click the icons below and like us on Facebook and follow us on Twitter. In friendship, David J. Canepa | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved.

name: Liz Walters, The Ohio Democratic Party
subject: Recommitting to the fight for women's equality:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Happy International Women's Day!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59894661/395434041/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWQzOTA4MS0xOGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VL_2StDIDrjZ4FmbsV9dQPwMTcrzhNBDF-3Uek_z7Y=) | Team,

Happy International Women's Day! Thanks to the work and sacrifices of countless women, we have made great strides in the fight for women's equality.

Ohio alone is home to numerous trailblazing women whose exemplary careers have forged a path for folks like myself — from Florence E. Allen to Toni Morrison and Judith Resnik, _who continue to inspire me daily._

Today, leaders like Joyce Beatty, Shontel Brown, Emilia Sykes and Marcy Kaptur are fighting for working Ohioans in Congress. And we can't forget Marcia Fudge, who serves as Secretary of Housing and Urban Development.

**But team, the fight for women's equality is far from over. Ohio Republicans have decided that overturning _Roe v. Wade_ wasn't enough. And they're continuing to volley relentless attacks at women's fundamental reproductive rights and working overtime to strip millions of Americans of their essential rights.**

**[So I'm asking: Will you join me in recommitting to the fight for gender equality in Ohio — and across the nation — by signing your name next to mine?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59894662/395434042/333829993?ms=em23_230308_wmsday_enask_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&refcode=em23_230308_wmsday_enask_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&source=em23_230308_wmsday_enask_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230308_wmsday_enask_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=dX8bCyHWdVq8rLvRlRFTOVyoWJcXVTIT6OPka7j86bo0X9dWWYj1o+KN0Z+J1hVa0naq/xMbi35yrF3Bem8SVquK4+Va5tPcHw2bwOJjyj/MrgcrDBmNAZgP1QNG7rBdFeslKzRy7mV9uRVNjvWdgw==&refcode2=4ad39081-18be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWQzOTA4MS0xOGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VL_2StDIDrjZ4FmbsV9dQPwMTcrzhNBDF-3Uek_z7Y=&emci=abb869b7-cfbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ad39081-18be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25291327)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59894663/395434043/333829993?ms=em23_230308_wmsday_enask_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&refcode=em23_230308_wmsday_enask_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&source=em23_230308_wmsday_enask_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230308_wmsday_enask_gq_act___LWODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=dX8bCyHWdVq8rLvRlRFTOVyoWJcXVTIT6OPka7j86bo0X9dWWYj1o+KN0Z+J1hVa0naq/xMbi35yrF3Bem8SVquK4+Va5tPcHw2bwOJjyj/MrgcrDBmNAZgP1QNG7rBdFeslKzRy7mV9uRVNjvWdgw==&refcode2=4ad39081-18be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWQzOTA4MS0xOGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VL_2StDIDrjZ4FmbsV9dQPwMTcrzhNBDF-3Uek_z7Y=&emci=abb869b7-cfbd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4ad39081-18be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25291327)
---

Today, I want us to remember how far we've come._But we must also never forget how much further we have to go_. We stand on the shoulders of women who have been leading the fight for justice since before our nation was born. And together, we can continue to uphold their legacy.

Thanks for your support,

Liz Walters
Chair
The Ohio Democratic Party


The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.

We stand on the shoulders of women who have been leading the fight for justice since before our nation was born. And together, we can continue to uphold their legacy. Thanks for your support, Liz Walters Chair The Ohio Democratic Party  The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: This is really happening, and we need your help: New House bill expands oil, gas, and coal leases. Shreds environmental review. Sells public land for pennies.
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv. ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9270431&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDIyMjcyMQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDIyMjcyMQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9270431&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDIyMjcyMQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDIyMjcyMQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9270431&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDIyMjcyMQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDIyMjcyMQS2

name: Don Huffines
subject: HLF: Property Taxes up 12% In 2022 Despite Legislature’s Promise of Tax Relief
body:
Despite efforts by the Texas Legislature in 2019 and 2021 to provide property tax relief for Texans, the Texas Comptroller’s office reports that last year property tax revenue for local taxing entities increased by $8.9 billion, or 12%.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **HLF: Property Taxes up 12% In 2022 Despite Legislature's Promise of Tax Relief**
## _" The Legislature's limits on property tax growth leak like a sieve and allow property taxes to grow much faster than anticipated."_
DALLAS, TX, March 8, 2023 -- Despite efforts by the Texas Legislature in 2019 and 2021 to provide property tax relief for Texans, the Texas Comptroller's office reports that property tax revenue for local taxing entities increased by $8.9 billion last year, or 12.17%.The 12.17% property tax increase is hard to understand given the limits the Texas Legislature put on property tax revenue growth in 2019. It turns out, however, that the Legislature's limits on property tax growth leak like a sieve and allow property taxes to grow much faster than anticipated.In a new policy paper from the Huffines Liberty Foundation, we provide a workable blueprint that our friends in Austin--and all concerned Texans--can use to advocate for true property tax relief. [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-y/) [Read Full Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-j/) Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:_" To put it bluntly, property taxes are immoral. Any policy that keeps Texans from owning their own home, while at the same time forcing renters and businesses to carry a burden from which they get no relief, should not pass. It should not even be considered. I spend my time and treasure advocating for broad property tax relief where every citizen is a winner and treated equally. Texans have options, let's explore them."_Huffines further added:_" Texas tax problems are largely self-inflicted. That's the bad news. The good news, however, is the fixes needed are uncomplicated. This paper charts the way forward through four easy steps:__1) Limit state spending growth
2) Freeze school M&O property taxes
3) Use state budget surpluses to buydown M&O property taxes
4) Require voter approval for local governments and special districts to exceed the no-new-revenue tax rate_ _Following this path, the Texas Legislature could cut property taxes almost in half in eight years, or less. "_ [Read Full Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.### [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-u/) [Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-o/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-b/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-fhlkudl-l-z)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-n/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-fhlkudl-17329976-yuddtktydi-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-fhlkudl-yuddtktydi-e/)
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe.

# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5sfbk1v01hq1rpkm98c96rfggn7jg627pc0sqeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spim9or6cdh2bs) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **"Our death toll would be staggering"** reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdhfp9937n8lppehll5cp2oiakmrddgor1gqm6e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spim9or6cdh2bs) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgsegp8r20lhob5ihgg6uisjbmjndg263n7m0p68_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spim9or6cdh2bs) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjfs8iqi0n11ubt1qohhsg6vkjabv6inu56a5ah0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spim9or6cdh2bs) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... **[Click here to see it in action!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaaalrpe75htqrhaleo62p78364d002mu9s41umg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spim9or6cdh2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. Our government is woefully unprepared. It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. "Our death toll would be staggering" reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power. That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... body:

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Change starts today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zolmf3m01qe29gfis088bt6j64dp7iujkv3ugrj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)
Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7aebcn6131ce58lh05qccttc5qb43eff83gah30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoba1ikamrvpojpgba28lf39ggae12cqlnpbchig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqmk3rg17u7pq193crftbpv43icmkgcgivtep3dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3np5tubc062ot10f0blbicip81tulkck5rvgcq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zplnfpbj425iju3nne426qb7epufjaeed663l968_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3jpbn0390hrnu1vmnc0o68k8cksgr3c68j19o50_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlelb6p4acsnchj6df7m2pd8ldsfd4bjm2tdvcp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z503h156ad30gcvmis9q118j18d96776lqn2tg0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8pv0g045s2i3qe3qq3eobnmbrglcp5cun3bj9ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphm8ob2cjh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjpa09l4ajuk1pf0e992hq7ohjcrbsapmoefgmf0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c3j66p31c9ie49fg)

name: American Update
subject: Bill O Reveals Biden Made Recession Could Devastate Retirement Funds
body:
I remember how the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.

| **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,** I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.** And now it looks like history is repeating itself. **Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
* More than 2 million lost job

* Stocks plummeting over 20%

* IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling

**We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.** That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651329%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZufKNqG%2bIPAGScmmWg7SEA&sysid=1)** during this downturn. [**Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651320%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a2D3CPPfk16QKUxCU6UvHw&sysid=1) and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrvj40r21k7tub8040q8psj1pq2iq8ag63ktqj0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphmcoj4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z10cegoq4cl04fvvsd27s0i7tikqpnk00eobjai8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphmcoj4c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1rd72j9g9dbcasd9fnt4in5bujjp4ho9sg0jmio_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphmcoj4c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z584i4ghhk1qricb55qclot6kjflmaj6742egg6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sphmcoj4c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Foreign agents too...
|
---
| | | **It 's official: non-citizens and foreign agents can now VOTE in U.S. elections.**

Thanks to a bunch of Radical Democrats on the DC City Council, a new law allows practically ANYONE who lives in our nation's capital to vote in U.S. elections.

_That means illegal immigrants and Chinese diplomats may now choose _our_ elected leaders._

name: 4Patriots
subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe.

# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp2krj1i2kqjibfkbpnpl74puuoicpddicublbsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spjm0ob6cjh2bs) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **"Our death toll would be staggering"** reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeopkgtmtdf8s4ve095s96ejbcm2cup34dsmq708_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spjm0ob6cjh2bs) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z71tljtu7a0a7svvircpbuuqqvptahh09ijk8pm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spjm0ob6cjh2bs) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8i177rbnlpupqm8dooktmdk45m56d8j2d9kkee0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spjm0ob6cjh2bs) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... **[Click here to see it in action!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zukbq817r917fi0odfp7t6aferl1hl3mocutjo8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spjm0ob6cjh2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters

You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: Our crumbling electric grid. When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. Our government is woefully unprepared. It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. "Our death toll would be staggering" reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power. That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... name: Dana Criswell
subject: John Williams: Conservative Fighter
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
**By John Williams, Mississippi Freedom Caucus Board Member**
For far too long, Jackson has been run by go-along-to-get-along establishment Republicans who have failed to represent what’s best for the people. The citizens of our state have been neglected by politicians who put themselves before their constituents, and it’s time for results-driven leadership to take charge.
The people of Mississippi deserve better, and that is why I am running for State Representative. I will serve as a strong and principled voice in Jackson who will fight for the core conservative values that our state holds dear. This includes fiscal responsibility, pro-life policies, protecting our Second Amendment rights, and protecting the people we represent.
The radical left’s calls to defund the police have put our citizens in danger. As a father and as your next State Representative, I am committed to public safety and ensuring that law enforcement officers have the resources they need to protect our communities. I will fight for increased funding for law enforcement, so we can ensure our officers are equipped with the latest technology, training, and resources to keep Mississippians safe.
While violent crime rates are at historic highs across the country, the federal government has been pushing for gun control measures that would strip Mississippians of their right to bear arms. I believe this is wrong and goes against our Constitution’s Second Amendment rights. I will fight to ensure that all citizens have the right to bear arms and the ability to defend themselves and their families. I will do everything I can to ensure that overreaching executive orders do not infringe upon these rights.
Our country has lost respect for human life. More needs to be done to protect life at all stages, from conception to natural death. I will fight for pro-life policies that recognize the humanity of the unborn child and ensure they have a fighting chance of living a happy and healthy life.
I understand the hardships that Mississippians are facing due to the economic crisis under Joe Biden’s administration. We need to take decisive action now to reduce taxes and cut spending in order to ease the financial burdens on families across our state.
I will work hard to make sure that we abolish the income tax and reduce other taxes so that everyone can keep more of the hard-earned money they have worked so hard to make. This will be a priority for me, and I will fight tirelessly to make sure these tax cuts are implemented.
My commitment to the people of Mississippi goes beyond politics—it’s about doing what is right. As your next State Representative, I am ready and willing to fight for the core conservative values of fiscal responsibility, pro-life policies, Second Amendment rights, public safety, and tax relief that our state holds dear. I will work hard to ensure our citizens have a strong voice in Jackson and I will always put people over politics.
I am committed to standing up for the people of Mississippi and will never back down from a fight for our conservative values.
| | [Click Here - Learn More about John ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/WUVd6bBVYRAQdfQexxJVzw)
---
| | |
---
Always staying true to his Christian Conservative values and passion, he is highly engaged in the conservative grassroots movement in Mississippi and serves on the boards of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus and the Conservative Coalition of Mississippi. He is a lifetime Patriot Academy Constitution Coach and has hosted Biblical Citizenship and Constitution classes since 2022. In 2021, Americans for Prosperity- Mississippi recognized him as the Community Leader of the Year for Mississippi.
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/-n7yvrGhwpFo6eq_toW5tw) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---
