subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62415776:JINf6PGNk:m:1:3365131770:3C4E1CE9D3C6BD00A7D749DDAD3B99F3:r)

Peter,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62415776:JINf6PGNk:m:1:3365131770:3C4E1CE9D3C6BD00A7D749DDAD3B99F3:r)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

**Goal:** $33,000
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donation: PENDING

[Donate >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62415776:JINf6PGNk:m:1:3365131770:3C4E1CE9D3C6BD00A7D749DDAD3B99F3:r) ****

**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

[_**I am raising $33,000 to fund our legal battles to support the January 6th defendants in court. Will you send a gift of any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62415776:JINf6PGNk:m:1:3365131770:3C4E1CE9D3C6BD00A7D749DDAD3B99F3:r)

I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

**Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. **
**

Kash Patel

subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?

body:
This dream has always stuck with me.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=4bdb2b3f6e7549a2925b1bcd9c3f7233&_t=hrnt0l1Bd6xBZZX9AbylBwE3kROLf22irSu9O4FJGdaKQV6FVWPOOa6x5fmsqNkSbR5jAb_HoDAA38y7ZC_KMKqCck0K6oVcZYQ_sASlrM8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=4bdb2b3f6e7549a2925b1bcd9c3f7233&_t=hrnt0l1Bd6xBZZX9AbylBwE3kROLf22irSu9O4FJGdaKQV6FVWPOOa6x5fmsqNkSbR5jAb_HoDAA38y7ZC_KMKqCck0K6oVcZYQ_sASlrM8%3D)

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4bdb2b3f6e7549a2925b1bcd9c3f7233&_e=4ITfYtIzlilWikR3cORFjkC3AJj5uIEZR81c4XTOD_fRpjspwtJUeHIU1VXhYFgS0Z3w5v1HKrTHrgXHZFrdj2wpwMogFBBDZLFK1RRRJKyx5Na88KwwdzfsXZESHzhl5lg-x7aPQuhmKn9AD1EqtpSf-7YHrCT-EGneF5cvJKpGiMXk9y3hD2smNCy4ua9aD1gUTz3xM5vlMDvEGs3bmABAyQai3T4K88OFLNAYH796rYd8YsczJjl-rXAZjCEZhkJMGwtgGdGd_YmCB0RQVJiffuInU2QXYEs0fsai1xjGrWkfBcgOmanlyx-T8vXWFeoWhtXb1GeehxLufQd1wOQVL_nPBm7BsMX4JIPqW8uJ2XdO-PV72SE0KCDZhIYS26xDJDVBiaF4vMzF-Z_xOA%3D%3D)
Peter,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Peter, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4bdb2b3f6e7549a2925b1bcd9c3f7233&_e=4ITfYtIzlilWikR3cORFjkC3AJj5uIEZR81c4XTOD_fRpjspwtJUeHIU1VXhYFgS0Z3w5v1HKrTHrgXHZFrdj2wpwMogFBBDZLFK1RRRJKyx5Na88KwwdzfsXZESHzhl5lg-x7aPQuhmKn9AD1EqtpSf-7YHrCT-EGneF5cvJKpGiMXk9y3hD2smNCy4ua9aD1gUTz3xM5vlMDvEGs3bmABAyQai3T4K88OFLNAYH796rYd8YsczJjl-rXAZjCEZPmDnPpyjAlsu9XtC0R2bbDfHzaqe4l583DlQMkUcs2OBh5depyC4HbPEiE7XnxASgADQhIj5RSBZ8L2hrXh2ephxVRF3gZt2Pezm3HoTXB7NNA64MvHjmxhdYHMNKfJ8R8Hc2jwSIA0DsnKhksS9bw%3D%3D)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Peter, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Peter, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4bdb2b3f6e7549a2925b1bcd9c3f7233&_e=4ITfYtIzlilWikR3cORFjkC3AJj5uIEZR81c4XTOD_fRpjspwtJUeHIU1VXhYFgS0Z3w5v1HKrTHrgXHZFrdj2wpwMogFBBDZLFK1RRRJKyx5Na88KwwdzfsXZESHzhl5lg-x7aPQuhmKn9AD1EqtpSf-7YHrCT-EGneF5cvJKpGiMXk9y3hD2smNCy4ua9aD1gUTz3xM5vlMDvEGs3bmABAyQai3T4K88OFLNAYH796rYd8YsczJjl-rXAZjCEZxinQqDvF-WP3DSrDKX8RG7_izfrmCy-27JigBtcFKBZQ-zS1QOAshvjkFnFnwVJEtBuQaotw9APYP9pAiZCRqKcO7YLiesoxcP0SKeLI9tsFibQvNlSKMdzvyaV7EkCJKWtVuqmLV8E6Ok89UDqavw%3D%3D)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4bdb2b3f6e7549a2925b1bcd9c3f7233&_e=4ITfYtIzlilWikR3cORFjkC3AJj5uIEZR81c4XTOD_fRpjspwtJUeHIU1VXhYFgS0Z3w5v1HKrTHrgXHZFrdj2wpwMogFBBDZLFK1RRRJKyx5Na88KwwdzfsXZESHzhl5lg-x7aPQuhmKn9AD1EqtpSf-7YHrCT-EGneF5cvJKpGiMXk9y3hD2smNCy4ua9aD1gUTz3xM5vlMDvEGs3bmABAyQai3T4K88OFLNAYH796rYd8YsczJjl-rXAZjCEZQWaDLdbOVrSKYLuuaAUTYk1rtCF-NKYf5THFW6u7OntbAToDSYyY8oXiPfa71f3b7m7DB9ueATNcwGlxKzuu4v7cfpBMmjypKBZAGzwEiNx655ILiw2WpTRpTNVypEEZEWuCK7Dbowal1Ek9tWsj_w%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4bdb2b3f6e7549a2925b1bcd9c3f7233&_e=4ITfYtIzlilWikR3cORFjkC3AJj5uIEZR81c4XTOD_fRpjspwtJUeHIU1VXhYFgS0Z3w5v1HKrTHrgXHZFrdj2wpwMogFBBDZLFK1RRRJKyx5Na88KwwdzfsXZESHzhl5lg-x7aPQuhmKn9AD1EqtpSf-7YHrCT-EGneF5cvJKpGiMXk9y3hD2smNCy4ua9aD1gUTz3xM5vlMDvEGs3bmABAyQai3T4K88OFLNAYH796rYd8YsczJjl-rXAZjCEZ0qIcFwT5FkBTHjfqQSE8VpBpoj64YXJFaVUFU3r0xRN6NBFG70Uz0_7-PjPOoHTX1-NopRfhiEkVDQuVJiT9-ImPUXm_Qv6wbkUE5t2lORB_RBrbzs-AzN2SXhZlTZZ-wNRaunC3cS7CXSbGosgQMg%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4bdb2b3f6e7549a2925b1bcd9c3f7233&_e=4ITfYtIzlilWikR3cORFjkC3AJj5uIEZR81c4XTOD_fRpjspwtJUeHIU1VXhYFgS0Z3w5v1HKrTHrgXHZFrdj2wpwMogFBBDZLFK1RRRJKyx5Na88KwwdzfsXZESHzhl5lg-x7aPQuhmKn9AD1EqtpSf-7YHrCT-EGneF5cvJKpGiMXk9y3hD2smNCy4ua9aD1gUTz3xM5vlMDvEGs3bmABAyQai3T4K88OFLNAYH796rYd8YsczJjl-rXAZjCEZVx1CzM3vaoTgyT-CAVXpHcN14CdW19v8sb5QD2mpChzVBnbtF6rCGq5zbW2LXfmbhC_xLf_mO7lVqr-C7kHzEapulyLsg3-m8T-29xurfgPhS0Nuozo4SANwQk0f5gW39B37ezRptVT978eaguUtyg%3D%3D)

name: Steve Scalise
subject: America's Future is America First
body:
AFPI is helping America take a turn for the better

| | | Friends, I'm on a mission to save America, and I need your help to do it. Over the last two years, the Biden Administration has done everything in its power to violate our Constitution, destroy our values, and put America LAST! But no more. The American people stood up this November and said ENOUGH! However, the fight is far from over! I am doing all I can to keep working for you and hold the Biden Administration accountable, and the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) is working hard every day to do the same and to put America FIRST again! [_**Friends, are you ready to join me, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, in holding the Biden Administration accountable?**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b62b01998fa491d99047387f1867f63&_e=BohvnVEBDCI_Cof9iYK10ryds8X5byBIKchHYcWvRYAW-WhlgVlr-l58DbeRks_gyI8qHSvvOyI_0nEgqcWahKSBMOnjtB6rKTSwi_jk1PxWzT5V1KagBvpLKoU3RXXPHLiAnuqk5v3-X2sA6S2D5ukIKAOEnBkT38WHwuNT4uL3SsOcpRSLV4gdDl8pbJQIfzMpsfKwzX6kN7KzBbwtXddvcU5V2n_WjEjOzjegO2auN4_oqMKUpXT6SCKVD_5AKI2LQb76mg-PpW8mHqeb1oIUgIUcMVQZhh_kOp54ABBpsHCMMLAFQKvrfqSPcfaFkG_pbuUWIfKmxuOWQptcpTyDyNZnAsqCpK38i9Zeao9v0b4iKxBLZH2mmddrbppLtWIr2G_A-li04ZdBmPYZbM2Qkr6ATy5PNjycDDIbN2WgbY4ff8YWJwjcbTZKXPscKGIhatDYDn2hbdPpCDUcWQ%3D%3D) **If you answered YES to that question, I have news for you: AFPI is one of the most important organizations doing JUST THAT!** ** ** In case you didn't know, AFPI is the PREMIER America First organization in the country. AFPI was founded by a dream team of America First patriots that includes **_Larry Kudlow, Kellyanne Conway, Brooke Rollins, and Rick Perry, among others!_** ** ** **I 've witnessed firsthand the INCREDIBLE impact that AFPI has had on our Nation over the last 2 years, and I know for a fact that they're a team of the most dedicated America First fighters out there.** ** ** But the team at AFPI has a big challenge... **_They 're fighting a war on multiple fronts._** As I write this message, AFPI is suing Big Tech, working overtime to hold the FBI accountable following the raid on former President Trump's home, ensuring that parents can contact their school boards, and educating MILLIONS of patriots like you and me on America First policies. But to be able to continue this important work, they need your support. That's why I have a personal favor to ask of you today... And this may be the most important favor I ask of you in 2023... ** ** [_**Would you please chip in a $15 or more donation to AFPI today?**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b62b01998fa491d99047387f1867f63&_e=BohvnVEBDCI_Cof9iYK10ryds8X5byBIKchHYcWvRYAW-WhlgVlr-l58DbeRks_gyI8qHSvvOyI_0nEgqcWahKSBMOnjtB6rKTSwi_jk1PxWzT5V1KagBvpLKoU3RXXPHLiAnuqk5v3-X2sA6S2D5ukIKAOEnBkT38WHwuNT4uL3SsOcpRSLV4gdDl8pbJQIfzMpsfKwzX6kN7KzBbwtXddvcU5V2n_WjEjOzjegO2auN4_oqMKUpXT6SCKVD_5AKI2LQb76mg-PpW8mHqeb1oIUgIUcMVQZhh_kOp54ABD_EHW8RL5f1JsGPW7bpvkkBky0aU9vG2HktrgLFTTl2Q164PJV6p0pxvc1awox3jtYTEUaQM7DVZc7NZM4zKxpE5FCMQhcZyEyUkz0KbjRqd9C_ybCM2XGYrZBiqxWUJOFqUfi2bhvVhhd6RZk8xoT-C76MRRnpIckn5An17W5xQ%3D%3D) Friends, no other organization in the America First movement is doing more to secure our country's future. Sincerely, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader

clean_body: AFPI is helping America take a turn for the better | | | Friends, I'm on a mission to save America, and I need your help to do it. Over the last two years, the Biden Administration has done everything in its power to violate our Constitution, destroy our values, and put America LAST! But no more. The American people stood up this November and said ENOUGH! However, the fight is far from over! I am doing all I can to keep working for you and hold the Biden Administration accountable, and the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) is working hard every day to do the same and to put America FIRST again! If you answered YES to that question, I have news for you: AFPI is one of the most important organizations doing JUST THAT! In case you didn't know, AFPI is the PREMIER America First organization in the country. AFPI was founded by a dream team of America First patriots that includes Larry Kudlow, Kellyanne Conway, Brooke Rollins, and Rick Perry, among others! I 've witnessed firsthand the INCREDIBLE impact that AFPI has had on our Nation over the last 2 years, and I know for a fact that they're a team of the most dedicated America First fighters out there. But the team at AFPI has a big challenge... They 're fighting a war on multiple fronts. As I write this message, AFPI is suing Big Tech, working overtime to hold the FBI accountable following the raid on former President Trump's home, ensuring that parents can contact their school boards, and educating MILLIONS of patriots like you and me on America First policies. But to be able to continue this important work, they need your support. That's why I have a personal favor to ask of you today... And this may be the most important favor I ask of you in 2023... Friends, no other organization in the America First movement is doing more to secure our country's future. Sincerely, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

| | | Friend,

I've been selected to serve on the House Committee on Oversight and Accountability.

**I can’t express to you how excited I am** about this. We're finally going to **go after the Biden Crime Family.**

This committee will oversee **[investigations into the Biden Crime Family’s](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za87bjmesk5kslveha60el9biogqhdedtk0uou58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spge4o33cjh2bs) **shady** ** business dealings.

Hunter Biden’s transgressions have been **ignored for the past four years,** even though released documents show that the President** lied to us** when he said he was never involved.

**That ends today.**

We need your support in our pursuit of the truth. [**Chip in $23 and let’s show Hunter Biden that there’s a new Sheriff in town.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuf73ivvbekb01e1ut8v3jdfbcpf3bh1r0b0pfho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spge4o33cjh2bs)

|
### **Juneau Signing Today March 9th!!**
#### **Wasilla, Sterling, & Homer Signing Events on March 11th!!!**
---
[“Ranked choice voting is the product of millions of dollars from non-Alaskan, dark-money advertisements, which were spoon-fed to Alaskans by a barrage of ads before the election.” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adn.com%2Fopinions%2Fletters%2F2023%2F03%2F05%2Fletter-end-ranked-choice-voting%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0rh087RsDvZkhljKpaIwKYLeJ90GPwpDxCSeDQ5wlOlobKQOs1WynmmiY&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b&l=en-US&s=ZnevVYJvc4gNW6BwSbUy07bqiRw%3D) Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily News[“Sarah Palin came all the way to CPAC to campaign against the election system that cost her Alaska's House seat” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b&l=en-US&s=hVj6FxsqJaUV6ktFqwZ7IZfJNa4%3D) Business InsiderAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system [during a podcast appearance with Donald Trump Jr.](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fv27a5jw-1-on-1-with-the-speaker-of-the-house-in-nancy-pelosis-former-office.html&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b&l=en-US&s=WMrfch5acUGi2bU8oK6sUB8jwD4%3D) Business Insider["Someone could get the most votes, and not win!" said McCarthy. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b&l=en-US&s=hVj6FxsqJaUV6ktFqwZ7IZfJNa4%3D) Business Insider
---

|
---

Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**

12 to 7pm**

---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b%26ss_email_id%3D640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75%26ss_campaign_name%3DJuneau%2BSigning%2BToday%252C%2BWasilla%252C%2BSterling%252C%2B%2526%2BHomer%2Bon%2BMarch%2B11th%2BCPAC%2Bin%2BDC%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-03-09T17%253A20%253A44Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b&l=en-US&s=TGtTVin9zNokq7T61v_YmZwCgEg%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b&l=en-US&s=xMDgVCOqKHmBEYDFOWPuW9Em-FM%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)
---
---
|

|

---
|
---
---
|
---
[_ _ Please Sign Today on Our Website _ _](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b%26ss_email_id%3D640a155f76a2e0783f9d0e75%26ss_campaign_name%3DJuneau%2BSigning%2BToday%252C%2BWasilla%252C%2BSterling%252C%2B%2526%2BHomer%2Bon%2BMarch%2B11th%2BCPAC%2Bin%2BDC%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-03-09T17%253A20%253A44Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_640a11baa296ed088e45ba6b&l=en-US&s=0-wSSBuI8m2eTD5joIKZ-s1AFho%3D)
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)
---
---

In May of 2021, I launched a unique political action committee... And Tucker was a fan immediately!

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6e37n1f9iksr4s5k2i5gj2p8agiqa5itg3jlms8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spge4p32clh2bs)
---
My name is Ryan Girdusky. I founded the 1776 Project PAC in May of 2021 to take our schools back from the radical left one district at a time. 2 weeks later Tucker Carlson had me on his show to discuss the 1776 Project PAC. _**[He even encouraged his viewers to contribute to our mission!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2hnc5l147tr7ig147daekvcvrmmmt6u8f2f158_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spge4p32clh2bs)**_ But why? Well, Friend, you see... We were the first organization of our kind. **Never before had an organization been founded for the express purpose of replacing radical leftist at the school board level!** Now, nearly 2 years later, we’ve tallied over 100 victories and changed the lives of millions of students. But we’re not done yet. This year, we plan to support 250 more conservative school board candidates- and we can’t do it without your help. **[Would you consider taking Tucker’s advice and contribute $15, $20, or even $30 dollars to our mission today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z23ao6b5ucr75j1qs1teo5001fft1q6laa1s7pb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spge4p32clh2bs)** Friend, the 1776 Project PAC isn’t a billionaire-backed political action committee that has MILLIONS in the bank. When you donate, you’re making a HUGE impact on students in districts across the country... ... And you’re changing the future of America for the better. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder, 1776 Project PAC

name: Steve Scalise
subject: America's Future is America First
body:
| | | Peter, I'm on a mission to save America, and I need your help to do it. Over the last two years, the Biden Administration has done everything in its power to violate our Constitution, destroy our values, and put America LAST! But no more. The American people stood up this November and said ENOUGH! However, the fight is far from over! I am doing all I can to keep working for you and hold the Biden Administration accountable, and the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) is working hard every day to do the same and to put America FIRST again! [_**Patriot, are you ready to join me, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, in holding the Biden Administration accountable?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62415892:6AjZLPGtN:m:1:3365131770:2237E6CC724B91603751FA25EDEA66E7:r) **If you answered YES to that question, I have news for you: AFPI is one of the most important organizations doing JUST THAT!** ** ** In case you didn't know, AFPI is the PREMIER America First organization in the country. AFPI was founded by a dream team of America First patriots that includes **_Larry Kudlow, Kellyanne Conway, Brooke Rollins, and Rick Perry, among others!_** ** ** **I 've witnessed firsthand the INCREDIBLE impact that AFPI has had on our Nation over the last 2 years, and I know for a fact that they're a team of the most dedicated America First fighters out there.** ** ** But the team at AFPI has a big challenge... **_They 're fighting a war on multiple fronts._** As I write this message, AFPI is suing Big Tech, working overtime to hold the FBI accountable following the raid on former President Trump's home, ensuring that parents can contact their school boards, and educating MILLIONS of patriots like you and me on America First policies. But to be able to continue this important work, they need your support. That's why I have a personal favor to ask of you today... And this may be the most important favor I ask of you in 2023... ** ** [_**Would you please chip in a donation to AFPI today?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62415892:6AjZLPGtN:m:1:3365131770:2237E6CC724B91603751FA25EDEA66E7:r) No other organization in the America First movement is doing more to secure our country's future. Sincerely, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader
---
|
---

You were added to the system October 12, 2022.

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8qc7e6pr9jm5jtllmos8amue75v1fblochhp9eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spgecp74c3h2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

The January 6th Committee lied.

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Tucker Carlson was our first fan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
in may of 2021, i launched a unique political action committee... and tucker was a fan immediately!

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651341%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5vSWoTZJZAk2fEHGs%2b%2bR6Q&sysid=1)
---
My name is Ryan Girdusky. I founded the 1776 Project PAC in May of 2021 to take our schools back from the radical left one district at a time. 2 weeks later Tucker Carlson had me on his show to discuss the 1776 Project PAC. _**[He even encouraged his viewers to contribute to our mission!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651342%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gaseuFNg%2fsgmPTPwJAQK7w&sysid=1)**_ But why? Well, friend, you see... We were the first organization of our kind. **Never before had an organization been founded for the express purpose of replacing radical leftist at the school board level!** Now, nearly 2 years later, we’ve tallied over 100 victories and changed the lives of millions of students. But we’re not done yet. This year, we plan to support 250 more conservative school board candidates- and we can’t do it without your help. **[Would you consider taking Tucker’s advice and contribute $15, $20, or even $30 dollars to our mission today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651343%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ej8AfY8oTFodYrYTllIxsA&sysid=1)** Friend, the 1776 Project PAC isn’t a billionaire-backed political action committee that has MILLIONS in the bank. When you donate, you’re making a HUGE impact on students in districts across the country... ... And you’re changing the future of America for the better. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder, 1776 Project PAC

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Signature Needed: keep woke politics OUT of the military
body:
| | | Hi Peter,
---
It’s Col. Mike Waltz, and right now, I need your help.

Every day, the Biden Administration is pumping woke politics like critical race theory into our military and service academies.

It’s hurting our troops, it’s damaging our military readiness, and it’s making America weaker.

**As a Green Beret who put his life on the line for this country, I’m appalled.**

We have the strongest military in the world because our military is a true meritocracy, where no matter what you look like or where you come from, if you work hard and possess the necessary skills, you’ll succeed.

_But the Biden Administration wants to end that._

**Peter, it’s up to conservatives like us to save our military.**

[**Sign our “Save the Military” petition today to keep woke politics OUT of our armed forces!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5c3daba8c1d7464393e5404650ede42a&_e=kibI03g3ThAXv6bsKBjRMog7wJqh4qvWM1GLuvPJ_fX7zjNaIFWjM2f1qg2cqpWZZNRXF7oFlfqe0NeEhlxdm4vP_r7c7rfAPIHrsc_9q8TkUEc1WLAGqPJZbILx2EsmbMkldm9FghsaL6AtN42Da5JpnHDJ6SdzV9gxib7XSLbUeuqtALhzHbO6AmIAjjsOKeblYbgzoY5PUw3FLT2GHzU6g4mp238sVfnAKir5DvFeYFmPf3lGEW2UjAIv03u37-pzRQIN3ab4pNTwhf_6BYY7bdC0m8sTqqI96coVG-kHxWome4CfBaQ_Apsg3YZzddmLM78QEQY8Pm_XZvCSL130CX3r-znGBD5yPyXJmv8rNbk-a62ceGtFY5fkOfXz)

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach the first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, I’m hoping
you’ll help us reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully
retiring our campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18902?t=1001&akid=3040%2E346206%2EJtcH_S ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18902?t=1002&akid=3040%2E346206%2EJtcH_S ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230309-3040-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3040_346206_JtcH_S&akid=3040%2E346206%2EJtcH_S

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3040%2E346206%2EJtcH_S

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
I remember how the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.

| **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,** I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.** And now it looks like history is repeating itself. **Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
* More than 2 million lost job
* Stocks plummeting over 20%
* IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign and send: Urge the Senate to swiftly confirm Gigi Sohn to the FCC
body:
Quick signature for confirmation
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb21c6d9c-297c-4990-bc54-f13aea80994e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, President Biden has re-nominated leading public activist Gigi Sohn to the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to fill a Democratic seat vacant since January 2021.

Sohn is one of the nation’s leading public advocates for open, affordable and democratic communications networks. Daily Kos worked closely with her while she was a top aide at the FCC during the Obama administration, where she championed and implemented net neutrality rules that were later repealed under Donald Trump. [**Sign and send to your U.S. senators: Confirm Gigi Sohn to the FCC.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc461aa0b-6c8a-4f79-9623-3f4e385016ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://default.salsalabs.org/T244a30ae-7992-4515-a06b-5d15c9cf02c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Without basic net neutrality protections, large phone and cable companies — Comcast, Verizon, and AT&T, for example — are able to block, throttle, and slow access to sites and services at will, charge new fees for users and companies to reach audiences online, and freely sell our data. Internet users and small media outlets like Daily Kos are at the mercy of big telecom companies.

Sohn is a Distinguished Fellow at the Georgetown Law Institute for Technology Law & Policy and a Benton Senior Fellow & Public Advocate. She sits on the Board of Directors of the Electronic Frontier Foundation, and has strong support from the nation's leading civil rights organizations due to her commitment to engaging frontline communities. Sohn would be the Commission’s first openly LGBTQ+ commissioner, providing lived experience to a critical governing body. [**Sign and send to your U.S. senators: Confirm Gigi Sohn to the FCC.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td51845c0-4d53-4797-b167-f966cf1e5c3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34cd245b-9e26-4aeb-b7ea-88d2caeca73a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Sign the petition: Tell Nikki Haley "HELL NO!" to raising the retirement age for Social Security
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell Nikki Haley HELL NO to Raising the Retirement Age >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7d12bb1-146a-46d2-8148-8c74c867f0c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb20107fa-28df-4e67-a860-60e72c95b5d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republican presidential candidate Nikki Haley has [just called for](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ef1d451-fe2b-49e2-80cc-980b3dbfcd6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) raising the retirement age for Social Security and Medicare. **Tell her HELL NO.** If people want to work longer, fine, that's their right. But for many who've worked for decades in a hard, physical job, delaying retirement until 70, 75, 80, or more is not a realistic option. Social Security and Medicare have been game changers for seniors, especially when it comes to fighting senior poverty. And there are plenty of sensible ways to keep these programs healthy far into the future. But making people work even longer is not one of them. [**Add your name, and Tell Nikki Haley HELL NO to Raising the Retirement Age >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca6462a5-05b7-4e51-a84d-78762a46acc2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P.S. - if you no longer with to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

name: American Update
subject: R.L. Stine’s Publisher Makes Woke Changes To Beloved Series “Goosebumps”
body:
And CNN Continues To Struggle Post-Trump, As “Jill Biden Abroad” Fails

| |
---
|
---
---
| | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651457%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yb9o1Vmqo2ZRfgO7yOg%2b%2fw&sysid=1)
---
| [ R.L. Stine’s Publisher Makes Woke Changes To Beloved Series “Goosebumps” ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651450%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nqd0%2fGAk0G3g%2bfEm762PNA&sysid=1)
---
[ R.L. Stine, the author of the popular “Goosebumps” series, has recently spoken out against his publisher, Scholastic, for making changes to his books without his consent. Reports surfaced that Stine had joined Scholastic to edit his books as part of a 2018 e-book re-release, resulting in over 100 edits being made. However, The Times later corrected the error, acknowledging that the books “were changed without his knowledge.” ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651451%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NRS975aEoQVBFnZJGqk1UA&sysid=1)

The special averaged only 368,000 total viewers, while Fox News’s “Hannity” and MSNBC’s “The Rachel Maddow Show” drew 2.7 million and 2.3 million viewers, respectively. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: A big announcement:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
This week I had the honor of delivering my first budget address as Pennsylvania’s Governor.

Derek, this week I had the honor of delivering my first budget address as Pennsylvania’s Governor.

I outlined my plan to boost innovation and economic development in Pennsylvania, and make sure the doors of opportunity and freedom are open for everyone.

**[I’m so excited about the work ahead, and I hope you are too. If you are ready to fight for real freedom and real opportunity for every Pennsylvanian, sign your name to show your support for our bold agenda:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59925406/395530507/-96182049?utm_campaign=email_030923_budget&source=email_030923_budget&refcode=email_030923_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGMyMTZiNC1hZGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L985LIF5vQRWJaKVuKlDTo2e_jmZrAkAGFMQFUGu8ZA=&emci=d6cf8c05-9dbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bdc216b4-adbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59925408/395530508/-96182049?utm_campaign=email_030923_budget&source=email_030923_budget&refcode=email_030923_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGMyMTZiNC1hZGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L985LIF5vQRWJaKVuKlDTo2e_jmZrAkAGFMQFUGu8ZA=&emci=d6cf8c05-9dbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bdc216b4-adbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)
---
Here’s just some of what we’re going to do with this new budget plan, Derek:

We’re going to make a major down payment on innovation and economic development across our Commonwealth.

We’re going to protect our workers and ensure Pennsylvania never becomes a right-to-work state.

We’re going to create a tax credit to encourage Pennsylvanians to become nurses, police officers and teachers – critical jobs that are going unfilled right now.

We’re going to pay childcare workers a competitive salary and give them the benefits they deserve.

We’re going to provide universal free breakfast to every single child in our public schools.

We’re going to fight to finally raise the minimum wage to $15.

We’re going to put real resources into studying and addressing why black mothers are three times as likely to die during childbirth.

We’re going to create good-paying jobs and fulfill our constitutional obligation to protect Pennsylvanian’s clean air and pure water – because we don’t need to choose between protecting jobs and protecting our planet.

We’re going to increase funding for public education by a billion dollars this year.

And we’re going to ensure LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians have the right to marry who they love and be who they are, protect women’s right to choose, and guarantee the right to vote will never be infringed upon.

**We’re going to do all of this and so much more, Derek. And we’re going to do it together.[If you’re with me in this fight – and ready to usher in a new era for Pennsylvanians – sign your name now to support my budget plan:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59925409/395530509/-96182049?utm_campaign=email_030923_budget&source=email_030923_budget&refcode=email_030923_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGMyMTZiNC1hZGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L985LIF5vQRWJaKVuKlDTo2e_jmZrAkAGFMQFUGu8ZA=&emci=d6cf8c05-9dbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bdc216b4-adbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)**
| [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59925410/395530510/-96182049?utm_campaign=email_030923_budget&source=email_030923_budget&refcode=email_030923_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGMyMTZiNC1hZGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L985LIF5vQRWJaKVuKlDTo2e_jmZrAkAGFMQFUGu8ZA=&emci=d6cf8c05-9dbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bdc216b4-adbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)

Josh

name: Tom Fitton
subject: A worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration
body:
You and I...indeed all Americans...are facing a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration...and every bit of its many serious impacts...both long and short term.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

You and I...indeed all Americans...are facing _a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration ...and every bit of its many serious impacts...both long and short term_.
President Biden reversed former President Trump's efforts to secure our borders...from halting construction on the border wall to "pausing" deportations, to reviving the disastrous Obama era DACA ("Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals") amnesty program called "pathways to citizenship.
_Even Biden 's allies in Congress admit that this avalanche of illegal crossings at the southern border is overwhelming the resources of our immigration authorities_.
Yet today, Judicial Watch is _still_ the one organization that is committed to fighting the radical Biden open borders agenda... _**[and we need your help](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62480&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**_!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62480&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**As a result of Biden policies, America is experiencing a massive new wave of illegal aliens. In fact, last September, the U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) agency reported that during the course of that fiscal year just over 2.76 million "border encounters" had occurred...compared to just over 1.95 million the previous year. _That 's a 41%__increase in one year_! What a shameful record.**

It's an unmitigated catastrophe, and it's Joe Biden's fault, pure and simple.

Here's what else we know:

**" Open borders" groups and their media allies did all they could to exploit the Covid pandemic to make it easier for ineligible voters like illegal aliens to vote in our elections _by working_ _overtime_ _to undermine state and federal election laws_.**

Now, you might think that the very idea of illegal aliens voting is ridiculous... _but not to open borders radicals_! They not only want to make it _easier_ for non-citizens to vote in our elections through some kind of backdoor amnesty. They also want illegal aliens to keep coming and voting for _their_ candidates!

And, quite frankly, they seem to be getting away with it!

[That's why your special contribution today is so important.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62480&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62480&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

_**Your support will help us step up our legal efforts to counter Biden 's radical immigration agenda, enforce our laws against illegal immigration, defend voter ID laws and develop new strategies to challenge "sanctuary" policies in the courts of law and public opinion.**_

Most importantly, we're fighting illegal immigration's impact on _honest elections_ because "_dirty " or inaccurate voter rolls make it easier for illegal aliens and other ineligible voters to vote_.

That's why we're (successfully) suing states in federal court to compel them to follow federal law
and clean their voter registration rolls.

We've entered into historic legal settlements with **California, Indiana, Kentucky** and**Ohio** that led to cleaner, more accurate voter rolls and other important election integrity reforms. **Just last week, because of our lawsuit, Los Angeles County removed over 1.2 million ineligible voters from its rolls**!

In addition, last year we settled lawsuits against **New York City** and **North Carolina** after those jurisdictions had removed more than 800,000 ineligible names from their voter rolls, and we're now pursuing voter roll-related litigation against **Colorado, Illinois** and **Pennsylvania**.

And while we press forward with our legal and investigative actions to keep non-citizens from illegally casting votes in our elections due to "dirty" voter registration rolls...we are also committed to helping states protect voter ID laws over the challenges by the radical Hispanic lobby, the organized Left, and the Biden Justice Department.

[I urge you to again help support all our important work by making a tax-deductible contribution to **Judicial Watch** today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62480&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

---

_Your generous support is essential_ , and will be enormously helpful as we challenge the Biden administration's radical immigration policies and fight to enforce our laws against illegal immigration and stand firm for the rule of law.

There are forces in both political parties...with allies buried deep in the federal bureaucracy... who want to keep illegal aliens flooding into our nation. They are powerful and well-funded, and they have a fully committed and radical ally in the White House!

But **Judicial Watch 's **legal actions in pursuit of justice and accountability and our defense of the rule of law are relentless. Our investigations and legal work in the courts pay off and are delivering real results!

[**That 's why I'm hopingyou will join with us, and make a tax-deductible contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62480&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

Thank you in advance for for giving your support to our work!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton

name: Your America
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00675%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zTlaR%2f7cX74RJ8RVzXAivg&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00676%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IyVtzJydlFqbndLBj2eFWg&sysid=1) [NO](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00677%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q6fBM5LD16%2bd6jApPiyc0A&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00678%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u2OSIlf%2bhNGR8ZIXdPlHsg&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c00679%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EA0pzZyk99zuJMaPHnOkjw&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

|
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7144%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=pvLasyPb82QDPWxnYZnNaA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7144%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=pvLasyPb82QDPWxnYZnNaA&sysid=1)

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Americans deserved the truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | |
---
This is 70th Secretary of State Mike Pompeo.

Have you bought a copy of my new book - "Never Give An Inch" \- yet? It's a New York Times bestseller and I will show you why.

Unlock _**exclusive**_ access to a never before told story that I detail in my new book.

---
**INTEL FROM 70TH SECRETARY OF STATE MIKE POMPEO:**
For all of us, March 2020 was a hectic time. The pandemic had just shut down the entire country and we were all looking for answers.

On March 26, President Trump held a call with Chinese President Xi Jinping, one day after I had told the President that China had repeatedly delayed sharing information about the virus and that they were engaged in a disinformation campaign.

On the call Xi told Trump that I was jeopardizing the "phase one" trade deal that the principals had just agreed to.

I couldn't believe it, Xi was trying to get Trump to fire me.

When the call was over, Trump turned to me and said:

"My Mike, that guy hates you!"

Championing Our American Values")

_**A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO**_

Whether it's sending a spy balloon over our sensitive military installations, stealing our industrial secrets to undermine our economy, or making sure their surveillance and propaganda app is on every American's phone, the Chinese Communist Party is working day and night to make America weaker.

If you share my concerns about China's threat to America, make a donation to help support tough conservatives who will never give an inch to the CCP.

clean_body: | | | | | | This is 70th Secretary of State Mike Pompeo. Have you bought a copy of my new book - "Never Give An Inch" \- yet? It's a New York Times bestseller and I will show you why. Unlock exclusive access to a never before told story that I detail in my new book. INTEL FROM 70TH SECRETARY OF STATE MIKE POMPEO: For all of us, March 2020 was a hectic time. The pandemic had just shut down the entire country and we were all looking for answers. On March 26, President Trump held a call with Chinese President Xi Jinping, one day after I had told the President that China had repeatedly delayed sharing information about the virus and that they were engaged in a disinformation campaign. On the call Xi told Trump that I was jeopardizing the "phase one" trade deal that the principals had just agreed to. I couldn't believe it, Xi was trying to get Trump to fire me. When the call was over, Trump turned to me and said: "My Mike, that guy hates you!" | | | | | | | "Mike Pompeo Is Calling on All Conservatives to Join Him in Championing Our American Values" A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO Whether it's sending a spy balloon over our sensitive military installations, stealing our industrial secrets to undermine our economy, or making sure their surveillance and propaganda app is on every American's phone, the Chinese Communist Party is working day and night to make America weaker. If you share my concerns about China's threat to America, make a donation to help support tough conservatives who will never give an inch to the CCP. | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. body:
In a few short weeks, Democrats have a chance to tighten our margins in the Virginia Senate | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mGw1gE27szrRr4jM2zzaUZD_AXTsV-cMC4Tb-jhu0k533BCvd5fjSeB9XhhcmCZPFT2ayhIHX2Ky-19CtfpdWFViiESxLKc6n520NpZ8bd_tfI-yl3VinHeOyzLqqiONSxJvsVt_g6G56eaEx6VzETuK1UQhUNjGPGXNzBlaKZJMvDhIeO_FRdD5PpaoVb15fVVNv2xY9v69EAi26KHN6Lj8slvQNKErOOUcfRb9jWLIyEnLw4zGmptfEivw4aBFk93oVBSLjAZI_3LU5_-wpsGkG09UwtV7VXefUZSTZGaLjBG5gmEE0qG9mFVrCtdxAx-OgNiqhncEew3cuxaiI2jnmN8pBIeTDnM3DgXJy7kMw2D7qJylepiNyLu_zcBZvGw/3uc/K6nZC1OZQj6r3tDQD8wXCg/h0/pRAkqZzykSsikXlZgJaDzjm7ako7NcnzaLyerGpK7ZQ) **In a few short weeks, Democrat Lamont Bagby has a chance to defend our _razor-thin_ majority in the Virginia Senate.** **If we win,** Democrats will have another strong voice in Virginia’s state Senate, boosting Democratic power in the Commonwealth. **If we lose,** Republicans stand to gain ground and bring forth legislation that harms LGBTQ+ youth, pushes the MAGA agenda, and is down-right, anti-American. We need this win to solidify our thin chamber margins, protect working families, and build Democratic power – every seat matters in our fight to protect the Senate majority and flip the House blue in November. **We’re committed to putting in the work to win every last election. Majorities are built one seat at a time, and coming together to win races like this one is key to breaking Republicans’ tight grip on our legislative chambers.** [Republicans are doing everything they can to beat us – can you make an urgent donation of $7 or more? Every dollar will ensure Democrats can win elections across the country in states like Virginia >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mGw1gE27szrRr4jM2zzaUZD_AXTsV-cMC4Tb-jhu0k533BCvd5fjSeB9XhhcmCZPFT2ayhIHX2Ky-19CtfpdWFViiESxLKc6n520NpZ8bd_tfI-yl3VinHeOyzLqqiONSxML_KlK3ARLPasw5fm23L6juxGwzOjzVRt_rCZ4gPj2LaPZCyw8JtzNE-NioRHxBdgjMnk4Equ_I4hvap-hrBgBeYPt6JDly2SXC4_NYlhacSOPp44f-aP5w_upxiEwMCNGKq2xc8jra15DO6yXc6jmX6r0eS0NdkNbxfyO1-0CTwIJ6a8F4btjByWjcMRWLc1QNg1BrVbyNGwEFLrqpA9tEQBdqp5-sD--qRBrUMDPPd7iWR4q9sUy9NR5bNE71xA/3uc/K6nZC1OZQj6r3tDQD8wXCg/h1/D4slEl2u2ROxEpvUHHfQ7cpT-6mhGT7tWSG3xM0au74) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

This is one of many races that we’re facing in Virginia this year – and each one is critical if Democrats want to come out on top in this battleground.
**Here’s the issue:** Special elections are expensive and often come down to just a handful of votes. Just earlier this year, Democrats won a seat in the Virginia state senate by just 700 votes – so we need all hands on deck for every race!
We are counting on you to fuel this fight – the only people standing in the way of Republican special election victories are you and the people reading this email.
[Can you join us in this fight and donate $7 to help us defend our majorities in Virginia and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mGw1gE27szrRr4jM2zzaUZD_AXTsV-cMC4Tb-jhu0k533BCvd5fjSeB9XhhcmCZPFT2ayhIHX2Ky-19CtfpdWFViiESxLKc6n520NpZ8bd_tfI-yl3VinHeOyzLqqiONSxML_KlK3ARLPasw5fm23L6jIzNdSVWWERdTSEHjgu9sfx4wcT1TuknxHeNM7d2E9odGYM8Rv7VOWceA37sHVwCKXotQSuy9mndnVNaXUyZJCGaJUjf8OXpBhYOdDhMTJCBPjzIH0K4HjstTeomc2NDpCJCLLPjKayMLxo1hSBpZ4u-Zf9pWle_KIotg10BAZlfy87xAyxzSS_MyGYlis0kWqYkllBoanZA3yCR2hHZTcYBDN828eUzdkJ9A8FeIpyg/3uc/K6nZC1OZQj6r3tDQD8wXCg/h7/wAw5CVIJsIBXiel9Bj4hkgzcth3eYzI38shPGttmEag)

clean_body: In a few short weeks, Democrats have a chance to tighten our margins in the Virginia Senate | | | | | In a few short weeks, Democrat Lamont Bagby has a chance to defend our razor-thin majority in the Virginia Senate. If we win, Democrats will have another strong voice in Virginia’s state Senate, boosting Democratic power in the Commonwealth. If we lose, Republicans stand to gain ground and bring forth legislation that harms LGBTQ+ youth, pushes the MAGA agenda, and is down-right, anti-American. We need this win to solidify our thin chamber margins, protect working families, and build Democratic power – every seat matters in our fight to protect the Senate majority and flip the House blue in November. We’re committed to putting in the work to win every last election. Majorities are built one seat at a time, and coming together to win races like this one is key to breaking Republicans’ tight grip on our legislative chambers. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | This is one of many races that we’re facing in Virginia this year – and each one is critical if Democrats want to come out on top in this battleground. Here’s the issue: Special elections are expensive and often come down to just a handful of votes. Just earlier this year, Democrats won a seat in the Virginia state senate by just 700 votes – so we need all hands on deck for every race! We are counting on you to fuel this fight – the only people standing in the way of Republican special election victories are you and the people reading this email. name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: A story from a communism-filled childhood
body:
Most Americans today have little to no experience with the horrors it brings to a country.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0pvfvun9jauqnlffebgfe9tkphc29ruuupbouo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spie4ob0s3h2bs)

Friend,

Most Americans today have little to no experience with the horrors it brings to a country.

When they think of socialism, they forget about the empty grocery stores, gas shortages, propaganda, and secret police.

Let me introduce myself to you. I am Zilvinas Silenas, the President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and I grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania.

As much as I hate to say it, I am seeing the rise of socialism in America. And I am terrified.

We must show the next generation what socialism can do to a country. I've set a goal to raise $7,000 in the next 48 hours to support **FEE in the Classroom** and share the importance of liberty and free markets with students.

[_**Will you support the next generation as they fight communism with a gift of $15, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh8mho27ts16e6qfv10jqj47fl38970va3bnmc10_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spie4ob0s3h2bs)

**Do you want to know what 's it like to grow up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania? Let me tell you a story from my childhood.**

On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake.

The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits.

What we didn't know was that **five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded** , sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway.

**You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us.** In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. **That 's how we were treated under socialism.**

During the moment, that was a rare day of sunshine and fun -- something that didn't happen often under Soviet reign. But it was still contaminated by the broken ideology that swept over my home country.

These are not the stories politicians and the media want the next generation to hear. But your generous support will help FEE bring our pro-liberty and pro-free markets message directly to students. [_**Click here to spread the pro-liberty revolution in classrooms across the nation >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3f4cvmu2oni5m7l3s10tuijajdbc7mbcoiv44p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spie4ob0s3h2bs)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. Students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As.

**When students complete FEE in the Classroom, they walk away with a new appreciation for the freedom we have in this country. **

Right now, socialism is gaining popularity with the next generation because celebrities, politicians, and the media tell them it's the _" right"_ or _" moral"_ choice.

But FEE in the Classroom is telling them the truth about the values of liberty and free markets.

Can I count on you to support _FEE in the Classroom_ and support a student? **Click below to donate and help reach our goal of raising $7,000 in the next 48 hours.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zag917uitmul6fck7483a6olhpck5rkrn48udblg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spie4ob0s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs1osdijqcudra0g3n7j21lifdaekvhif94vls5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spie4ob0s3h2bs)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpvapvq2mohekmim4rro6bmaqfi1aavuct1f11so_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spie4ob0s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zho0d2kik1vk11jh485mq9on52dtes7kuvtrsa4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spie4ob0s3h2bs)

clean_body: Most Americans today have little to no experience with the horrors it brings to a country. Friend, Most Americans today have little to no experience with the horrors it brings to a country. When they think of socialism, they forget about the empty grocery stores, gas shortages, propaganda, and secret police. Let me introduce myself to you. I am Zilvinas Silenas, the President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and I grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. As much as I hate to say it, I am seeing the rise of socialism in America. And I am terrified. We must show the next generation what socialism can do to a country. I've set a goal to raise $7,000 in the next 48 hours to support FEE in the Classroom and share the importance of liberty and free markets with students. Do you want to know what 's it like to grow up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania? Let me tell you a story from my childhood. On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake. The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits. What we didn't know was that five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded , sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway. You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us. In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. That 's how we were treated under socialism. During the moment, that was a rare day of sunshine and fun -- something that didn't happen often under Soviet reign. But it was still contaminated by the broken ideology that swept over my home country. These are not the stories politicians and the media want the next generation to hear. But your generous support will help FEE bring our pro-liberty and pro-free markets message directly to students. FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. Students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As. When students complete FEE in the Classroom, they walk away with a new appreciation for the freedom we have in this country. Right now, socialism is gaining popularity with the next generation because celebrities, politicians, and the media tell them it's the " right" or " moral" choice. But FEE in the Classroom is telling them the truth about the values of liberty and free markets. Can I count on you to support FEE in the Classroom and support a student? Click below to donate and help reach our goal of raising $7,000 in the next 48 hours. Thank you, Zilvinas Silenas President Foundation for Economic Education FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. ---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3drmpuj7ocfkh0atunhafjhibuu5l42bl2bg74g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spie4o74sjh2bs)
