name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: Our 2023 youth fellows range in age from 14 to 17 and are 100% BIPOC.
body:
Over this 8-month fellowship, they’ll learn community centered organizing and how to stay rooted in the community. | | |
---
Friend, Before I ran for office, I was a community organizer fighting for racial, social, environmental, and economic justice. One of my inspirations was a local organizer named Mama Lila Cabbil―a water warrior, civil rights activist, fighter for racial justice, a defender of democracy, and a transit advocate. When we launched our youth civic engagement fellowship, we wanted to embody the same organizing and activism that Mama Lila brought to our communities. **Our 2023 youth fellows range in age from 14 to 17 and are 100% BIPOC.** 85% identify as female, 7% male, and 7% non-binary. They represent the most diverse generation in American history and are ready to lead on critical issues impacting us today, and impacting their generation for decades to come. **Over this 8-month fellowship, they’ll learn community organizing skills as well as what it means to be rooted in progressive values.** They will receive 32 hours of instruction, participate in 32 hours of field work, and receive a $1,000 stipend for full participation. [**We’re in the 3rd month of our 8-month training and your support today is critical in providing them with the skills they need to be leaders in their local communities. Subject: Our 2023 youth fellows range in age from 14 to 17 and are 100% BIPOC.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Young voters turned out in record numbers to fight for critical issues impacting their generation―from the climate crisis to access to higher education to jobs and wages and more.
**The leaders of tomorrow are ready to lead now.** That’s exactly why we launched our youth civic engagement fellowship, to provide young people with the tools and resources to be organizers and leaders in their local community.
**Our 2023 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship launched in January, training 13 Fellows, ages 14 to 17 in areas ranging from grassroots organizing to communications.** Our Fellows are 100% BIPOC with 85% identifying as women, 7% men, and 7% non-binary.
Each month, our Fellows come together to hear from grassroots and elected leaders, as well as to learn from each other, bringing their own individual experiences to this 8-month training.
**One Fellow recently told us:**
> _“In the short time I’ve been in this fellowship I have witnessed immense love, strength, struggles, and power. Surrounded by my likeminded allies, I can clearly say this fellowship is one step in an ongoing marathon to success and prosperity.”_
[**We’re in the 3rd month of this 8 month training, with much more to come including trainings on environmental justice and education justice. clean_body: Over this 8-month fellowship, they’ll learn community centered organizing and how to stay rooted in the community. | | | Friend, Before I ran for office, I was a community organizer fighting for racial, social, environmental, and economic justice. One of my inspirations was a local organizer named Mama Lila Cabbil―a water warrior, civil rights activist, fighter for racial justice, a defender of democracy, and a transit advocate. When we launched our youth civic engagement fellowship, we wanted to embody the same organizing and activism that Mama Lila brought to our communities. Our 2023 youth fellows range in age from 14 to 17 and are 100% BIPOC. 85% identify as female, 7% male, and 7% non-binary. They represent the most diverse generation in American history and are ready to lead on critical issues impacting us today, and impacting their generation for decades to come. Over this 8-month fellowship, they’ll learn community organizing skills as well as what it means to be rooted in progressive values. They will receive 32 hours of instruction, participate in 32 hours of field work, and receive a $1,000 stipend for full participation. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to the Rooted In Community Leadership PAC | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for joining me in investing in our future. Always serving you, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Wed, Mar 8, 2023 Subject: Our 2023 youth fellows range in age from 14 to 17 and are 100% BIPOC. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Young voters turned out in record numbers to fight for critical issues impacting their generation―from the climate crisis to access to higher education to jobs and wages and more. The leaders of tomorrow are ready to lead now. That’s exactly why we launched our youth civic engagement fellowship, to provide young people with the tools and resources to be organizers and leaders in their local community. Our 2023 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship launched in January, training 13 Fellows, ages 14 to 17 in areas ranging from grassroots organizing to communications. Our Fellows are 100% BIPOC with 85% identifying as women, 7% men, and 7% non-binary. Each month, our Fellows come together to hear from grassroots and elected leaders, as well as to learn from each other, bringing their own individual experiences to this 8-month training. One Fellow recently told us: “In the short time I’ve been in this fellowship I have witnessed immense love, strength, struggles, and power. Surrounded by my likeminded allies, I can clearly say this fellowship is one step in an ongoing marathon to success and prosperity.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to the Rooted In Community Leadership PAC | | | | | | | | | Together, we are empowering the next generation to fight for their future and ours. In solidarity, Rashida | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . name: Emilia Sykes
subject: My promise to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to take a moment and reach out personally to let you know what serving Northeast Ohio – my beloved hometown – means to me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59913212/395486125/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNiNmE4Ny04ZmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nt2GeHwuK3giZcTiibmOcPl1lhVgC06u8NTlbZSksTY=)
Peter, it’s Emilia.

I wanted to take a moment and reach out personally to let you know what serving Northeast Ohio – _my beloved hometown_ – means to me. I’ll explain more in a moment, but first:

[**I am fighting everyday to deliver impactful and lasting change for our community. But I’m going to need your help to ensure that an extreme Republican doesn’t flip this seat red and reverse all the progress we’ve made in two years. Is there any amount you can pitch in to keep OH-13 blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59913216/395486129/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNiNmE4Ny04ZmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nt2GeHwuK3giZcTiibmOcPl1lhVgC06u8NTlbZSksTY=)
| [**Keep Northeast Ohio Blue**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59913220/395486133/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNiNmE4Ny04ZmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nt2GeHwuK3giZcTiibmOcPl1lhVgC06u8NTlbZSksTY=)
---

**I know how hard the people of Northeast Ohio work. I’ve seen it all my life.**

But growing up in Akron, I quickly learned that working families throughout our community aren’t given the same opportunities or a level playing field that others enjoy.

That’s exactly why I entered a career in public service, Peter: To change the status quo. That’s why I worked across the aisle in the Ohio State House to fight for higher wages, working and middle-class tax cuts, and other legislation that would put more money in the pockets of Northeast Ohioans. And that’s why, last year, I ran for – and won – one of the most competitive House seats in the country.

_Because our community knows we deserve an advocate on the federal level_ – someone who isn’t afraid to stand up to people who are standing in the way of progress; someone who will advocate for our jobs, healthcare, and freedoms; and someone who will work to make the day to day a little bit easier. And that’s exactly what I’m trying to do, every day, in Washington.

Peter, my promise to you is that I’ll always strive to be that type of leader, and that I’ll never stop fighting for the community I love. And when it comes to fighting for Northeast Ohio, I’m only just getting started.

[**It is the honor of my life to serve OH-13 in Congress. But with our district being one of the most competitive in the entire nation, I’m going to need your help to ensure I can keep pushing for progress in Washington. Please, is there any amount you can pitch in to our people-powered campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59913222/395486138/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNiNmE4Ny04ZmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nt2GeHwuK3giZcTiibmOcPl1lhVgC06u8NTlbZSksTY=)

Thank you so much. It’s an honor to have you on this team.

_Emilia_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

clean_body: Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to take a moment and reach out personally to let you know what serving Northeast Ohio – my beloved hometown – means to me. = Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to take a moment and reach out personally to let you know what serving Northeast Ohio – my beloved hometown – means to me. I’ll explain more in a moment, but first: = | = I know how hard the people of Northeast Ohio work. I’ve seen it all my life. But growing up in Akron, I quickly learned that working families throughout our community aren’t given the same opportunities or a level playing field that others enjoy. That’s exactly why I entered a career in public service, Peter: To change the status quo. That’s why I worked across the aisle in the Ohio State House to fight for higher wages, working and middle-class tax cuts, and other legislation that would put more money in the pockets of Northeast Ohioans. And that’s why, last year, I ran for – and won – one of the most competitive House seats in the country. Because our community knows we deserve an advocate on the federal level – someone who isn’t afraid to stand up to people who are standing in the way of progress; someone who will advocate for our jobs, healthcare, and freedoms; and someone who will work to make the day to day a little bit easier. And that’s exactly what I’m trying to do, every day, in Washington. Peter, my promise to you is that I’ll always strive to be that type of leader, and that I’ll never stop fighting for the community I love. subject: Tucker Carlson was our first fan

body:
In May of 2021, i launched a unique political action committee... and Tucker was a fan immediately!

| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78110%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oEKgWqhTHmMyFcZskVGsrw&sysid=1)

My name is Ryan Girdusky. I founded the 1776 Project PAC in May of 2021 to take our schools back from the radical left one district at a time. 2 weeks later Tucker Carlson had me on his show to discuss the 1776 Project PAC. _**[He even encouraged his viewers to contribute to our mission!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78111%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AruvAU3OIy9cjDhs7O7Rzg&sysid=1)**_ But why? Well, friend, you see... We were the first organization of our kind. **Never before had an organization been founded for the express purpose of replacing radical leftist at the school board level!** Now, nearly 2 years later, we’ve tallied over 100 victories and changed the lives of millions of students. But we’re not done yet. This year, we plan to support 250 more conservative school board candidates- and we can’t do it without your help. **[Would you consider taking Tucker’s advice and contribute $15, $20, or even $30 dollars to our mission today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78112%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jKOXXLV2ByxO2hWQ3%2fVB2w&sysid=1)** Friend, the 1776 Project PAC isn’t a billionaire-backed political action committee that has MILLIONS in the bank. When you donate, you’re making a HUGE impact on students in districts across the country... ... And you’re changing the future of America for the better. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder, 1776 Project PAC

subject: Slam the scam 👊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=908309a7ed54472c84893dc32e09a285&_e=uAOCL7WQeyPzV-2xcjdIjv91VAikBvI7_TwYTSAvOVjM8Lhm4SxCznfVjX5YhLXMHX_B7YO99d-pIZuF1XCIPzPRYlEetjG_0FoCas7xbiYZ9gY82o0IKUmIAzlBNHqdrQuprZ6N_Ztq1w9cGWScVEEhQ8aya2OsNrVQMUXl7J394HwvoEnKckfScNvRgpwP14Lru7CzvEA1bd7Sq4-Wf-zpCUUlLlMXdN6vy3WSeICzNfq5kapfJbT1ATsMPSqSgzKBnYpvmuytP1Y1XIcHmRJMTaItgPGJX3YEopvYx9C8UPFPoqmyjceuPYfKbT1JurXUP49_7gD_GSaCbzhitQ%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend, Today’s scammers are sophisticated, sly, and always on the prowl for their next victim. I don’t want anyone to be caught in a scammer’s sneaky web of lies, but nothing is more disheartening than seeing it happen to our nation’s heroes. Did you know veterans are [twice as likely](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=908309a7ed54472c84893dc32e09a285&_e=uAOCL7WQeyPzV-2xcjdIjnpnVOT6RWH3hRsRKeNbGGHpa0BBVs2jYN5GHEfLrLdumANpgPOl1Peb5tQA5DkhXMu5QMbyi4nIhkVg-ZQF54xYzfLg8BvvwgeGP-jMFwLj52NcaT4gTkfZFPe7sqQahIvpWZJ4_zazkqwTHfJqiDtwl6wWht-maQrxKzDnBxAvEt2dKCjILgZhAh1kcYJuk7lBaPtWfVjfplAVnI8lt_c8NoVvJyH_lwvitfyJZDwnOYVpVgI0RswG8GVhA8HeqY4tsGXa5L_aehfYRRtpEAgOw66AWl4LB1EFuo6Qf2Rd) as the general public to fall victim to scams? Plus, [four out of five](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=908309a7ed54472c84893dc32e09a285&_e=uAOCL7WQeyPzV-2xcjdIjkpm7bFeDrj-e38qaBCflbV5oZvdNreYaEZ91mvzp-CZ28m-Ozcb8blDzW5hqOtCsdCJ6y1YIGRfCt_C4pupW7j39cgcfv82zoCFyKdh8R-UuPXfn9LyqTho8VX4Da6hGaHLxMuvHcOVSsuLE0Ol1UDNAB-NFpLgBfJB-HYGXou_JtFzbe0qQ9-vMJ1AKMxdlA%3D%3D) veterans and service members report being the target of scams directly related to their military service or benefits. I’m sick of hearing about this mistreatment, and I won’t tolerate it. That’s why I introduced the [Veterans Protection from Fraud Act](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=908309a7ed54472c84893dc32e09a285&_e=uAOCL7WQeyPzV-2xcjdIjjHoU7d4crqtaWg9P4XjH-X62pdtEYTbsPLciWJL2iERIDDW4YrcGL2a1UIOcPJaD14qlnwrA_pwp5LgJUHvAPdDs9MCxFlKXo8PDW_RyMexsnlGg8humsX8raU5U6pkPoAGnYQpG6lnYllFtyPObz_6oLQoW1_-sbE1ZL6gTkd9fu225s2OhwTvpntLC1ZSvhm_L0LvFa5D1b9KPj57ebc%3D) last Congress, and earlier this week, voted for the Wounded Warrior Access Act, which directs the VA to warn veterans about predatory behavior and provide them with resources to protect themselves from swindlers. Why am I talking about this today? Because it’s National Slam the Scam Day, an opportunity to continue to warn Americans about these money-grabbing dirtbags. Remember, real government officials will NEVER threaten you with arrest or legal action, especially on the grounds of sending money. Friend, it would mean a lot to me if you could pitch in your support as I continue to advocate on behalf of our beloved veterans. Are you able to donate $10 today? Every little bit helps.
---

name: National Gun Owner
subject: NASA rapture warning ⚠️
body:
It could have a direct impact on your life and the lives of your loved ones...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11796/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/09f9a2cb976448bf3f03bf7a6ae240cd5818a17f). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11796/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/09f9a2cb976448bf3f03bf7a6ae240cd5818a17f?message_id=IjM2YmUzMDMwLWEwZTktMDEzYi1kZWIyLTQyMDEwYTgwMDBhOUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| |
---
---
|
---
While the media is busy talking about restrictions and censorship, there's one story that's unfolding that no news station is covering.

Yet it could have a direct impact on your life and the lives of your loved ones.

According to a recently declassified document from the U.S. Senate, a monumental end-day threat is about to come crashing down on America.

I'm not talking about a stock market crash or more mandates.

**[This is something far more destructive.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11796/6374453/0ef7964b87ace2756935416462f467b07b45ff17/09f9a2cb976448bf3f03bf7a6ae240cd5818a17f)**

It could completely cripple our country, sending us back to square one.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11796/6374453/d04074cc7897c120f5b2d43d638ea25dd84d6022/09f9a2cb976448bf3f03bf7a6ae240cd5818a17f)
---
And the ripple effect could last for months or even years, according to top-ranking military officials and U.S. senators.

Thankfully, there is a way to prepare.

**[This brief video exposes what our current administration is doing to protect their own families.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11796/6374453/0ef7964b87ace2756935416462f467b07b45ff17/09f9a2cb976448bf3f03bf7a6ae240cd5818a17f)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Who should be allowed to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416083:JXalCPGNJ:m:1:3331421248:95A943DDAB2F492DF8371876AA8AE03A:r)
|
[**Petition: Do you agree that illegal immigrants should not be allowed to vote in our elections -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416083:JXalCPGNJ:m:1:3331421248:95A943DDAB2F492DF8371876AA8AE03A:r)
Peter,

I wanted to share with you another reason why it's so important that we remain ever vigilant and ALWAYS stay in the fight to defend our great country from dangerous and destructive policies.

Just a few days ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a measure making sure that non-citizens are not allowed vote in Washington DC elections.

Sounds like a no-brainer, right? I mean, who the heck would support a crazy idea like non-citizens voting in American elections?

I'll tell you who would support it: the vast majority of House Democrats would! **And they did! By a 4-to-1 margin!**

Despite their incessant anti-Trump tropes being laden with claims of foreign influence in elections, they call it controversial for conservatives to say that only American citizens should vote in American elections. I'm not making this up!

We all know that liberals want to fundamentally change our great country, and this latest move fits their playbook to a tee. They want weaker border security, they don't support law enforcement, and now they have shown they want to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections.

They weren't successful this time, but when considering that Biden's border policy is allowing record levels of illegal immigration, and Democrats are raising record levels of money for their campaigns, we should all be scared for the future of our country if the left makes gains in the next election.

I know you receive a lot of fundraising emails, but if you've read this far, I know you share my concern. **[If that's true, I'm asking you to step up and take action to let me know you join with other patriots like yourself to support the fundamental principles that make America great!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416083:JXalCPGNJ:m:1:3331421248:95A943DDAB2F492DF8371876AA8AE03A:r)**

[**Petition: Do you agree that illegal immigrants should not be allowed to vote in our elections -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416083:JXalCPGNJ:m:1:3331421248:95A943DDAB2F492DF8371876AA8AE03A:r)
**[Please take less than one minute and sign my petition letting me know you're with me on this!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416083:JXalCPGNJ:m:1:3331421248:95A943DDAB2F492DF8371876AA8AE03A:r)**

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416083:JXalCPGNJ:m:1:3331421248:95A943DDAB2F492DF8371876AA8AE03A:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: | Peter, I wanted to share with you another reason why it's so important that we remain ever vigilant and ALWAYS stay in the fight to defend our great country from dangerous and destructive policies. Just a few days ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a measure making sure that non-citizens are not allowed vote in Washington DC elections. Sounds like a no-brainer, right? I mean, who the heck would support a crazy idea like non-citizens voting in American elections? I'll tell you who would support it: the vast majority of House Democrats would! And they did! By a 4-to-1 margin! Despite their incessant anti-Trump tropes being laden with claims of foreign influence in elections, they call it controversial for conservatives to say that only American citizens should vote in American elections. I'm not making this up! We all know that liberals want to fundamentally change our great country, and this latest move fits their playbook to a tee. They want weaker border security, they don't support law enforcement, and now they have shown they want to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections. They weren't successful this time, but when considering that Biden's border policy is allowing record levels of illegal immigration, and Democrats are raising record levels of money for their campaigns, we should all be scared for the future of our country if the left makes gains in the next election. body:
Hear Governor DeSantis talk about his Florida Blueprint this Saturday in Las Vegas |
---
| | [ ](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=748c80b6e3&e=b87806bd09)
---
| | Friends,
I wanted to send one last reminder that my friend, Governor Ron DeSantis, is coming to Las Vegas to talk about his Florida Blueprint, and we’d like you to join us on Saturday, March 11, 2023! Tickets are nearly out, so secure yours now before it's too late. If you’re lucky, you’ll be one of the select attendees who will get a free copy of the Governor’s brand new book.
[RSVP TODAY!](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=1f9fdea8d1&e=b87806bd09)
Ron delivered a record-setting victory on November 8, 2022 with a battle-tested, bold agenda for the people of Florida. With his historic, nearly 20-point win, he created a blueprint for freedom in Florida that serves as a model for the rest of the nation. No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis, and he is now sharing this winning blueprint with the country.

Please join us this Saturday, March 11th, with doors opening at 3:30 PM to hear from our special guest, Governor Ron DeSantis. Let’s make sure to give him a warm, Nevada welcome.

See you soon,
Adam Laxalt

name: Brandon Presley

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
Re: Tate’s abuse of power. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59914942/395493568/17860314?refcode=ea.663ae775-93be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.663ae775-93be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjYzYWU3NzUtOTNiZS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oVO53O_dlT9aZhbpXOhtZZuAOjeNYt1mEsSX3SNHtec=)
---
Peter, Governor Tate Reeves embodies everything that's wrong with Mississippi politics.

He's been caught red-handed in one of the worst public corruption scandals in our state’s history for misspending tens of millions of federal welfare dollars on his rich and powerful buddies — including celebrity athletes.

And if that wasn't bad enough, we have evidence that the former welfare director was acting on Reeves' orders when he funneled over $1 million of welfare money to Tate's fitness trainer.

To make matters worse, Reeves fired the state attorney who was trying to recover the stolen welfare money.

You just can’t make this stuff up, Peter.

Election Day in Mississippi can’t come soon enough. [Will you rush a donation to help me defeat Tate Reeves and rid Mississippi of its corrupt leadership in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59914943/395493569/-1470085607?refcode=ea.663ae775-93be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.663ae775-93be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjYzYWU3NzUtOTNiZS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oVO53O_dlT9aZhbpXOhtZZuAOjeNYt1mEsSX3SNHtec=)

**Here's the thing, the welfare scandal isn’t an isolated incident. It's just the tip of the iceberg of the deep-seated corruption and cronyism that has plagued our state for way too long.**

Governor Reeves has repeatedly shown that he has no empathy for Mississippi’s vulnerable families and communities. He will always put special interests and politics over people.

And frankly, I am fed up with it.

That's why I am committed to taking on this corruption head-on and ensuring that our tax dollars are put to good use. But, I can't do this alone, Peter.

[Can I count on your donation (of any amount) to help me send Governor Tate Reeves packing and to clean up the mess he has left behind? clean_body: Re: Tate’s abuse of power. | = Peter, Governor Tate Reeves embodies everything that's wrong with Mississippi politics. He's been caught red-handed in one of the worst public corruption scandals in our state’s history for misspending tens of millions of federal welfare dollars on his rich and powerful buddies — including celebrity athletes. And if that wasn't bad enough, we have evidence that the former welfare director was acting on Reeves' orders when he funneled over $1 million of welfare money to Tate's fitness trainer. To make matters worse, Reeves fired the state attorney who was trying to recover the stolen welfare money. You just can’t make this stuff up, Peter. Election Day in Mississippi can’t come soon enough. = Here's the thing, the welfare scandal isn’t an isolated incident. It's just the tip of the iceberg of the deep-seated corruption and cronyism that has plagued our state for way too long. Governor Reeves has repeatedly shown that he has no empathy for Mississippi’s vulnerable families and communities. He will always put special interests and politics over people. And frankly, I am fed up with it. That's why I am committed to taking on this corruption head-on and ensuring that our tax dollars are put to good use. But, I can't do this alone, Peter. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

name: Carolina, United We Dream Action
subject: Let’s win a new future for our immigrant communities!
body:
Congress cannot wait – they must ACT NOW to pass citizenship. | | | Hi Peter, **2023 is our year to turn up the heat.** Immigrants have faced relentless political attacks and been the center of constant legal uncertainty for far too long. But our communities remain unfazed in their determination and commitment to win permanent protections that ensure we can all thrive. We aren’t backing down, we’re continuing to fight for us! Biden and his administration have had the power for over 3 years to prioritize the safety of the over 11 million undocumented people in this country. And although Democrats lost control of the House in last year's elections, they still have control over the White House and Senate through the end of 2024. **Meaning Dems are still in position of power to deliver citizenship for our communities!!** **Congress cannot wait – they must ACT NOW to pass citizenship and protect immigrant youth, our families, and our communities from detention and deportation.**[Can you send a letter? Call on your Congress members to lead and pass citizenship NOW.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Szk9b9eP3Ui1CGkxjufZ3Lx3x7Z0cN0n3YXuTBdU9Q8t0-VHihA4VCvwCnHhIopI_Wom1DICFgC1OnTwVf6eTQlIAEqyPP9G5l5devflOOdpoT3JA4rFIrOdzkEv5CpiPn_ne0yYtzz0fOyML51voLcz6vJ1w0r-mdSdjKZ5nQeBlyEQWzmUVAK1RAMFYtHKeOpd3RBkGc-eRzf8Sa-fMh2lBuVjzckubnxhAl0I7N34xX46s0briEO52h4cC0S2I_JG9LmLhmN8j0jt6XnCu4uCvp887JtvREz0r7t6gcuhTJYsfoGU8ANfApZvF4m7USbO-aeSFoWSAOmj69KtXyoTjF-Pk4wt_ZdV-OPbKQoX/3uc/9_WRUJVxTBGdcRQd8TCQlw/h0/sX4piYajWYqLNMef7NnbQr0eRzTZSkCkRTS33YdBB1U) **[SEND A LETTER](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Szk9b9eP3Ui1CGkxjufZ3Lx3x7Z0cN0n3YXuTBdU9Q8t0-VHihA4VCvwCnHhIopI_Wom1DICFgC1OnTwVf6eTQlIAEqyPP9G5l5devflOOdpoT3JA4rFIrOdzkEv5CpiPn_ne0yYtzz0fOyML51voLed3awNFcQjQc4xbg0xAifDDI1k9GSXGRhVwa_Gm8MmDlirJKcOM3Lnzq-TMfGaLMQ1XHDikXFHsgWaoGukD9x1uUd-hwU6kBB5XBRsYAIhA6VFhDgNxz90FYiPuywNcn3Rn5E0D-y77DrgxpyNTN5D4nbovHaS_k2P4fOhUFDZNRuwfeoQoGOm2L7dRrqwuVX1QZswusAcZ2Kjbo5NGBEO/3uc/9_WRUJVxTBGdcRQd8TCQlw/h1/0SzCiLmGzmNJ9QTtyDB7Mum77kWUKyYjBLKZBF9Mroo)** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXXF77IupGq6J-mKMdfsmF6m23hJW7fMD1mie0mCJXRJXvqgbOt6fOEp5M7fNidWA801f621l602kBhuXiCsw5LGvU3_GydTzRDlG8aWcHoFNCRlQS2kEGnCESRe754SjDzFDE61X6q65dTKAvRbRE6MWy0U8TcHBDvJ_P41LVa_cZvN3c7F6WNEp7vNaIm0Fp_UZg2pRaQXCYn5_fGTp0vx3IOWS2eTxUIy4GfxThMytzD0U76Mg0I-EaTxCkq3wG77_cBinEt_ycxoPJiyGaz4pZ3ODwh1WcwqDAmoyBNkT/3uc/9_WRUJVxTBGdcRQd8TCQlw/h2/kgKVfgTFT9eDqr-QUl8FstJEv14rd1mxT82wUBvpKMg)** Together we will win,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Listen to Riley Gaines advocate for a Women's Bill of Rights
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132880?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend, **Last week, All-American swimmer Riley Gaines visited Mississippi advocating for a Women's Bill of Rights. **

Gaines was on her way to winning a national title at the NCAA swimming championship in 2022 when she tied with a female-identifying, transgender athlete who previously lived as a man.

In an effort to spread awareness of fairness and keep women in women’s sports, Gaines travels the country promoting women’s rights. She has gained popularity through her willingness to speak out against injustice and a large following on TikTok.

**Listen to her speech from last week's event below.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e0bc132452&e=5703353baa)
---
All-American swimmer Riley Gaines explains why only women should compete in women's sports.
| **With the help of the Independent Women’s Forum, Gaines has been an avid proponent of a “Women’s Bill of Rights,” a growing phenomenon across the country.** This bill codifies the definition of a woman and protects single-sex spaces.

This legislation, titled “The Title IX Preservation Act,” had several versions introduced during the 2023 Legislative Session, but sadly all died in committee. Mississippi Center for Public Policy is hopeful for the bill's reintroduction in the 2024 Legislative Session and will be advocating heavily for its passage.

**If you are interested in attending our next event with Betsy DeVos, you can purchase tickets[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=007008b1ee&e=5703353baa). **
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=056132ee9c&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: SOCIAL SECURITY ALERT (via Raja Krishnamoorthi)
subject: BREAKING: Social Security at RISK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
| [**_BREAKING NEWS!!_
Republican Senator Mike Lee said he will "pull up by its roots" and "get rid of" Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59915096/395493777/-1810142053?refcode=20230309_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2NlYzg2Zi05M2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bG2f00gAs9QouhuYy0Y_RQtiF0KSGIj0uertxj0OLmw=)
---
Peter, I’m livid.
A top GOP Senator just admitted they’re coming after our Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid with everything they’ve got.
[**_I refuse to let them get away with this -- but I need your urgent help. I need 1,220 gifts in the next 13 hours to send an UNMISTAKABLE message to Republican extremists that we will never let them get away with threatening our healthcare system and the financial security millions of Americans rely on. Will you chip in $14 before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59915097/395493787/-1810142053?refcode=20230309_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2NlYzg2Zi05M2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bG2f00gAs9QouhuYy0Y_RQtiF0KSGIj0uertxj0OLmw=)
Social Security is a promise, Peter.
It’s a promise to our seniors that they’ll be able to retire and still live with dignity.
It’s a promise to hardworking families that, if tragedy strikes, their loved one’s benefits will help keep them going.
Mike Lee might not care about keeping this crucial promise, but I do.
[**_Peter, I’m outraged -- and if you are too, I need your support of $14 in the next 13 hours to put an end to these attacks against our beloved social programs. Please, will you step up in this defining moment so I can help Democrats protect our Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59915099/395493794/-1810142053?refcode=20230309_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2NlYzg2Zi05M2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bG2f00gAs9QouhuYy0Y_RQtiF0KSGIj0uertxj0OLmw=)

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [GOING LIVE] Fighting for New Jersey
body:
Peter, I'll be LIVE SOON at 4:30PM EST for my Common Ground Podcast. Today's topic revolves around fighting for families and
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/fd2168a1175a028a3d2f41f9154f9b4a/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0viF5Q7kRDRXEStY9JHDenMMD4lE_97Y0VtCtq-d-653BEIBROUVhDClW6u64EFGkuuOAqKpSBWPr5u4DueY0HNxSXRslMQjl_Db2A-B8vAAhoUGmK3jeIsLZJDnhaZARXTpuIvjb_6aNabKM1hmn56seG07o26hZB0h_OeiptNtNe14c9Eqg1tu5RNI8XJdIhqUdbd0a55j0bAlEJRvbZnODw10x2K_2KI)
---
| Peter, **I'll be LIVE SOON at 4:30PM EST for my Common Ground Podcast.** Today's topic revolves around fighting for families and small businesses. There is no better way to serve the needs of the people than by focusing on families and small businesses, the backbone of our communities. New Jersey politics has to be local, with leaders who understand the challenges facing our communities and have the experience and determination to address them.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OPEN THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (I'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EST)](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/6bd802debe7201c49aeff87b8f161f98/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0viF5Q7kRDRXEStYxofNaTjMD4lE_97Y4WrgrbvnXsudwRCySSlJYRwp4fremCBRi6UQElxI4nx19cNfMdzLKiEvCW66RSE49fwAsznYO1ZQINCQxz2UZylRXLK0yIzoGLaVPyl8TfBotnuojSHafrpxVrQtjfqFkLSHc57SmE20VFXhr8SqTa0bd7UdSMvpkOWK151Z7sSPRoBUwpl-dme4fDWTE-Ja2KG)
---
|
---
|
---
Joining me today are Jennifer Love and Rosemary Becchi. Cranford mother Jennifer Love has been advocating for the passage of "Emma's Law," a bill that requires additional safety features on school buses for special needs children, since 2018. The bill is named after Love's non-verbal daughter, who had a traumatizing experience when the school bus she was on was lost and out of touch for five hours.
---
|
---
| Rosemary Becchi is a business policy expert, a tax specialist, and attorney who doubles as a political advocate. As a result of seeing the harm inflicted on families and businesses from high taxes and uncontrolled government spending, Rosemary started Jersey First, a non-profit organization with the mission to educate and advocate for policy solutions to lower taxes, reduce government spending and help put New Jersey’s economy back on track. A few weeks ago, I told you that I would be introducing you to leaders in our community that are fighting the good fight for New Jersey's citizens. Jennifer and Rosemary are two more examples of advocates who are doing just that. In the end, it all comes down to putting the needs of the people first. That means listening to our communities, understanding their unique challenges, and working together to find solutions. It means building a brighter future for our families and small businesses, and ensuring that New Jersey remains a great place to live, work, and raise a family. But we can't do this without your support. Make sure you [**join me now (I'll be live right at 4:30PM EST),**](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/d5d52ec88b0e14e9e50985df4dbd72ee/eJyNj8EKglAQRf9l1pJoCuVOREQ0F1HrMB3qkT4fz1Ey8d8bK1wVtJ0591zuCIQylxSX4MGdHra9BgM0FkIJlBQ0kvLi9bVdx1pbBlRC3iLddAq88Wt4Aeazu-EIDQqZOOz9IImz6JTGWcKgyjVX_KVxtu6iCXd-nMI0_fRiLSjsWd2CR7rDeU8peBMddcX8lUi1nmkWTV038sIdslwVVXc2K9EjC3KlUJaf7QkOb830BIfXYoQ=)
Bill
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/4610849/eb360e991faecfb2) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Tucker Carlson was our first fan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
In May of 2021, I launched a unique political action committee... and Tucker was a fan immediately!

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z63nne2o7dheffdeu40o36896kdq7soog79e7m78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spieaor6cjh2bs)
---
My name is Ryan Girdusky. I founded the 1776 Project PAC in May of 2021 to take our schools back from the radical left one district at a time. 2 weeks later Tucker Carlson had me on his show to discuss the 1776 Project PAC. _**[He even encouraged his viewers to contribute to our mission!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp10a1m4q6cvksvnj3nm0v618jc5b25iaq3krs78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spieaor6cjh2bs)**_ But why? Well, friend, you see... We were the first organization of our kind. **Never before had an organization been founded for the express purpose of replacing radical leftist at the school board level!** Now, nearly 2 years later, we’ve tallied over 100 victories and changed the lives of millions of students. But we’re not done yet. This year, we plan to support 250 more conservative school board candidates- and we can’t do it without your help. **[Would you consider taking Tucker’s advice and contribute $15, $20, or even $30 dollars to our mission today?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd95gscflavgs9dbrv46fb5nvaoin2lnqemovj7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0spieaor6cjh2bs)** Friend, the 1776 Project PAC isn’t a billionaire-backed political action committee that has MILLIONS in the bank. When you donate, you’re making a HUGE impact on students in districts across the country... ... And you’re changing the future of America for the better. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder, 1776 Project PAC

Hello,

Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.**

It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.

Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.

I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.
**We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm for PA PAC
body:
Hey there,
I have some exciting news to share with you. Today I announced my candidacy for Auditor General.
I’m running for Auditor General because it’s time for the underdog to be a watchdog for Pennsylvania’s working families. I love Pennsylvania. I’ve traveled all across this commonwealth and I’ve met so many families just like my own. Good people, who work their butts off and still the basic bargain of a good school, a good job, and a safe community is out of reach.
**I’m running for Auditor General because it’s time for the underdog to be a watchdog for Pennsylvania’s working families.**
**[So, I’m asking: Will you donate $10 or whatever you can spare to show the world we’ve got winning momentum from day one?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59916585/395498815/800376446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDg3ZmMzYi05NmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ai2JQJfH4RM5c0Z05jyZna32RwuZvlM0msu-lf-37fE=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59916589/395498819/800376446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDg3ZmMzYi05NmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ai2JQJfH4RM5c0Z05jyZna32RwuZvlM0msu-lf-37fE=)
The working people of Pennsylvania demand accountability for how their tax dollars are spent. As your next Auditor General, I will use the office to measure and support efforts to make communities healthier and safer. We need transparency on how huge hospital nonprofits and long term care providers use state dollars. We need to analyze our approach to community safety and gun violence reduction to target investments in the things that really work to reduce crime, particularly gun crimes.
I’m asking you to join me in this fight. I’m not taking a single check from big money or corporate PACs, so I’m counting on support from folks like you to build this movement.
**[So, it doesn’t matter what you contribute — even $5 will make a huge difference — if you can afford to, I hope you’ll donate to build this campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59916590/395498820/800376446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDg3ZmMzYi05NmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ai2JQJfH4RM5c0Z05jyZna32RwuZvlM0msu-lf-37fE=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Dangerous Crime Won’t Go Unchecked
body:
Nothing is more important than preserving the safety and attractiveness of DeSoto County. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/38ef674142f0/failed-border-policies-threaten-rural-america-337808?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | | |
Throughout my life, I have been many things: a husband and father, a son, a Christian, a conservative, an attorney. The glue that pulls all these roles together is my top priority of protecting the safety and security of my family and community. It’s been one of my guiding principles over the years, and it’s the foundation of my decision to run for Desoto County District Attorney.

DeSoto County is filled with hard-working, kind, honest people. Everywhere I go, I’m surrounded by proud Mississippians with traditional family values and a shared way of life. Since moving to the area with my wife years ago, I’ve worked tirelessly to do my part to better our community by serving as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts. Throughout my time in this role, I’ve developed a strong reputation for being tough on crime.

Nothing is more important than preserving the safety and attractiveness of DeSoto County.

Mere miles from our community, crime runs rampant in Memphis. Violent crimes, drug offenses, and other dangerous activities are on the rise while their newly elected liberal prosecutors refuse to take the necessary steps to crack down on criminals destroying their city. As a result, this crime is spreading into neighboring communities like DeSoto County, threatening our way of life.

If left unchecked, a rise in dangerous crime could have dramatic effects on DeSoto County, creating uncertainty and fear among us while also drastically devaluing our home values and putting our high-achieving school district in jeopardy. Unwanted crime would hinder our community’s ability to prosper, by deterring good families and jobs from staying. Memphis crime will cost us opportunities for conservative business developments and good jobs. And it will jeopardize our economic attractiveness. Increased drug activity will lead to a surge of overdoses, loss of life, and even more violence.

If elected to represent District 23 as your next District Attorney, this dangerous crime won’t go unchecked, and it certainly won’t take root in Desoto County. Unlike Memphis’ liberal prosecutor, I will be tough on crime.

I have extensive experience handling criminal cases, putting dangerous offenders behind bars, and protecting our community from violence the likes of which runs amuck in Memphis. As District Attorney, I will prosecute dangerous criminals to the fullest extent of the law, showcasing my tough-on-crime reputation and giving bad actors a reason to fear acting out beyond Memphis city limits.

I promise your family and mine that Memphis crime will not bleed into our community if you hire me for the job. These dangerous criminals need to pay for their crimes, and the criminal influence and danger coming out of Memphis must be stopped. I will stop it. Because, throughout my life, my top priority has always been protecting the safety and security of my family and my community.

---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=d3b1c9851b&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=f20333cb97&e=3c5d31b5ad)_

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.
I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:
Can you please split a $25 contribution between Serve America and my United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so important. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either.
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Why we won→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi there,

We won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district last year thanks to generous support from folks like you. Your donations allowed us to make key early investments in the race—and that made all the difference.

On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win again in 2024. **Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.

Having a strong base of support we can rely on is crucial to our success. That’s why I’m asking you to commit to making a small, monthly recurring donation in the lead-up to 2024. My team is aiming for 100 grassroots sustaining donors to step up this week to show that we’re not wasting any time getting ready for our next tough race.**

**[Click here to chip in just $3 monthly (the cost of a cup of coffee!) to help my team prepare for the long road ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59917557/395502857/595265801?amount=3&recurring=true&contactdata=OG22CByQIYTpoE/oXVpcj19NyvbVBcA1AQRcj9PyT5cKGKveP7FLQ6fNqY+SG2Yus72oXAC9YGhT5sIzZffl9oxtgOAgp76yRUIAhkOJlATkNqMPfdec1qNnQyS5saAt/yTElGBfjESb/jjZ/UQhzg==&refcode2=d2a948e3-99be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230309_FR_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_recurring&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmE5NDhlMy05OWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mq2jJEJINZsWC4UQnk_PkbCE8r7kOInmA8i9KKa7ABk=)**

---

While the new House Republican majority focuses on the wrong priorities and picking partisan fights, I am working with Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to find common ground on important issues like fighting inflation, bringing back American manufacturing, and winning the economic competition with China.

In the last Congress, we passed historic _bipartisan_ legislation to reduce prescription drug costs, deliver for our veterans, invest in our infrastructure, and so much more. In this new Congress, I’ll keep striving to work with members on both sides to get things done.

**[Sustaining support is critical to my work (and Democrats' ability to take back the House in 2024), so please consider chipping in $3 or any amount monthly to become a sustaining donor as we build our campaign out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59917565/395502865/595265801?amount=3&recurring=true&contactdata=OG22CByQIYTpoE/oXVpcj19NyvbVBcA1AQRcj9PyT5cKGKveP7FLQ6fNqY+SG2Yus72oXAC9YGhT5sIzZffl9oxtgOAgp76yRUIAhkOJlATkNqMPfdec1qNnQyS5saAt/yTElGBfjESb/jjZ/UQhzg==&refcode2=d2a948e3-99be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230309_FR_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_recurring&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmE5NDhlMy05OWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mq2jJEJINZsWC4UQnk_PkbCE8r7kOInmA8i9KKa7ABk=)**

Last November, we saw what Michigan Democrats can do when they invest early and run smart campaigns. Help us start this cycle strong and keep the blue wave going into 2024!

Thank you so much for your support,
Dan

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! United States

****
clean_body: | Hi there, We won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district last year thanks to generous support from folks like you. Your donations allowed us to make key early investments in the race—and that made all the difference. On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win again in 2024. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing. Having a strong base of support we can rely on is crucial to our success. That’s why I’m asking you to commit to making a small, monthly recurring donation in the lead-up to 2024. My team is aiming for 100 grassroots sustaining donors to step up this week to show that we’re not wasting any time getting ready for our next tough race. = = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly and recur monthly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = While the new House Republican majority focuses on the wrong priorities and picking partisan fights, I am working with Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to find common ground on important issues like fighting inflation, bringing back American manufacturing, and winning the economic competition with China. In the last Congress, we passed historic bipartisan legislation to reduce prescription drug costs, deliver for our veterans, invest in our infrastructure, and so much more. In this new Congress, I’ll keep striving to work with members on both sides to get things done. = Last November, we saw what Michigan Democrats can do when they invest early and run smart campaigns. Help us start this cycle strong and keep the blue wave going into 2024! Thank you so much for your support, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

body:
This just ran in the Kansas City Star, Missouri’s biggest newspaper.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley was grateful when Tucker Carlson tried to convince his viewers earlier this week that he wasn’t actually a fraud and a coward for running away from the same rioters he raised his fist for on January 6th.
**But folks in Missouri aren’t going to let him get away with it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/28531?refcode=em20230309-2854&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2854%2E614464%2E3dVlTd)

My name is Ryan Girdusky. I founded the 1776 Project PAC in May of 2021 to take our schools back from the radical left one district at a time. 2 weeks later Tucker Carlson had me on his show to discuss the 1776 Project PAC. _**[He even encouraged his viewers to contribute to our mission!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98abee2965d341d78b0421c947998985&_e=oHxGxbuBBJgJuK9VP70jsUPFi-1fiwukeKRk-DVpykQYjKAZ7pBLer3b6TmOpxIr1jm82lXdMjM2m1uhmturgnc8pZ9QmOK3UHe1u1RLW3Pi94zxr-dFSh78E5S3Hk714DnO4MydeLzUMKvJubV7XEJMi43I7mBVWqeHOCbDHWcVBN_1IVIcqLyAWpleFPlhUcnXyyedZWtSanTkK2fVvP0A5LYNjPlpHRMROGyy3Ky9EVBXOAVr4J9HHGa_2sKdFNnK5CIcuPJbG81w34cy40OCvA2RR5HOOY-_O3gSJf7i6_apI_12ejCWgx5Wvk5XXcvbViE2YhvbIBPAAi875aV2sIqOwBe0q6waetGltQojCb1YSS5XOVh5RGrvdSAGGz9rn4kaygj_zZyxIJEYABer-uZJELv0znyX-y1ck4586Fs5NxsBWfNrWvryNvvNFXqT2iOA-J6GlUd6MD0i5Q%3D%3D)**_ But why? Well, Friend, you see... We were the first organization of our kind. **Never before had an organization been founded for the express purpose of replacing radical leftist at the school board level!** Now, nearly 2 years later, we've tallied over 100 victories and changed the lives of millions of students. But we're not done yet. This year, we plan to support 250 more conservative school board candidates- and we can't do it without your help. **[Would you consider taking Tucker 's advice and contribute $15, $20, or even $30 dollars to our mission today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98abee2965d341d78b0421c947998985&_e=oHxGxbuBBJgJuK9VP70jsUPFi-1fiwukeKRk-DVpykQYjKAZ7pBLer3b6TmOpxIr1jm82lXdMjM2m1uhmturgnc8pZ9QmOK3UHe1u1RLW3Pi94zxr-dFSh78E5S3Hk714DnO4MydeLzUMKvJubV7XEJMi43I7mBVWqeHOCbDHWcVBN_1IVIcqLyAWpleFPlhUcnXyyedZWtSanTkK2fVvP0A5LYNjPlpHRMROGyy3Ky9EVBXOAVr4J9HHGa_2sKdFNnK5CIcuPJbG81w34cy40OCvA2RR5HOOY-_O3gSJf5WplqqZMe7SD0k8BCeIptTxgpfAKmZwij2YIJK9kfmyRdsf7T5TnZEPLPAWLO-uptjidILte2E8s4p3oy8n-SzHNyhpkHpbyAjepwDKNaIkR3IW4PT3lUV0Z6qJ5utbaho41C6muPrYItCHVmsL9kkKEDO5oK9fxvGnGlT58fvDA%3D%3D)** Friend, the 1776 Project PAC isn't a billionaire-backed political action committee that has MILLIONS in the bank. When you donate, you're making a HUGE impact on students in districts across the country... ... And you're changing the future of America for the better. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, Founder, 1776 Project PAC

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416093:J64-YPGNg:m:1:3331421248:8AE3BB2AC93B4487007C732C0AA6E22C:r)

Peter,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416093:J64-YPGNg:m:1:3331421248:8AE3BB2AC93B4487007C732C0AA6E22C:r)

**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

[_**I am raising $33,000 to fund our legal battles to support the January 6th defendants in court. Will you send a gift of any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416093:J64-YPGNg:m:1:3331421248:8AE3BB2AC93B4487007C732C0AA6E22C:r)

I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

name: Jon Tester
subject: You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41784?t=6&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA) Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.**

[**I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor and split $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41784?t=7&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41785?t=8&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41786?t=9&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41787?t=10&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41788?t=11&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/41789?t=12&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA)
You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.

I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.

Thanks again,

Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6707%2E878179%2E13uGPA)

name: Coach
subject: READ >> AL Rural Hospital Support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
please read this!
| | | **** FEDERAL FUNDING FOR RURAL HOSPITALS ENDS SEPT. 30 ****
---
[**STAY INFORMED!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c027b0afa1190467/e62e854d0b4360c9c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, I will never forget where I come from, and who sent me to Washington...that’s why I’m appalled that rural Alabamians are in serious danger of losing access to vital medical access in the near future. Roughly **80% of rural Alabama hospitals** miraculously provide health care even though they don’t have the money to do so – they rely on the much-needed resources that I’m fighting for in the Senate. The [**Low Wage Index Hospital Policy**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c027b0afa1190467/f369a071217a15a3c3d6b838967d376c/33013) is a federal program that helps fund rural, low-income hospitals that often operate within seriously limited budgets, and sparse resources to provide life-saving medical care. This policy is slated to end on September 30th which will threaten access to quality care for many Alabamians. _I will not rest until I get the job done for every single Alabama family in need._
---
[**READ HOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c027b0afa1190467/8da6e50235aa2450c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
This is why I urged the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services to grant a _**four-year extension**_ of the Low Wage Index Hospital Policy. My mission is clear, and I am honored to represent our fellow rural Alabamians today, and always. – Coach [**Learn More >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c027b0afa1190467/498eab15cce2f9a3c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bddb3cd1513a411e87487087ff51dd44&_e=TeaImnsPdQV_TQUv08DznBxn0Ly38M5_dP94EzRsVulcoN_7u7UghGdLfcl6UNgsllUO2TFjHfHejqUo3q-tQlw2loPaztU0wk0KAoUD8ymjrRlFXCAHElD6r8evhYjcSL4BUsdCcwyAKNlx5715lK-KX3wjpg87nflIvMSSvxM-t33HL8TbUXLr-kkJVudxr5NkmVZLhhNPKXpMgNBYVIjBP3cIX1TSrCT2L97GzSp3E1sz9u9r_maPrBIpvHBqO3WJw22BnAVhX1qg3ufNtahuV61fwzhAJB2E7MCpsH61vYmi-YRLl1iOy_OkfpVhGteXjWMvQzgqLoXpEEr9J1rgAI6O-QsJ7ihHhDgZbo4E8NXEzDf7vvsEElixA_KOapAL-idauANf_0-6dO4QbrC71B37T0LSyrqKBToJn0Jbq0soTWc1yXfB64uuM6pZ)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bddb3cd1513a411e87487087ff51dd44&_e=TeaImnsPdQV_TQUv08DznBxn0Ly38M5_dP94EzRsVulcoN_7u7UghGdLfcl6UNgsllUO2TFjHfHejqUo3q-tQlw2loPaztU0wk0KAoUD8ymjrRlFXCAHElD6r8evhYjcSL4BUsdCcwyAKNlx5715lK-KX3wjpg87nflIvMSSvxM-t33HL8TbUXLr-kkJVudxr5NkmVZLhhNPKXpMgNBYVIjBP3cIX1TSrCT2L97GzSp3E1sz9u9r_maPrBIpvHBqO3WJw22BnAVhX1qg3ufNtQkGKqWHU0Xmgv5d9gDHLkTV3Udgh9WT-ewqicc7I3a7htnRyMFyeH75zgGgbCIk0JCIK54ERNMcTMRh8PtL4M6FHPhmQOdGzMcn_43VRC6jhpNj6JlpUe66ZXcCL1YuBJfx6eKGOQzx9CgOSUJhQjqsVvnibJ8CyQQ45_Wbe3Hh)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bddb3cd1513a411e87487087ff51dd44&_e=TeaImnsPdQV_TQUv08DznBxn0Ly38M5_dP94EzRsVulcoN_7u7UghGdLfcl6UNgsllUO2TFjHfHejqUo3q-tQlw2loPaztU0wk0KAoUD8ymjrRlFXCAHElD6r8evhYjcSL4BUsdCcwyAKNlx5715lK-KX3wjpg87nflIvMSSvxM-t33HL8TbUXLr-kkJVudxr5NkmVZLhhNPKXpMgNBYVIjBP3cIX1TSrCT2L97GzSp3E1sz9u9r_maPrBIpvHBqO3WJw22BnAVhX1qg3ufNtYbK4tSki5_wiE-2xr2AVBgM22cxQKlzQU9bPzR3I3iPyE2HLlv9fO0BsucE0VF0eukhQK1Amwj15I7qEBBzgbvxiaeNjuTlOANjr2oAjvOOxHBIKsEWnn6UU9Na8qCQIHPDzuF_ehgnQyM_uyu3whFlgONdged-5CJkQoVUWC3z)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bddb3cd1513a411e87487087ff51dd44&_e=TeaImnsPdQV_TQUv08DznBxn0Ly38M5_dP94EzRsVulcoN_7u7UghGdLfcl6UNgsllUO2TFjHfHejqUo3q-tQlw2loPaztU0wk0KAoUD8ymjrRlFXCAHElD6r8evhYjcSL4BUsdCcwyAKNlx5715lK-KX3wjpg87nflIvMSSvxM-t33HL8TbUXLr-kkJVudxr5NkmVZLhhNPKXpMgNBYVIjBP3cIX1TSrCT2L97GzSp3E1sz9u9r_maPrBIpvHBqO3WJw22BnAVhX1qg3ufNtS8hzwo6Jqk_0LNyprV5tbLyuB84v_ZVlxq4fdrQGU3XaIp-zCijUi-I_WL99dLAggHaq7wVGmhAYA04G-Mehc4X2Ew38ekFvcDD8hPaui8w8dFzLjsr-ksyRyOyU9VWEgQGS6JHBvRrkGZ2b4lAQCNxMwP0P097IVtnBjusjgqQ).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
| | |
---
| | Hey Peter, Did you know that March is Women’s History Month? At a time when the rights to bodily autonomy and a woman’s right to choose are under attack, it’s more important than ever that we uplift women’s voice.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59919913/395512109/545732405?refcode=march9email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2UzYjkwNi1hMGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEfbOI57rH0xsv2vStsZJ1DdVJH1bJonCCrcGzQk8VI=)
---
We want to take a moment to highlight each of the five incredible Congresswomen who work hard every single day to better the lives of Pennsylvanians. **Representative Madeleine Dean (CD-4)****** was elected in 2018 after serving in the State House for over six years. She is passionate about working to curb gun violence and guaranteeing healthcare for all. First sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives in 2018 following a special election, **Representative Mary Gay Scanlon (CD-5)** has dedicated her career to protecting and improving the lives of America’s children, families, veterans, and seniors. **Representative Chrissy Houlahan (CD-6)** is committed to fighting for access to affordable healthcare, common sense gun safety, government accountability and transparency, and working to build a strong, stable economy with good jobs and good benefits for everyone. In 2018, **Representative Susan Wild (CD-7)** became the first woman to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District. She is a respected leader in Congress on lowering the cost of prescription drugs and an outspoken advocate for mental health and suicide prevention initiatives. **Representative** **Summer Lee (CD-12)** is the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress. From her work as a grassroots organizer to her work as a state legislator, she’s put working families first time and time again. **We’re incredibly lucky to have such strong female voice representing our best interests in Washington D.C., and we recognize that their leadership is possible because we won every single battleground Congressional race last cycle. Thank you to the donors, staffers, and volunteers who made that happen!** [Will you help us protect our progressive champions in D.C. by chipping in $5, $25, or even $50?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59919914/395512110/545732405?refcode=march9email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2UzYjkwNi1hMGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEfbOI57rH0xsv2vStsZJ1DdVJH1bJonCCrcGzQk8VI=)

This month and every month, we celebrate the female doctors, educators, social workers, engineers, and all of the women who keep our state running. We also celebrate all of the women whose invaluable contributions to our communities goes unnoticed. We see you. Thank you, Pennsylvania Democrats

name: Faith and Liberty News

We were the first organization of our kind. **Never before had an organization been founded for the express purpose of replacing radical leftist at the school board level!** Now, nearly 2 years later, we've tallied over 100 victories and changed the lives of millions of students. But we're not done yet. This year, we plan to support 250 more conservative school board candidates- and we can't do it without your help.
