name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Both of these options are awful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
House Republicans are manufacturing a debt ceiling crisis to try to wedge us between a rock and a hard place. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59942554/395558295/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4NmY3My1jYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMelEMGtPOzMkZrrEOcxEYsRj3fEDGIuokcWEwE8qWQ=&emci=b5186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b7186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
You may be seeing a lot of headlines about the debt ceiling and budget plans — so I wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand. House Republicans are manufacturing a debt ceiling crisis to try to wedge us between a rock and a hard place: **Option #1: Default on the national debt, trigger a recession, and throw 1 million Americans out of work.** **Option #2: Cut key government programs, trigger a recession, and throw 2.6 million Americans out of work.** In other words: Heads, they win. Tails, we lose. Both outcomes would hit working people like a kick in the teeth. And both outcomes could cause enough damage to pave the way for Republicans to take back the White House in 2024. But look: There’s no reason we have to play the GOP’s game here. [_**Add your name if you agree**_ _****__**: We’ve got to pick Door #3 and pass a clean bill to avoid a debt default without making job-destroying cuts.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59942555/395558296/186283225?refcode=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&ms=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4NmY3My1jYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMelEMGtPOzMkZrrEOcxEYsRj3fEDGIuokcWEwE8qWQ=&emci=b5186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b7186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59942556/395558297/186283225?refcode=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&ms=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4NmY3My1jYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMelEMGtPOzMkZrrEOcxEYsRj3fEDGIuokcWEwE8qWQ=&emci=b5186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b7186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
You may be wondering where I got those jobs figures from. Well, I asked a top economist to put together a report on the consequences of a debt default AND on the consequences of Republicans’ proposed budget cuts. You see, we’ve heard a lot about the former — and they’re plenty terrifying — but less about the latter, which should also send chills down policymakers’ spines.
The economist, Mark Zandi, presented his report to a Senate Banking subcommittee hearing I chaired. We also heard from a Massachusetts child care and early learning provider about how much damage GOP cuts would do to families like the ones she works with. And a tax expert testified about how we could raise trillions in revenue by getting billionaires and giant corporations to pay their fair share.
Look: House Republicans aren’t interested in fiscal responsibility — they want hardworking Americans to shoulder the burden of keeping the government up and running while billionaires and large corporations get away with paying as little as possible.
The debt ceiling hostage demands that they’re making would cost millions of Americans their jobs and plunge into a recession. That’s a non-starter.
I’m going to keep fighting for a clean, responsible bill that avoids a debt default.
I’ll keep making sure policymakers hear about the human consequences of things like budget cuts.
And I’ll keep thinking about the millions of Americans who are working hard right now — paying mortgages, making rent, putting food on the table — but would get handed pink slips if House Republicans get their way.
[_**I’ll stay in the fight, but I can’t do it alone. Add your name to say you’re fighting alongside me to protect hardworking Americans from the GOP’s debt-ceiling games and devastating proposed cuts.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59942557/395558298/186283225?refcode=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&ms=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4NmY3My1jYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMelEMGtPOzMkZrrEOcxEYsRj3fEDGIuokcWEwE8qWQ=&emci=b5186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b7186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59942558/395558299/186283225?refcode=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&ms=EMZ12B_FIN_E_20230309_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzE4NmY3My1jYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMelEMGtPOzMkZrrEOcxEYsRj3fEDGIuokcWEwE8qWQ=&emci=b5186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b7186f73-cbbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
Thanks for being a part of this,

clean_body: House Republicans are manufacturing a debt ceiling crisis to try to wedge us between a rock and a hard place. | | | You may be seeing a lot of headlines about the debt ceiling and budget plans — so I wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand. House Republicans are manufacturing a debt ceiling crisis to try to wedge us between a rock and a hard place: Option #1: Default on the national debt, trigger a recession, and throw 1 million Americans out of work. Option #2: Cut key government programs, trigger a recession, and throw 2.6 million Americans out of work. In other words: Heads, they win. Tails, we lose. Both outcomes would hit working people like a kick in the teeth. And both outcomes could cause enough damage to pave the way for Republicans to take back the White House in 2024. But look: There’s no reason we have to play the GOP’s game here. | You may be wondering where I got those jobs figures from. Well, I asked a top economist to put together a report on the consequences of a debt default AND on the consequences of Republicans’ proposed budget cuts. You see, we’ve heard a lot about the former — and they’re plenty terrifying — but less about the latter, which should also send chills down policymakers’ spines. The economist, Mark Zandi, presented his report to a Senate Banking subcommittee hearing I chaired. We also heard from a Massachusetts child care and early learning provider about how much damage GOP cuts would do to families like the ones she works with. And a tax expert testified about how we could raise trillions in revenue by getting billionaires and giant corporations to pay their fair share. Look: House Republicans aren’t interested in fiscal responsibility — they want hardworking Americans to shoulder the burden of keeping the government up and running while billionaires and large corporations get away with paying as little as possible. The debt ceiling hostage demands that they’re making would cost millions of Americans their jobs and plunge into a recession. That’s a non-starter. I’m going to keep fighting for a clean, responsible bill that avoids a debt default. I’ll keep making sure policymakers hear about the human consequences of things like budget cuts. And I’ll keep thinking about the millions of Americans who are working hard right now — paying mortgages, making rent, putting food on the table — but would get handed pink slips if House Republicans get their way. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2023 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The guy who’s running to be on the highest court in Wisconsin compared Social Security to slavery, and attacked marriage equality openly and derisively. He’s not a friend to women who need abortion care, or voters who want fair election laws. Do you want him setting precedents that may go to the Supreme Court?

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We wanted to give you an update on how our campaign is going so far, friend:
**As you may have seen, our launch was a huge success!** The support we've built has really put our campaign on strong footing as we get started.
**But we can't let up.** See, we launched this campaign now because our strategy for victory involves organizing all across California's 12th, _particularly_ in communities that are too often left behind or ignored by politicians.
And we can tell you that it takes a lot of resources to do that organizing! From recruiting and training organizers, to paying for their transit costs to get them into the communities we need to reach, to even just supplying them with paper and pens, **we're relying on donations from generous folks like you to put our strategy into action.**
[**_That's why we're reaching out and asking for your support today. If you haven't yet made a gift to the campaign, now is the perfect time — early investments now will pay off a ton later! name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: We won’t stand for Governor Ron DeSantis’ dangerous agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Permitless carry puts Florida’s children, families, and communities in constant danger of more gun violence.
#

Hi there, it’s Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, senior advisor with Giffords.
This week, the Florida legislature started their session and right at the top of their agenda, they’re prioritizing permitless carry—an extremely dangerous policy that has the full support of Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.
Permitless carry would allow essentially anyone in the state of Florida to carry a loaded gun with no license, permit, or training—no questions asked.
Permitless carry means that someone convicted of a violent crime, who bought their gun through a private sale without a background check, could carry in our public spaces—and law enforcement wouldn’t even be able to ask for a license.
Florida is already all too familiar with the devastation of mass shootings and daily gun violence, yet Governor DeSantis and extreme members of the state legislature are siding with the gun lobby by prioritizing this dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda.
I’ve been in Florida this week fighting alongside Floridians who disagree with this dangerous legislation the Florida GOP is trying to push through. We’re making it clear that we are not afraid to fight back against Governor DeSantis’ extreme agenda.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230309-1-15&t=1&akid=4382%2E3935704%2EHA6_Rq)
Permitless carry puts Florida’s children, families, and communities in constant danger of more gun violence. States that allow anyone to carry a gun in public have seen an 11% increase in homicides.
Floridians’ lives are on the line, and I’m personally asking for your support so we can keep fighting back against permitless carry.
[**Will you please make a contribution to Giffords PAC today? We need your help to take on extreme legislators who are more concerned about the gun lobby’s agenda than keeping Floridians safe.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230309-1-15&t=2&akid=4382%2E3935704%2EHA6_Rq)

clean_body: Permitless carry puts Florida’s children, families, and communities in constant danger of more gun violence. Hi there, it’s Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, senior advisor with Giffords. This week, the Florida legislature started their session and right at the top of their agenda, they’re prioritizing permitless carry—an extremely dangerous policy that has the full support of Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. Permitless carry would allow essentially anyone in the state of Florida to carry a loaded gun with no license, permit, or training—no questions asked. Permitless carry means that someone convicted of a violent crime, who bought their gun through a private sale without a background check, could carry in our public spaces—and law enforcement wouldn’t even be able to ask for a license. Florida is already all too familiar with the devastation of mass shootings and daily gun violence, yet Governor DeSantis and extreme members of the state legislature are siding with the gun lobby by prioritizing this dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda. I’ve been in Florida this week fighting alongside Floridians who disagree with this dangerous legislation the Florida GOP is trying to push through. We’re making it clear that we are not afraid to fight back against Governor DeSantis’ extreme agenda. Permitless carry puts Florida’s children, families, and communities in constant danger of more gun violence. States that allow anyone to carry a gun in public have seen an 11% increase in homicides. Floridians’ lives are on the line, and I’m personally asking for your support so we can keep fighting back against permitless carry. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you. Floridians are counting on us. Sincerely, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell Former Congresswoman and Giffords Senior Advisor Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

clean_body: | | | My friend, It's time for a more positive and hopeful message for all Americans. An America United is bridging ideological gaps and bringing leaders and Americans together to unite under true leadership. The way forward is with common sense solutions and doing away with partisan performative politics. Are you in? name: WI Supreme Court Alert [AOTL]
subject: Democracy is on the line.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Join All On The Line Wisconsin Volunteer Voter Mobilization Virtual Text Bank.
|
---

* * *
**2023's Biggest, Most Unusual Race Centers on Abortion and Democracy**
_"The election for a swing seat on Wisconsin's Supreme Court... will determine the fate of abortion rights, gerrymandered legislative maps ... and perhaps even influence the state's 2024 presidential election."
\-- New York Times_
* * *
Experts are calling the Wisconsin Supreme Court election the most high-stakes race so far of 2023. **Democracy is on the line and we can not afford to ignore this race.**
**The outcomes of this race could determine:**
➡️ Whether Wisconsin conservatives will be allowed to enforce an abortion ban,
➡️ Whether the court will uphold maps that are so gerrymandered,
➡️ And, crucially, whether conservative lawmakers can ignore the will of Wisconsin voters by overturning the state’s 2024 presidential election results.
You can take action today and get involved ahead of the election.
**[Join an Upcoming All On The Line Wisconsin Volunteer Voter Mobilization Virtual Text Bank:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59943118/395560593/179589765?utm_campaign=20230309_AOTL_O_WITextBank1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNWYwYTFjLWNlYmUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XysY6idNuuQz3v_6GBiuKF2WhEMZKoMBGT2lpC4dIUA=&emci=f69c14cc-ebb9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fa5f0a1c-cebe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)**

**During the session, attendees will learn:**
➡️ About our volunteer texting tools,
➡️ Share critical information on the upcoming election,
➡️ And mobilize voters across Wisconsin through text.
Many voter groups say they’re mobilizing for the spring elections like never before and we need all hands on deck. subject: (bump) Humbly asking for your $5 contribution ahead of this month's official FEC fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ilhan for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59943229/395560772/-1230998127?refcode=em230309-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzA5MDUyMi1jZWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bUeiIz794QCUr0QUW5xE2KgYfUnxoIFyHTP1FITrVno=&emci=72289f07-97be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=17090522-cebe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=35610790)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Happy Women's History Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Never forget that history is on our side.
#
Happy Women's History Month, Peter!
This Women's History Month, I've been reflecting on the promise of our movement for justice. Our work is built on the legacy of so many trailblazing women who have come before us — who have shattered not just glass ceilings but the status quo.
While it can feel like we're backsliding at times, **all we have to do is look around us to remember how far we've come.** Our movement is millions upon millions strong. Our movement transcends borders, and forges connections across race, class, gender, immigration status, and more. We celebrate our differences because we know _we are stronger for our diversity._
[**It has taken real work to secure our victories and stay strong in our truth in the face of hateful attacks by the GOP — which is why I'm asking for your continued support, Peter. Will you stand with me and make a donation today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39953?refcode=em20230309-2253&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2253%2E420207%2E7vcDAM)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39953?refcode=em20230309-2253&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2253%2E420207%2E7vcDAM)**
To every woman, girl, and ally reading this message, there is something we can never forget. **We are not alone in this work and we never have been.** That's why I decided to share a list of my favorite books written by an incredible group of women. I hope you can find truth and inspiration in their stories as I have:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39953?refcode=em20230309-2253&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2253%2E420207%2E7vcDAM)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39953?refcode=em20230309-2253&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2253%2E420207%2E7vcDAM)**
The struggle for true equality has no time limit, and our movement isn't going anywhere. We have suffered attacks on our reproductive rights, on trans women and girls, and continue to face absurd pay inequity and discrimination. But we will not stop fighting. **History is on our side.**
I hope you enjoy my book recommendations and you'll stay in this fight with us, Peter — not just this month but every single day.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230309-2253-footer&t=5&refcode2=2253_420207_7vcDAM&akid=2253%2E420207%2E7vcDAM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2253%2E420207%2E7vcDAM)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Let’s normalize talking about periods, fertility, and reproductive health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends - I’m setting aside my Sara-the-Congresswoman hat to share some of the deeply personal, reproductive health choices I recently made in the hopes we can demystify and destigmatize these conversations. (And if you’re just here for the policy insights, I promise those come into play later in the email, too, so keep reading.)
I’ve been transparent about my decision to freeze my eggs, and a few weeks ago I shared more about that experience with the publication Refinery29 (you can read that here! https://www.refinery29.com/en-us/2023/02/11284127/rep-sara-jacobs-fertility-my-body-my-data-act). Here’s the short version: My career was hitting a critical milestone right when I had to make some key decisions about my fertility timeline. So, at 32 and in my first year in Congress, I decided to freeze my eggs.
Just like so many others in my generation, I was told growing up that you can either prioritize your career or have a family - you can’t do both.
But we’re rejecting those societal constraints thanks to advancements in medicine, technology, and health care - and the realities of reproductive health have changed so much in the past few decades.
For example, I’ve lived my entire life with the constitutional right to contraception and I’ve exercised it for nearly as long. From the birth control pills I used as a teenager to address debilitating cramps, to the IUD I’ve relied on for years, or the Plan B I’ve picked up over the counter when I needed it. Like so many of my friends, I use apps to track my periods and my fertility. And of course, I’m grateful that I have access to health care professionals with whom I can make these important decisions.
The process of freezing my eggs was difficult - physically, emotionally - and was incredibly expensive. And here’s where I put my Congresswoman hat back on: Freezing one’s eggs requires immense resources that very few people have access to, and yet everyone should be afforded the dignity to make the decisions that are right for them and their family.
I’m privileged and lucky that I was able to pay out of pocket for this option, but most people can’t do that, and insurance mostly doesn’t cover this process.
Freezing my eggs gave me agency over my own life in a way that was incredibly empowering, and I believe everyone should have the option to choose what’s right for them - whether that's fertility preservation, undergoing fertility treatments, deciding not to have a child, or choosing adoption.
As a millennial woman in a historically older, male-dominated U.S. Congress, I feel a responsibility to address the challenges facing our generation right now, and to anticipate the challenges of the future. I get to break boundaries and take on a lot of firsts - like becoming the first person in the last 35 years (and maybe ever) to talk about their own period on the House floor!
I’m also helping educate my colleagues about fertility treatments, period tracking apps, and reproductive issues in general so that these topics become commonplace - because there’s no way we can successfully expand access to reproductive health care (and ensure it’s affordable, accessible, and stigma-free!) without first engaging in these conversations.
Talking openly about all this is an important step - that’s why I’m glad to share my story with you directly, and I hope you’ll feel free to do the same with me. If you’d like to share a personal story about balancing fertility and a career, making reproductive health choices throughout your life, or anything else that’s on your mind, reply to this email. I’d be honored to read what you have to say.
Thanks for reading along and sharing in my truth.
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

But we’re rejecting those societal constraints thanks to advancements in medicine, technology, and health care - and the realities of reproductive health have changed so much in the past few decades. For example, I’ve lived my entire life with the constitutional right to contraception and I’ve exercised it for nearly as long. From the birth control pills I used as a teenager to address debilitating cramps, to the IUD I’ve relied on for years, or the Plan B I’ve picked up over the counter when I needed it. Like so many of my friends, I use apps to track my periods and my fertility. And of course, I’m grateful that I have access to health care professionals with whom I can make these important decisions. The process of freezing my eggs was difficult - physically, emotionally - and was incredibly expensive. And here’s where I put my Congresswoman hat back on: Freezing one’s eggs requires immense resources that very few people have access to, and yet everyone should be afforded the dignity to make the decisions that are right for them and their family. I’m privileged and lucky that I was able to pay out of pocket for this option, but most people can’t do that, and insurance mostly doesn’t cover this process. Freezing my eggs gave me agency over my own life in a way that was incredibly empowering, and I believe everyone should have the option to choose what’s right for them - whether that's fertility preservation, undergoing fertility treatments, deciding not to have a child, or choosing adoption. As a millennial woman in a historically older, male-dominated U.S. Congress, I feel a responsibility to address the challenges facing our generation right now, and to anticipate the challenges of the future. I get to break boundaries and take on a lot of firsts - like becoming the first person in the last 35 years (and maybe ever) to talk about their own period on the House floor! I’m also helping educate my colleagues about fertility treatments, period tracking apps, and reproductive issues in general so that these topics become commonplace - because there’s no way we can successfully expand access to reproductive health care (and ensure it’s affordable, accessible, and stigma-free!) without first engaging in these conversations. Talking openly about all this is an important step - that’s why I’m glad to share my story with you directly, and I hope you’ll feel free to do the same with me. If you’d like to share a personal story about balancing fertility and a career, making reproductive health choices throughout your life, or anything else that’s on your mind, reply to this email. I’d be honored to read what you have to say. Thanks for reading along and sharing in my truth. -Sara Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE 👉 [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States [] [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [] and we'll adjust your preferences. subject: From Colleague to Congressmember
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289PO Box 92320, Pasadena, CA 91109Additional information is available at fec
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brysongillette/from-colleague-to-congressmember?e=1012843e9c)
---
[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=7a52ab676f&e=1012843e9c)
Dear Friend,
Yesterday, we celebrated International Women’s Day and will continue to recognize and honor the contributions and achievements of women throughout history in the month of March.
As a former teacher, attorney, and advocate, I’m proud to serve on the Los Angeles Board of Education alongside Nick, where, together, we ensure our students thrive in all areas of their lives.
But I wouldn’t be where I am today without all of the women who’ve supported me along the way-especially my mother. My mother came to our country when it welcomed workers from Mexico like my grandpa who worked on a dairy farm in El Paso, Texas. My mom enrolled me in public school in the 6th grade, beginning my lifelong love for LA Unified and inspired my pursuit of becoming a teacher. My teachers’ unrelenting dedication to their students’ educational experience and support of my independence and resilience led me to attend an Ivy League university as a first generation college student.
Today, I’m supporting Nick’s congressional campaign given his proven track record of not only putting the needs of students first, but because of _**his commitment to championing opportunities for women and girls.**_ Whether it’s working on the gender pay gap at the White House or co-sponsoring my resolution celebrating women’s history and addressing disparities and gaps for women just this week, Nick always shows up.
_[**Will you show up for him as he seeks to bring this same level of commitment to Congress by contributing $25, $50, or $100 today?**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=09d513e0cf&e=1012843e9c)_
I have to admit, I’d be sad to lose Nick on the school board, but I know he’d still be fighting for our district in Washington. I hope you’ll join me in supporting his campaign!
Onward,Tanya Ortiz Franklin

|

body:

Peter, Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.** It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. **We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:** **[Please, if you’re able to, will you give $5 or more right now – any amount you can afford – to help us hit our goal and defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xdP-nmxY9tRezNfcxzC3oJkLD9xaodohTE1NwXfptnOkxTm3yaP8x7B2TxeAgKwc4BolJuUTAm-7xr_nUg79ECdTIGck-7mP16x2jRajqFHe2X5c-ADZzBH6Tpli6HTMJYlyg_K6tNYCeoget_9TBTXujpzVH5DnXPWpRGK16NXwsMRCDmX59tuAxqj5ghBRz6vh9C52ArrO9rAE_xKkAMtbmAmeb6jlFeY2Vw1xx-15uzhI95PjUJYVZrPkVwUo7nBjsSVNdA2sAaiROHLx9nAY1pzIjkDvaGMNC7B3oIHlPKgYpzjmzGhIHua-eL70jM7ivczdvEhSF5l50e7DNN/3uc/HaR7Mn2MQK--DBBLle2ScA/h1/OKYYwKgUg9cJGPWOplR9QB0AwBFvefcS1G62xcU2_hg)**

name: Andy Kim
subject: Call to Action: Tell Congress to Fund Universal School Meals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59923098/395521891/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY0Y2Q3ZS1hN2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5bJUHBYe9x4GmJowyr2otaRZH_nbF9EhOhn0-f3oPY=&emci=d864cd7e-a7be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=db64cd7e-a7be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **The pandemic shed a bright light on child hunger in our community and across our country.** This past summer, I wrote and helped pass bipartisan legislation making many temporary improvements to summer school meal programs permanent – including more flexibility around service that allows schools to serve families in all areas. Hunger isn't a temporary issue. **[Now it's time to finish the job and permanently fund universal school meals. Will you sign my petition and tell Congress to fund universal school meals?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59923099/395521892/-1806378726?source=2023SchoolMeals_AK&referrer=group-andy-kim-for-congress-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andy-kim-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-03-universal-school-meals-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY0Y2Q3ZS1hN2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5bJUHBYe9x4GmJowyr2otaRZH_nbF9EhOhn0-f3oPY=&emci=d864cd7e-a7be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=db64cd7e-a7be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=26261389)** There are still nine million children in the United States living in food-insecure households, wondering where their next meal will come from. School breakfast and lunch are essential. Hungry children have a hard time focusing in the classroom and often miss days of school. Some states have begun to implement universal school meals and are already seeing increased student attendance and higher performance. **This isn't partisan.** I am hopeful that Congress can come together again to find solutions for this issue facing every community. clean_body: | | | | The pandemic shed a bright light on child hunger in our community and across our country. This past summer, I wrote and helped pass bipartisan legislation making many temporary improvements to summer school meal programs permanent – including more flexibility around service that allows schools to serve families in all areas. Hunger isn't a temporary issue. There are still nine million children in the United States living in food-insecure households, wondering where their next meal will come from. School breakfast and lunch are essential. Hungry children have a hard time focusing in the classroom and often miss days of school. Some states have begun to implement universal school meals and are already seeing increased student attendance and higher performance. This isn't partisan. I am hopeful that Congress can come together again to find solutions for this issue facing every community. In Congress, I'll keep up the fight to ensure our children have access to healthy and nutritious food. **Tucker Carlson — _knowing full well of the truth about January 6th_ — abused his platform to spread lies about the 2020 election and January 6th insurrection, further instigating the MAGA mob.**

Now, Senator Schumer is calling on Fox News to do what should’ve been done years ago — pull Carlson’s show off the air IMMEDIATELY!

Peter, we’re drafting an URGENT petition to Fox News DEMANDING they cancel Tucker Carlson’s segment ASAP before he causes more chaos and spreads more dangerous lies!

**So Peter, as one of our top PA Democrats,_we NEED your support:_**

| | 3️⃣ Senate races in 2024 to 👀 [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59924089/395525802/118143280?sourceid=1048734&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIxMzAxYS1hYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fr7oUI1z1RRr0pnOu-7GaZcCMTecvYY5p_z6h_nxlos=&emci=88371013-abbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2321301a-abbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) **Peter, here's the real deal about the Senate in 2024:** We _already know_ some of these races are going to come **down to the wire** — and make or break our tiny Democratic majority.

We absolutely _can't_ lose the Senate. With perennial swing states like **Nevada** , **Michigan** , and **Wisconsin** ALL featuring marquee Senate races, EMILYs List and our powerful pro-choice community can help Democratic pro-choice women WIN critical races like these next November. **[That's why we're running a new Save the Senate Fund — with a $150,000 goal! — to shore up our resources and help pro-choice Senate women hit the ground running. Can you step up with a donation before Friday's deadline, Peter?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59924100/395525867/118143280?sourceid=1048734&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIxMzAxYS1hYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fr7oUI1z1RRr0pnOu-7GaZcCMTecvYY5p_z6h_nxlos=&emci=88371013-abbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2321301a-abbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** 🎲 **[NEVADA]** 🎰
The 2024 odds couldn't be tighter in Nevada. Last year, EMILYs List-backed Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto won her race by _less than 1%_ , the closest Senate race in the nation! And next year, Democratic Sen. **Jacky Rosen** will likely face a strong opponent in her key reelection campaign.

🚗 **[MICHIGAN]** ⛵
Things are moving in Democrats' direction in Michigan. Come 2024, there will be a **coveted open Senate seat** and a golden opportunity to elect a Democratic pro-choice woman to the Senate. But make no mistake, this race will be fiercely competitive — the last Senate race in Michigan came down to _less than 2%_!

🍻 **[WISCONSIN]** 🧀
We toasted Democratic pro-choice trailblazer Sen. **Tammy Baldwin** when she won her key race with our help in 2018. Her seat is up again next November, and we _can't_ forget that last year's hard-fought Senate election in Wisconsin came down to _1%_ — the second-closest in the country!

3️⃣ paramount Senate races. 3️⃣ opportunities for Democrats to hold our can't-lose majority. 3️⃣ reasons for you to step up today, Peter >>> **Will you donate to help hit our $150,000 Save the Senate Fund goal and help elect and reelect outstanding Democratic pro-choice women to the Senate?

[https://emilyslist.org/go/Lets-Save-The-Senate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59924102/395525869/118143280?sourceid=1048734&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIxMzAxYS1hYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fr7oUI1z1RRr0pnOu-7GaZcCMTecvYY5p_z6h_nxlos=&emci=88371013-abbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2321301a-abbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Thank you,

clean_body: | | | 3️⃣ Senate races in 2024 to 👀 Peter, here's the real deal about the Senate in 2024: We already know some of these races are going to come down to the wire — and make or break our tiny Democratic majority. We absolutely can't lose the Senate. With perennial swing states like Nevada , Michigan , and Wisconsin ALL featuring marquee Senate races, EMILYs List and our powerful pro-choice community can help Democratic pro-choice women WIN critical races like these next November. 🎲 [NEVADA] 🎰 The 2024 odds couldn't be tighter in Nevada. Last year, EMILYs List-backed Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto won her race by less than 1% , the closest Senate race in the nation! And next year, Democratic Sen. Jacky Rosen will likely face a strong opponent in her key reelection campaign. 🚗 [MICHIGAN] ⛵ Things are moving in Democrats' direction in Michigan. Come 2024, there will be a coveted open Senate seat and a golden opportunity to elect a Democratic pro-choice woman to the Senate. But make no mistake, this race will be fiercely competitive — the last Senate race in Michigan came down to less than 2%! 🍻 [WISCONSIN] 🧀 We toasted Democratic pro-choice trailblazer Sen. Tammy Baldwin when she won her key race with our help in 2018. Her seat is up again next November, and we can't forget that last year's hard-fought Senate election in Wisconsin came down to 1% — the second-closest in the country! 3️⃣ paramount Senate races. 3️⃣ opportunities for Democrats to hold our can't-lose majority. 3️⃣ reasons for you to step up today, Peter >>> Will you donate to help hit our $150,000 Save the Senate Fund goal and help elect and reelect outstanding Democratic pro-choice women to the Senate? body:
Our LGBTQ+ youth deserve respect and support just like any other child.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/a-bwI-REoMcTtGdBwZpu8NHqRyMCiVz0ut9NKNk2F8g=/Wpo19exVETXow7N6JP0NquYTc9ni7afHn4Yhh_2cfM0=?refcode=EM_FR_230309DefendLGBTQ_Team_90DO_3_G_B_Logo)
Fellow Democrats,

Hatred towards the LGBTQ+ community from the far right is not new, but last weekend they took their rhetoric to alarming new depths.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/a-bwI-REoMcTtGdBwZpu8NHqRyMCiVz0ut9NKNk2F8g=/Wpo19exVETXow7N6JP0NquYTc9ni7afHn4Yhh_2cfM0=?refcode=EM_FR_230309DefendLGBTQ_Team_90DO_3_G_B_G1)
Extremist politicians are dehumanizing the LGBTQ+ community in attempts to boost their platform, and **they 're not just willing, but eager to target children with these attacks.**

These extremists are here in Illinois, not just isolated incidents reported on the national news or in deep red states. **Many are running for school board and local elections in less than a month.**

**[We know this because we've been on the frontlines for months with the candidates fighting back. Can we count on you to donate $10 or more today and join us in defending children?](https://act.myngp.com/el/a-bwI-REoMcTtGdBwZpu8NHqRyMCiVz0ut9NKNk2F8g=/Wpo19exVETXow7N6JP0NquYTc9ni7afHn4Yhh_2cfM0=?refcode=EM_FR_230309DefendLGBTQ_Team_90DO_3_G_B_L1&amount=10)**

body:

Peter-
The President of Mexico, Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador (AMLO), is publicly declaring his intent to interfere in the American elections in order to unseat me from Congress.
In fact, AMLO said that he will start a public relations campaign in the United States against my bills to fight the cartels and "make a call to not vote for" anyone that supports my legislation.

| | | [HELP ME FIGHT BACK](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001njkMN6ICJ5_yxvhsP-xcC62GZWvRcmpg3fzurD6QLooQk72214ORF4zd5y56E5tb8uyzPasxflBaAuz0_6mFatvjpvLodZuVEFU3oyHHbs88YGmSnXDbsZ7rOKJwafxsa2NwdRaTAJPTPnvo8wHwpBhQmroT8h0JmnAf6HvPlaoKe4u-IGAT25HU4cR0fsAI7LcCJTFO-ZDiBLOq2IiJr7MAor_0HP4qpYsicO9nqX6NH1YNotGfzJDYkjuTIjhHpgJQHOyb2jTW4JXrJt5tx94oZSMRSzyQbpLpHYBRRxb1z7Qxn2UQVFqx_tPBsS_aMer4IXmJyfuRH1oVdy1ZkjLlvS1-rAf8&c=Tg1q57FkoVJZtWFBq-rExrJNCl3KQieirQVELK897LxiG558JrhPtg==&ch=TmtUqsZPjn-POic_a7eNkJ-YzhJ1-QpSDC_hLBi6eM5C1uPB96cNHA==)

| As you know from reading my weekly campaign briefs, I've spent the past two months pushing hard to get my bill passed authorizing the use of military force against the Mexican drug cartels.
My bill has gained serious traction in recent weeks, and AMLO has taken notice.
All week long Mexico's President has been holding press conferences attacking me and saying my bill is "irresponsible" and "propaganda."
Now he's threatening to campaign against me and anyone else who targets the Mexican drug cartels.
My response to the Mexico's President is simple:
1\. Bring it. 2\. Get a grip. You should be campaigning against the cartels who are MURDERING your own people, not the Americans who want to help eradicate them.
We want to work by, with, and through the Mexican government to target the cartels. My bill authorizing military force doesn't mean there's an "invasion" or that we want to roll tanks into Mexico. It just means our President will have the authority to dedicate our military resources to help Mexico eradicate the cartels once and for all.
This is a win-win for America and the citizens of Mexico. The only people it's bad for are the cartels and the corrupt politicians who support them.
This is a huge opportunity for Democrats and Republicans to come together and send a clear message to the cartels and corrupt politicians who support them: enough is enough.
If you agree, I could really use your support. If Mexico's President is going to use his resources against me in my election, I need all the help I can get. Any amount you can donate - [whether it's $5, $10, $25, $100, or the maximum amount of $3,300](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001njkMN6ICJ5_yxvhsP-xcC62GZWvRcmpg3fzurD6QLooQk72214ORF4zd5y56E5tb8uyzPasxflBaAuz0_6mFatvjpvLodZuVEFU3oyHHbs88YGmSnXDbsZ7rOKJwafxsa2NwdRaTAJPTPnvo8wHwpBhQmroT8h0JmnAf6HvPlaoKe4u-IGAT25HU4cR0fsAI7LcCJTFO-ZDiBLOq2IiJr7MAor_0HP4qpYsicO9nqX6NH1YNotGfzJDYkjuTIjhHpgJQHOyb2jTW4JXrJt5tx94oZSMRSzyQbpLpHYBRRxb1z7Qxn2UQVFqx_tPBsS_aMer4IXmJyfs02t9sEGQi-gcuXDOTJfOc&c=Tg1q57FkoVJZtWFBq-rExrJNCl3KQieirQVELK897LxiG558JrhPtg==&ch=TmtUqsZPjn-POic_a7eNkJ-YzhJ1-QpSDC_hLBi6eM5C1uPB96cNHA==) - will help me continue building momentum for my bill and fight back against foreign interference in my election by AMLO and cartel money.

In fact, AMLO said that he will start a public relations campaign in the United States against my bills to fight the cartels and "make a call to not vote for" anyone that supports my legislation. | | | == | As you know from reading my weekly campaign briefs, I've spent the past two months pushing hard to get my bill passed authorizing the use of military force against the Mexican drug cartels. My bill has gained serious traction in recent weeks, and AMLO has taken notice. All week long Mexico's President has been holding press conferences attacking me and saying my bill is "irresponsible" and "propaganda." Now he's threatening to campaign against me and anyone else who targets the Mexican drug cartels. My response to the Mexico's President is simple: 1\. Bring it. 2\. Get a grip. You should be campaigning against the cartels who are MURDERING your own people, not the Americans who want to help eradicate them. We want to work by, with, and through the Mexican government to target the cartels. My bill authorizing military force doesn't mean there's an "invasion" or that we want to roll tanks into Mexico. It just means our President will have the authority to dedicate our military resources to help Mexico eradicate the cartels once and for all. This is a win-win for America and the citizens of Mexico. The only people it's bad for are the cartels and the corrupt politicians who support them. This is a huge opportunity for Democrats and Republicans to come together and send a clear message to the cartels and corrupt politicians who support them: enough is enough. If you agree, I could really use your support. If Mexico's President is going to use his resources against me in my election, I need all the help I can get. Any amount you can donate - == - will help me continue building momentum for my bill and fight back against foreign interference in my election by AMLO and cartel money. | | | == | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | If you'd prefer to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

In the NEXT 24 HOURS I need to know if you're with me. Thanks, Vivek | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Taking the fight to Republicans on FREEDOM
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
As Democrats, we cannot allow Republicans to own that word in the political debate. We have to take it back.

Friends -
Republicans like to talk a lot about the word “freedom.”
Let’s take one completely random example — Ron DeSantis.
He talks about freedom A LOT. He signed a “Freedom First Budget.” His new book is called The Courage to Be Free. He even released an absolutely ridiculous rock ballad about Florida’s freedom.
But the DeSantis vision of freedom is complete fraud. He is one of the most anti-freedom governors in the most anti-freedom political party in the country.
Freedom is under attack in Florida.
They ban books in Florida.
They restrict speech in Florida.
They make it harder to vote in Florida.
They criminalize women and doctors in Florida.
As Democrats, we cannot allow Republicans to own that word in the political debate. We have to take it back.
Because true freedom means you can afford to get the health care you need without going bankrupt.
True freedom means being able to love the person you love without fear or discrimination.
True freedom means you can go to a movie, a parade, a church or an elementary school without fear of getting shot.
True freedom is a woman and her doctor making the health care decisions she needs.
True freedom means you don’t have to choose between covering the cost of your utilities or the medicine you need to live.
True freedom means living life without the fear that large portions of the planet will be uninhabitable for future generations.
I am asking you to join me in this fight. If you don’t already;
[FOLLOW ME ON TWITTER](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1749?t=1&akid=1130%2E4767699%2Eliq5DS)
[JOIN ME ON FACEBOOK](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1791?t=2&akid=1130%2E4767699%2Eliq5DS)
[FOLLOW ME ON INSTAGRAM](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1792?t=3&akid=1130%2E4767699%2Eliq5DS)
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom
* * *

🐻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 💪🏻
Last year, California passed an amendment to our state constitution protecting a woman’s right to access an abortion. But our fight is not over. The far-right and those who cower to them continue to put women’s rights at risk. Please make a contribution to Gavin Newsom’s ballot measure committee so we can continue protecting women’s rights in California. If that seems worth it, please chip in $5 today.
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-em-march23-choice/?refcode=em230309-onb-75k&amount=5&refcode2=1130_4767699_liq5DS&akid=1130%2E4767699%2Eliq5DS)**

name: Ed Rollins
subject: Limited edition offer
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Peter, The 2024 presidential race is underway and there's only one Republican who can rally the base and defeat Joe Biden in a landslide: **Florida Governor Ron DeSantis** ...but he has not yet put his hat in the ring. [**That 's why I'm urgently turning to you - a loyal grassroots conservative - to spur Governor DeSantis to jump in the race.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r)
---
|
---
In fact, I'm asking you to do two important things to let Governor DeSantis know it's time:
---
1. [**Donate**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r) today - this will help us let Governor DeSantis know he has the support of millions of grassroots patriots like you across the nation.
2. [**Proudly display the special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r)- which I'll rush you when you make your donation today - somewhere folks will see it to spread the word about our best AND ONLY option for 2024.

---
**Limited Edition Bumper Sticker _Available Now_**
---
---
|
---
The numbers don't lie. The latest Quinnipiac poll of independent voters has DeSantis at 50% to Biden's 41% and a 12.4% average lead across major polling sources. In other words, Ron DeSantis is the one candidate who can defeat Joe Biden in a landslide and usher in a new era of conservative leadership. **On top of that, we 've now collected over 200,000 signatures from American patriots like you on our Draft DeSantis petition! ** I certainly don't need to tell you our country desperately needs new leadership. New, principled conservative leadership. America needs a leader who will fight for our shared values, defend our constitutional rights and remove the red tape so our economy can thrive. **America needs Ron DeSantis.** [**So can I count on your immediate donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r) _Ready for Ron_ is the only legitimate grassroots organization dedicated to jumpstarting Ron DeSantis's 2024 presidential campaign. We are working hard to persuade the Governor to jump in the race NOW... ...while we rally conservative Americans like you to raise money and increase his name recognition and momentum so Ron DeSantis is the clear frontrunner for the Republican nomination the day he announces his candidacy. [**Don 't forget I'll rush you a special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker when you donate today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r) Four more years of Joe Biden isn't an option. I'm _Ready for Ron._ Are you? Thank you in advance for your support of Ron DeSantis and our country.
---
Sincerely,
---
Ed Rollins
---
P.S. I'm ready for someone to hold Joe Biden's feet to the fire and get booted out of office on Election Day 2024. But the only way that will happen is if Republicans rally around one candidate: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. [**Donate today to urge Governor DeSantis to get in the race and I 'll rush you a special edition READY FOR RON bumper sticker today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r) Please display it proudly where others can see to spread the word about our next President.
---
[**DONATE TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r)
---
| | _Ready for Ron is a grassroots effort dedicated to drafting Ron DeSantis for President in 2024. Your support is critical to making sure this effort succeeds in order to get America back on track. _
---
_Our efforts depend on the support of America-First patriots like you. So if you'd like to donate,**[please submit your response today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r)** Thank you. _
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62416150:6u0VlPGNe:m:1:3331421248:25C8F9F3F5210F8758C72762EE63F82D:r)
---
Contributions or gifts to the Ready for Ron are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections. Contributions from federal government contractors, national banks, or foreign nationals or entities are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. By submitting the form above, you certify the following statements are true and accurate: 1. This contribution is made from your personal funds, not from the general treasury funds of a corporation, union, or national bank, and will not be reimbursed by another person or entity; 2. This contribution is made by a U.S. citizen, lawfully admitted permanent U.S. resident (i.e. Green Card holder), and not a foreign national or entity, federal government contractor, or national bank; and 3. Contributions from individuals up to $5,000 per year are designated to the RFR candidate contribution account, and any amount in excess of $5,000 per year is designated to the RFR Carey account.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carla=20Sands?=
subject: Greetings from Pennsylvania!
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/8f79249f0389/greetings-from-pennsylvania?e=b254a3b575)
Greetings from Pennsylvania!

I am just coming down from the excitement of being with many, many dear friends at CPAC. Thanks to Mercedes and Matt Schlapp, thousands of conservatives gathered in Maryland at the National Harbor and we heard from former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo, former governor and presidential hopeful Nikky Haley, entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy, and former President Donald J. Trump. While the first three candidates were brief, President Trump’s speech was a magnum opus that laid out his intended policies.

I recently returned from speaking to Caribbean and Latin American parliamentarians, business owners, and security partners at an intelligence and security forum in Panama and asked them to choose the US over China as a trading partner.

Pennsylvania continues to be without an active senator while John Fetterman remains in the hospital for mental health treatment. I have publicly called for Governor Josh Shapiro to appoint a new senator to capably and competently represent Pennsylvania in the Senate. This is the most dangerous period in our lifetime, and we need a great representative to help build our country back from the pandemic and keep us safe from the many foreign and domestic threats. Depending on when Governor Shapiro replaces the incapacitated senator, we should have an election in 2023 or 2024 to replace John Fetterman.

One of the exciting new efforts that the Center for Energy & Environment at the AFPI is committed to is Twitter Space. Our Twitter Spaces have been well attended and have had energy experts and folks that are concerned about the administration’s efforts to de-bank and discourage the use of fossil fuels and fund, through tax dollars a transition to renewable energy that is not yet developed enough to power our country and economy.

I learned this week that the Pennsylvania GOP is working on a ballot program so that we win elections in 2023 and 2024. If you are in Pennsylvania, I hope you support the candidates for Judge so that we elect good and fair judges, especially the State Supreme Court.

Warmly,
Carla Sands
US Ambassador to the Kingdom of Denmark (ret.)

Please see my latest news hits below and
AFPI's 2nd Amendment newsletter.

“Upholding the rule of law is essential to maintaining our Republic and our rights as a free people.”

** Protecting and Upholding our Second Amendment RIGHTS
------------------------------------------------------------
The Biden Administration and liberal activists across the Nation continue to assault our Second Amendment rights. The recent surge in violent crime is making the streets of America increasingly unsafe. In the last year alone, the rates of assault, murder, robbery, and rape have risen anywhere from five to forty percent in many communities around the Nation, coming on the heels of unprecedented escalations in 2020. When the state of public safety is in peril, citizens must be able to defend themselves and their families against criminals and those who seek to do them harm. This basic principle is consistent with America’s historic commitment to freedom and equality, enshrined in the Nation’s founding documents.

The Center for Law & Justice is taking the fight to defend our Second Amendment rights HEAD ON. Check out our latest products below and learn how YOU can help defend this unique, sacred AMERICAN right.

Restoring Justice and Upholding the Second Amendment

The Center for Law & Justice takes a deep dive into the origins, meaning, and purpose of the Second Amendment. How Can States Defend Their Second Amendment Rights? The Answer is Constitutional Carry

Constitutional carry, or permitless carry, codifies the right of law-abiding citizens to carry a handgun—open and/or concealed carry—without a permit. 25 states have already enacted Constitutional Carry legislation, with more states introducing bills to protect their citizens’ 2A rights.

Read AFPI’s FACT SHEET and learn more about Constitutional Carry HERE: What is Constitutional Carry? name: Ro Khanna
subject: We need a U.S. Senator who will fight for working families in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Ruben Gallego has what it takes to represent Arizona.
#
Friend,
An Iraq war veteran, a father, and an advocate for quality affordable health care and education, my colleague Ruben Gallego has what it takes to represent Arizona in the U.S. Senate. He’s ready to take on monied interests and fight to protect workers, lift up families, and support communities not just in Arizona, but nationwide. Just as he’s done in the House since 2015.
**The campaign for who will represent Arizona in the U.S. Senate has already begun and it’s critical that we elect a Democrat who will fight for working families.**[**Will you help Ruben by splitting a donation between our campaigns?**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11305?t=1&akid=2646%2E946728%2EkjJFuZ)
Passing bold, innovative legislation for working families begins with electing those who will never stop advocating for them. That’s why we need Ruben in the U.S. Senate.
[**Please make a donation of any amount to our campaigns today to help us win one of the country’s most important Senate races.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11305?t=2&akid=2646%2E946728%2EkjJFuZ)
Thanks for all you do,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230309-2646-footer&t=3&refcode2=2646_946728_kjJFuZ&akid=2646%2E946728%2EkjJFuZ)**

name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

name: Team AOC
subject: Let us explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230309-3983-header&t=1&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX)
Hi,
We checked our records and it looks like you haven’t made a donation for this past quarter (yet...?).
[If you are able to donate, but didn’t get around to it, you can still make your first-quarter gift here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230309.WrNoue&refcode=em20230309-3983-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX) But if you aren’t convinced why your donation is needed right now or what it will accomplish – please give us a moment to explain why your donation is so important.
**_Reason 1: We rely entirely on you._**
Our campaign takes 0 corporate donations. There’s no super PAC or big donor coming in to protect us from the attacks constantly coming our way. And when our donations drop, we have to reassess our budget and make tough cuts.
**_Reason 2: On our campaign, there are no “off-years”. Our movement is always laser focused on supporting all of our communities in times of need and beyond._**
We aren’t a traditional campaign, and we know that’s part of why you’re here. Last month, we fundraised for East Palestine, Ohio. Then, last week, we highlighted Alexandria’s concerns with President Biden’s new anti-asylum policy and raised thousands of dollars for two immigration rights organizations. And, just earlier this week, we helped sell cookies for Girl Scout Troop 6000, **founded by and for girls living in the New York City Shelter System.**
**_Reason 3: Even in “off-years”, the GOP and special interest groups continue to attack our Congresswoman._**
In January, Republican Rep. Jeff Duncan attacked Alexandria on the House floor, telling her to “educate yourself.” Yesterday, a conservative activist who yelled vulgar things at the Congresswoman on the House steps and repeatedly harassed her, filed a lawsuit _against her._
[We know you can make donations to a lot of places, but we hope we’ve explained how your support makes such a huge difference in our fight for working people — even if it’s small. Can you chip in $3 today to keep our movement going strong?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230309.WrNoue&refcode=em20230309-3983-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230309.WrNoue&refcode=em20230309-3983-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX)**
From all of us here on the campaign, we thank you for your continued support.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230309?refcode=em20230309-3983-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=24&refcode2=3983_2526796_cU1wzX&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230309-3983-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=25&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=3983%2E2526796%2EcU1wzX)

Opioids and fentanyl are an epidemic of death. There’s no other way to put it.

name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: A story from a communism-filled childhood
body:
Most Americans today have little to no experience with the horrors it brings to a country.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c798f2cdcb9341f181b032f6d6a18930&_e=hKuNAy9qh1Ibr43b5zoujxGBiMTFPBCoIVgwPFyp2GZvcMvvjeeOrFjasMY01B1kLkTj3zqpd1jMt5QX71ZsI23eiwvZcCuI9kkVS8M8LnokTna_3ihpR8dTag3bjrFxw1qfc-fd90TP_30HkQuDoyC0nInP2dCxYj2CuTr_-9GprQVgpN12bWNX4iHZW_lkpWSPufArC7UJIVDdJchtGNCtT41egn3RavKt-Xkqicts7kKBo1l05RGaX-jRF5Ds4mk4zo6mDFbJm5D8ciOFWyCFxrUCZQmlmuiuC_7eqwLp5CJ3cgvZ0uahFCVtoIyx)

Friend,

Most Americans today have little to no experience with the horrors it brings to a country.

When they think of socialism, they forget about the empty grocery stores, gas shortages, propaganda, and secret police.

Let me introduce myself to you. I am Zilvinas Silenas, the President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and I grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania.

As much as I hate to say it, I am seeing the rise of socialism in America. And I am terrified.

We must show the next generation what socialism can do to a country. I've set a goal to raise $7,000 in the next 48 hours to support **FEE in the Classroom** and share the importance of liberty and free markets with students.

[_**Will you support the next generation as they fight communism with a gift of $15, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c798f2cdcb9341f181b032f6d6a18930&_e=hKuNAy9qh1Ibr43b5zoujxGBiMTFPBCoIVgwPFyp2GZvcMvvjeeOrFjasMY01B1kLkTj3zqpd1jMt5QX71ZsI23eiwvZcCuI9kkVS8M8LnokTna_3ihpR8dTag3bjrFxw1qfc-fd90TP_30HkQuDo3yQeomeJBfT765jpsxgpohmBVraPa6I4h5iFWZe6L3TkKkKJtL-7ZFrtmDTjgrzT_3rFPPkOLlUNzGdCit8mnwSyhACTK_quJANpLyauNqdMIdNZ8G-IY627dcZvO86pLHGJWdTToHqSBOG-kQT1aRB-dH2oM3AyIC3rZcIVua_)

**Do you want to know what 's it like to grow up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania? Let me tell you a story from my childhood.**

On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake.

The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits.

What we didn't know was that **five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded** , sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway.

**You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us.** In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. **That 's how we were treated under socialism.**

During the moment, that was a rare day of sunshine and fun -- something that didn't happen often under Soviet reign. But it was still contaminated by the broken ideology that swept over my home country.

These are not the stories politicians and the media want the next generation to hear. But your generous support will help FEE bring our pro-liberty and pro-free markets message directly to students. clean_body: Most Americans today have little to no experience with the horrors it brings to a country. Friend, Most Americans today have little to no experience with the horrors it brings to a country. When they think of socialism, they forget about the empty grocery stores, gas shortages, propaganda, and secret police. Let me introduce myself to you. I am Zilvinas Silenas, the President of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), and I grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. As much as I hate to say it, I am seeing the rise of socialism in America. And I am terrified. We must show the next generation what socialism can do to a country. I've set a goal to raise $7,000 in the next 48 hours to support FEE in the Classroom and share the importance of liberty and free markets with students. Do you want to know what 's it like to grow up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania? Let me tell you a story from my childhood. On May 1, 1986, my family skipped the mandatory workers' parade in Lithuania. Instead of carrying around red carnations, red balloons, and red placards denouncing the U.S. and the West, we went sunbathing at a local lake. The lake was polluted with industrial runoff from a government-owned leather factory, so swimming was out of the question. Still, the day was unusually warm, so we enjoyed the sunshine, which is not so abundant in the northeastern climes where Lithuania (then-Soviet Socialist Republic of Lithuania) sits. What we didn't know was that five days before, on April 26, the Chernobyl nuclear power plant exploded , sending radioactive clouds westwards through Belarus, Lithuania, all the way to Sweden and Norway. You see, on May 1, we did not know. No one told us. In fact, until the Scandinavians picked up elevated levels of radiation, most people in the Soviet Union did not know what had happened. That 's how we were treated under socialism. During the moment, that was a rare day of sunshine and fun -- something that didn't happen often under Soviet reign. But it was still contaminated by the broken ideology that swept over my home country. These are not the stories politicians and the media want the next generation to hear. But your generous support will help FEE bring our pro-liberty and pro-free markets message directly to students. FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. Students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As. When students complete FEE in the Classroom, they walk away with a new appreciation for the freedom we have in this country. Right now, socialism is gaining popularity with the next generation because celebrities, politicians, and the media tell them it's the " right" or " moral" choice. But FEE in the Classroom is telling them the truth about the values of liberty and free markets. Can I count on you to support FEE in the Classroom and support a student? Click below to donate and help reach our goal of raising $7,000 in the next 48 hours. Thank you, Zilvinas Silenas President Foundation for Economic Education FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
