name: Katie Porter
subject: Judge Janet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I can’t overstate how critical this race is.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18728%2E3422442%2ElVLfLu)
Derek,
Democracy and abortion rights for millions are literally on the line in Wisconsin’s upcoming Supreme Court race. **[You can make a real difference by splitting a donation today between me and the campaign of Judge Janet Protasiewicz, the official Democratic nominee for the Wisconsin Supreme Court.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230309-1?refcode=EMAF09_1_JAN_20230309_V1_F&refcode2=18728_3422442_lVLfLu&akid=18728%2E3422442%2ElVLfLu)** Pitch in using this link, and keep reading to learn more about this critical race.
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230309-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF09_1_JAN_20230309_V1_F&refcode2=18728_3422442_lVLfLu&akid=18728%2E3422442%2ElVLfLu)**
_**I don’t live in Wisconsin, why should I care?**_

No BS–electing Judge Janet could be the **only thing stopping far-right extremists from overturning a presidential election.** Wisconsin’s Supreme Court barely accepted the results of the 2020 election. If Judge Janet's opponent were on the bench, the Court would've undemocratically handed this swing state to Donald Trump.
---
_**I don’t usually donate to a judicial race, why does she need my money?**_

With abortion rights and democracy on the line, dark money Republicans are pouring a ton of resources into this race. Judge Janet is building a grassroots coalition to fight back, and anything you can give will make a difference.
---
_**Who is her opponent?**_

Judge Janet is running against a MAGA extremist who has been personally endorsed by Donald Trump and is being funded by the same GOP billionaires who helped sway the Wisconsin Senate election for Ron Johnson.
---
Derek, the stakes of this race couldn’t be higher: fair maps, abortion access, and election integrity are all on the line. This ten year term will immediately determine the balance of the court. **[Can you split a contribution today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230309-1?refcode=EMAF09_1_JAN_20230309_V1_F&refcode2=18728_3422442_lVLfLu&akid=18728%2E3422442%2ElVLfLu)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230309-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF09_1_JAN_20230309_V1_F&refcode2=18728_3422442_lVLfLu&akid=18728%2E3422442%2ElVLfLu)**
Thanks for considering!
Katie Porter
_Contributions or gifts to Katie Porter for Senate and Janet for Justice are not tax deductible. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

We are only asking for donations of up to $3,300 per election per candidate from individuals and for donations of up to $5,000 per election per candidate from federal multicandidate committees. We are not asking for donations in excess of these amounts or for donations from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks._

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF09_1_JAN_20230309_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=18728_3422442_lVLfLu&akid=18728%2E3422442%2ElVLfLu)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=18728%2E3422442%2ElVLfLu)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=18728%2E3422442%2ElVLfLu)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e52acb8a3fde441aa076afb6bf92c8fe&_e=6ADNX7IvfrH1irQX6bsIpdxfLel0Oq38-Rn3mQgwmj_1h5fI1LGcGPwuNsotUnOKvgKxdq7lGnWZnrpw7et-I7otQ2RrJJrq1E3Nv0L6gmGVYeRzdpHsmo3RnTN5Z4gHs0ZIIYeopdJbq_L53-txmxiKRfirpMhON0TsYlUNOzzrYsJXAVzm404pAc1zXzAzJTME5em8m9LubtoY8zXZqQ6pAqHwnD73aKKnowSNbJD3sN4Kn2YHTbkWz7kOq5pPEH1Ys3yG0_GB4AazrDEN__y9g6n4ctZNFULJxut0pj48rzdRLZk7xVhvGRuS6URgnlwAqnwG-RWFluFuVOMGJKTAulvs_7JlWWRR_i3PXP7npKmFCfasDCj0QMannPO9tmF6fZIYwDmGRe8eJ3AKfQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e52acb8a3fde441aa076afb6bf92c8fe&_e=6ADNX7IvfrH1irQX6bsIpdxfLel0Oq38-Rn3mQgwmj_1h5fI1LGcGPwuNsotUnOKvgKxdq7lGnWZnrpw7et-I7otQ2RrJJrq1E3Nv0L6gmGVYeRzdpHsmo3RnTN5Z4gHs0ZIIYeopdJbq_L53-txmxiKRfirpMhON0TsYlUNOzzrYsJXAVzm404pAc1zXzAzJTME5em8m9LubtoY8zXZqQ6pAqHwnD73aKKnowSNbJD3sN4Kn2YHTbkWz7kOq5pP1clmAMbQP60gSTKdMwCudrjzsllsMyzy7pGb-q5bMHjuhSumD4MF8WVSh29eHz3fui92XTTUG6MDIjpwWq53bGB2PKsKt1jsaOaWdpeOlWYs-RsVcKPX3RTvJicEywH8tZ7bcDcMF64Jwn2_2cjU8Q%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e52acb8a3fde441aa076afb6bf92c8fe&_e=6ADNX7IvfrH1irQX6bsIpdxfLel0Oq38-Rn3mQgwmj_1h5fI1LGcGPwuNsotUnOKvgKxdq7lGnWZnrpw7et-I7otQ2RrJJrq1E3Nv0L6gmGVYeRzdpHsmo3RnTN5Z4gHs0ZIIYeopdJbq_L53-txmxiKRfirpMhON0TsYlUNOzzrYsJXAVzm404pAc1zXzAzJTME5em8m9LubtoY8zXZqQ6pAqHwnD73aKKnowSNbJD3sN4Kn2YHTbkWz7kOq5pPEfkYi2DynmWew6PPzl8tSYP4cEJVpGW5RUUrqIw7DBVyR2SOMeq7gB8qLUyLtriN6CKi-SdRowH5vsZItTimiL1bZi_6UFH5HYZKjgfAuRngqtSutQ57Q71ViNivJGQT04G2g6ov3ULZHMN8Nk4byQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: How you can make a big impact early on in the next election:
body:
It’s important to start preparing now. |
---

| | | As a dedicated member of #TeamLizzie, you know by now that your contributions power our campaign. And you don’t get much of a break from us in asking for your support. That is because in a two-year election cycle, there is always an election around the corner. It is already less than a year from today that my name will be on the ballot once again! The Texas primary is one of the first in the country, and so we have to start preparing now. [_**One way you can make a big impact early on is by pledging a monthly contribution to our campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59938399/395543754/-103282814?refcode=folf230309&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWI0Mjg0Mi1iYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLnd-x4SLFXWfV-31kmKW37BIwEIepqqF7nKcFvYggI=) When you make a recurring monthly contribution, you give us financial resources we can count and that we can plan our budget around as we prepare for the primary and general elections next year. And this time, your contributions will go toward not only winning in TX-07 but winning back the House majority. We see every day how important that is. [_**The first FEC deadline of the year is at the end of this month, and I’m hoping you’ll commit to a monthly contribution before then. $5 or $10 a month — or $7, a number I particularly like! — is especially helpful so we can plan our spending, our strategy, and our campaign for 2024.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59938400/395543755/-103282814?refcode=folf230309&amount=7&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWI0Mjg0Mi1iYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLnd-x4SLFXWfV-31kmKW37BIwEIepqqF7nKcFvYggI=) Thanks for considering making a recurring contribution — and thanks for all you do! Together, we can do anything **P.S.**[_**If you can’t pledge a recurring contribution today, we totally understand! Contributions of all types and sizes support our campaign efforts — and all are appreciated!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59938401/395543756/-103282814?refcode=folf230309&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWI0Mjg0Mi1iYmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLnd-x4SLFXWfV-31kmKW37BIwEIepqqF7nKcFvYggI=)

name: Caroline Nickel
subject: An important message for March
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email]Friends, This is Caroline, Wiley’s wife, reaching out with a very important message for Women’s History Month. In March, we remember the struggles and triumphs of the women who came before us. From fighting for the right to vote, equal wages, and fair opportunities, women have long fought for the rights and freedoms we have today. The progress that has been made for women in this country is monumental. But as a mother of a young daughter, I know that no matter how much progress has been made, no rights are guaranteed. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email] We must all have to remain committed to the fight, and part of that commitment comes with supporting candidates at every level of government who will not lose sight of what is at stake for women in this country. That’s why I am reaching out to ask you to support my husband, Wiley, in Congress. Wiley has committed to fighting for reproductive freedom, pay equity, and affordable and accessible health care for women in this country. He will do everything he can to continue expanding and protecting women’s rights so our daughter and other young girls can grow up in a country where they have every possible opportunity to live the life they choose to live. Can you chip in a donation of any amount to help ensure NC-13 has a representative committed to the fight in Congress? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email] Thank you kindly, Caroline Nickel Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn?refcode=230309-email>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: what drives me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.9.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.9.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Hi friend,
For me, just like so many folks in our district, life wasn’t easy growing up. I learned quickly that if you want to achieve your goals, you will need grit and perseverance. But maybe even more importantly, you need people in your corner who will fight alongside you and have your back.
And it’s what ultimately led me to become the youngest woman ever elected to the Virginia House of Delegates — because I realized that was the best way I could advocate for my community.
In my six years in the House of Delegates, I fought for more funding for our schools and more economic opportunities for our communities — earning recognition from both the Virginia Chamber of Commerce and the Virginia Education Association. I worked to combat maternal and infant mortality, make our justice system fairer, and protect our environment for the next generation. But the achievement I’m most proud of: our passage of Breonna’s Law, a ban on no-knock warrants, following the killing of Breonna Taylor in 2020.
It’s rare for institutions like the Virginia General Assembly to move as quickly and responsively as we did in the summer of 2020. But as a young Black woman, I know my voice helped my fellow lawmakers understand why this was so important — playing a critical role to get this major justice reform over the line, and helping to build a safer future for Black Virginians in particular.
Friend, Breonna’s Law was personal — just like fighting for a stronger, safer, fairer Commonwealth for our families feels personal today. And just like when I ran for election for the very first time, I still believe that the best way to fight for our communities is in the halls of the Virginia General Assembly. I’m ready to serve and to lead as State Senator for District 13 — but I need your help. Please chip in any amount today to help win this election and create more progress for our state. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.9.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.9.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Thanks so much for showing up today. Let’s keep working,
--Lashrecse
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.6.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.6.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.9.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

clean_body: [] Hi friend, For me, just like so many folks in our district, life wasn’t easy growing up. I learned quickly that if you want to achieve your goals, you will need grit and perseverance. But maybe even more importantly, you need people in your corner who will fight alongside you and have your back. And it’s what ultimately led me to become the youngest woman ever elected to the Virginia House of Delegates — because I realized that was the best way I could advocate for my community. In my six years in the House of Delegates, I fought for more funding for our schools and more economic opportunities for our communities — earning recognition from both the Virginia Chamber of Commerce and the Virginia Education Association. I worked to combat maternal and infant mortality, make our justice system fairer, and protect our environment for the next generation. But the achievement I’m most proud of: our passage of Breonna’s Law, a ban on no-knock warrants, following the killing of Breonna Taylor in 2020. It’s rare for institutions like the Virginia General Assembly to move as quickly and responsively as we did in the summer of 2020. But as a young Black woman, I know my voice helped my fellow lawmakers understand why this was so important — playing a critical role to get this major justice reform over the line, and helping to build a safer future for Black Virginians in particular. Friend, Breonna’s Law was personal — just like fighting for a stronger, safer, fairer Commonwealth for our families feels personal today. And just like when I ran for election for the very first time, I still believe that the best way to fight for our communities is in the halls of the Virginia General Assembly. I’m ready to serve and to lead as State Senator for District 13 — but I need your help. Please chip in any amount today to help win this election and create more progress for our state. [] Donate Now [] Thanks so much for showing up today. Let’s keep working, --Lashrecse [] Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians. Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [] Donate Now [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . www.LashrecseAird.com [] Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird P.O. body:
*shocking* update in the Wisconsin Senate race
| **❌ DON’T SCROLL AWAY ❌

name: Katherine Clark (via Becca Balint)
subject: Support Democratic Women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59939865/395548764/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGY4NGM0Ni1iZmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EGAru71l2tEi8uG19ClCOvdOeuGjtuBAUSEXNGNZ6qg=&emci=c9792165-adbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=38f84c46-bfbe-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59939867/395548765/2079884594?refcode=E20535-20230309-KCSplit-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGY4NGM0Ni1iZmJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EGAru71l2tEi8uG19ClCOvdOeuGjtuBAUSEXNGNZ6qg=) Happy Women's History Month, Peter! My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip. When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber. Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different.**There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 93 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!** I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color. **And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher.** [_**That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.
Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we _all_ do better.

subject: A lot of Republicans dream of jeopardizing Social Security and Medicare

body:
We can’t get comfortable playing defense with Social Security and Medicare. It’s just too important. We need to work to strengthen these programs. It starts with supporting the DNC. | |
---
A lot of Republicans have been dreaming of jeopardizing Social Security and Medicare for a long time now, Derek. Thankfully, President Biden has promised to veto any cuts to Social Security and Medicare. **But we can’t get comfortable playing defense with Social Security and Medicare. It’s just too important, Derek. We need to work to _strengthen_ these programs.** By electing more Democrats to Congress, we can continue the fight to protect Social Security and Medicare. You play a vital role in getting the job done. Donate $7 today to help invest in the resources that Democratic candidates are relying on to win in 2023, 2024, and beyond.

clean_body: We can’t get comfortable playing defense with Social Security and Medicare. It’s just too important. We need to work to strengthen these programs. It starts with supporting the DNC. | | A lot of Republicans have been dreaming of jeopardizing Social Security and Medicare for a long time now, Derek. Thankfully, President Biden has promised to veto any cuts to Social Security and Medicare. But we can’t get comfortable playing defense with Social Security and Medicare. It’s just too important, Derek. We need to work to strengthen these programs. By electing more Democrats to Congress, we can continue the fight to protect Social Security and Medicare. You play a vital role in getting the job done. Donate $7 today to help invest in the resources that Democratic candidates are relying on to win in 2023, 2024, and beyond. The DNC is investing in voter protection services, data and technology, and innovative organizing that helped President Biden and Vice President Harris win back the White House, helped Democrats protect the Senate, and will help flip the House in 2024. Grassroots support has proven to deliver a winning model for Democrats. After all, we defied expectations during the midterms last November because of this team. But with Republicans fighting to jeopardize Social Security and Medicare, we need to do more. Thanks for all you do to support Democrats, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: =?utf-8?Q?Carlina=20Rivera?=
subject: building blocks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
Together, we've accomplished a lot, but it's not enough. | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=47e5b152da&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter --

I'm running for re-election because I know we have more to accomplish together, from keeping our communities safe and healthy to ensuring every child has access to a good education. But we're not starting from scratch.

We're building on a strong foundation -- and it's a foundation I'm incredibly proud of.

Over the last five years I've served in the Council, I led the charge to create the first City-funded abortion fund in the nation. I created a program to improve the delivery of medical services to transgender and gender nonconforming New Yorkers. And I delivered millions of dollars in funding for our small businesses, schools, and affordable housing -- all investments our communities in Lower Manhattan desperately need.

[**Together, we've accomplished a lot, but it's not enough. These wins are simply the building blocks we're using to build a better future for New York. Will you help me keep going?**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=f572612517&e=2de202398d)

---
| I look back at the fights we fought and won with such pride, and I know that I wouldn't have been able to win any of them without you standing next to me. Thank you for being a part of my team -- and a part of my successes. [**Let's keep it going.**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=948efcaeba&e=2de202398d)

Best,
Carlina

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: I'm missing your response.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
I’m just making sure you saw my last message.

---
Hi Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message.

With the House of Representatives back under Republican control, we cannot afford to relent in our fight for reproductive freedom. **That’s why I set a goal to receive 5,000 signatures on my petition to protect reproductive rights, but it looks like I’m _still_ ****missing your signature.**

Peter, I _refuse_ to sit here and do nothing while millions of people in our nation are denied essential reproductive care. I’m counting on you to join the movement. So please: **Will you add your name to my reproductive freedom petition before it locks at midnight tonight?

Here’s the best link: [https://petitions.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59940360/395550384/1753456815?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&code=jtk1004-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODQ5MWY4OS1jMWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYJOJeiVZ61pmPxNdW_VAYn_47wXZ-8gNa32I4Wyj90=&emci=182ba510-f8b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c8491f89-c1be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**

Thank you for being in this fight with me.

Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James** Date: Tue, Mar 7, 2023
Subject: SIGNATURE REQUESTED: Will you sign my petition?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59940361/395550385/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1004-su-nd&code=jtk1004-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODQ5MWY4OS1jMWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYJOJeiVZ61pmPxNdW_VAYn_47wXZ-8gNa32I4Wyj90=)
---
**Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our reproductive freedom. This is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 592 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59940362/395550386/1753456815?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&code=jtk1004-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODQ5MWY4OS1jMWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYJOJeiVZ61pmPxNdW_VAYn_47wXZ-8gNa32I4Wyj90=&emci=182ba510-f8b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c8491f89-c1be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59940363/395550387/1753456815?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&code=jtk1004-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODQ5MWY4OS1jMWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYJOJeiVZ61pmPxNdW_VAYn_47wXZ-8gNa32I4Wyj90=&emci=182ba510-f8b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c8491f89-c1be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect reproductive freedom.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down last summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight – and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? clean_body: I’m just making sure you saw my last message. Hi Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message. With the House of Representatives back under Republican control, we cannot afford to relent in our fight for reproductive freedom. That’s why I set a goal to receive 5,000 signatures on my petition to protect reproductive rights, but it looks like I’m still missing your signature. Peter, I refuse to sit here and do nothing while millions of people in our nation are denied essential reproductive care. I’m counting on you to join the movement. So please: Will you add your name to my reproductive freedom petition before it locks at midnight tonight? Here’s the best link: Thank you for being in this fight with me. Letitia \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Tue, Mar 7, 2023 Subject: SIGNATURE REQUESTED: Will you sign my petition? | | | = Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot. And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our reproductive freedom. This is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent. | | Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect reproductive freedom. Let me be clear: I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down last summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made real progress. I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue. But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we all work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight – and I’m counting on you to step up now. | | Thank you for standing with me to defend reproductive rights for every last person. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie vs. Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, in case you
missed it, Bernie Sanders is officially taking on Big Coffee:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130843?refcode=em20230309-27901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130843?refcode=em20230309-27901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN ][IMG]

Despite hundreds of Starbucks stores around the country voting to unionize
over the past year, Starbucks — led by billionaire CEO Howard Schultz —
hasn’t negotiated a single contract.

Now, Bernie is supporting workers and demanding answers from one of the
richest people in the country. Just one day before the HELP Committee was
set to subpoena Starbucks CEO Howard Schultz, the billionaire agreed to
testify. This is exactly the kind of accountability we need to see from
our leaders.

We’re fighting for a world where this isn’t the exception in American
politics. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130843?refcode=em20230309-27901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN ]Justice Democrats is here to elect progressive working-class
champions who will take on Corporate America and win. Will you chip in
$3 and support us today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130843?refcode=em20230309-27901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN ]Contribute $3

The National Labor Relations Board has found at least 80 times Starbucks
has broken the law with illegal union-busting activities. Mega
corporations like Starbucks have learned that they can exploit,
manipulate, punish, and fire employees with impunity — but together with
Bernie, we’re going to make sure that won’t stand.

It’s time for a new kind of Congress — one where our representatives
empathize with baristas and cashiers more than CEOs. We can build a
generation of leaders who come from our communities and understand our
struggles. Whether they’re teachers or nurses, bartenders or community
organizers; whether they’re single parents or paying off student debt, our
candidates will put the people first.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/130843?refcode=em20230309-27901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN ]We can’t get to that future without support from folks like
you, Peter. Can
you spare $3 or a donation of any amount to power our work
today?

Thank you,
Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230309-27901-footer&t=1026&refcode2=27901_1203867_NXHQPN&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=27901%2E1203867%2ENXHQPN

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

**_Begin Forwarded Message from Tom Malinowski:_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59941196/395553204/1763729747?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230308_FR_DFDLaunch_0_WL_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_DFDLaunchFW&refcode2=81b6a8f7-c5be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWI2YThmNy1jNWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j4CH_7Kw7BlbmbJ2nXtxoT7MTcMWBTaN7eEn5BZEG7A=)
Last year at a suburban New Jersey high school, I was taking questions from students about current events when a teacher took me aside to say a parent had recently removed a child from one of his American history classes. Why? Because the class was studying the civil rights movement, which the parent said was teaching "critical race theory."

I was saddened, but not surprised. Across America, and in New Jersey, too, MAGA extremists have been taking their culture wars to our schools, banning books from libraries and classrooms, threatening teachers with prosecution, and politicizing school board races, at our kids' expense. Americans who want to protect freedom of expression and our public schools have been playing defense.

[So I'm excited to launch a new effort, Districts for Democracy, to start fighting back. We need at least 5,000 Founding Donors to join our cause today. If you want to get in on the ground floor of this intitiative and help me restore sanity to New Jersey schools, please consider donating $10 today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59941198/395553206/1763729747?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230308_FR_DFDLaunch_0_WL_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_DFDLaunchFW&refcode2=81b6a8f7-c5be-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWI2YThmNy1jNWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j4CH_7Kw7BlbmbJ2nXtxoT7MTcMWBTaN7eEn5BZEG7A=) If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

You've seen the headlines: In Missouri, school districts remove books about the Holocaust because of a new law that subjects teachers to possible jail time for teaching allegedly "explicit" material. In Ohio, the author of a children's book called "It's OK to be a Unicorn" is accused of trying to turn kids gay and banned from reading it in schools. In Florida, the state bans math textbooks with sidebar biographies of African American mathematicians, and school districts pull books about Hank Aaron and Roberto Clemente from libraries because they discuss racism in pro baseball.

This creepy censorship is not the result of some grass roots popular campaign; it's part of a top-down political strategy. Right wing think tanks stirred up fear about "critical race theory," which is not actually taught in any public school in America, to drum up votes for their favored politicians. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is hoping to ride his crusade against academic freedom all the way to the White House.

In New Jersey, our school board elections are supposed to be non-partisan. But last year, Republican politicians worked with national right wing groups to elect school board candidates trying to bring Florida-style censorship to our state. They told lies that I consider unforgivable — falsely accusing our elementary school teachers of sexually grooming and teaching pornography to kids. Some of these candidates won, and in some districts, we're already seeing teachers and administrators leaving because of the hateful vitriol they're facing.

New Jersey has the best public schools in America. We should keep our schools great, not lower ourselves to the standards of Florida or Texas. We have real problems, too — a shortage of teachers, learning loss due to COVID closures, mental health issues, and more. These are the challenges we should be debating, instead of getting sucked into crazy culture wars.

Districts for Democracy will promote freedom of expression and educational excellence in New Jersey and beyond, by encouraging reasoned public debate of these issues, holding school board members and elected officials accountable, and recruiting and supporting candidates committed to democratic values. I strongly believe in keeping partisanship out of our schools — and I would oppose attempts at censorship by the left as well as the right. So we will work with and support all who uphold these principles, regardless of party.

The good news is that the vast majority of our students and parents have zero tolerance for censorship in our schools. As a member of Congress, I spoke to thousands of students at dozens of local schools. They are incredibly smart, eager to learn about and debate difficult topics. They asked me to protect them from guns, not from ideas! And if anyone tries to ban a book in our state, I'm confident ten times as many kids will want to read it.

These wonderful young people need our organized support. Our country needs us to stand up for the ideals we've taught them to cherish. I hope I can count on your help in the days ahead.

Thank you,

Tom Malinowski
* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

---

In Florida, the state bans math textbooks with sidebar biographies of African American mathematicians, and school districts pull books about Hank Aaron and Roberto Clemente from libraries because they discuss racism in pro baseball. This creepy censorship is not the result of some grass roots popular campaign; it's part of a top-down political strategy. Right wing think tanks stirred up fear about "critical race theory," which is not actually taught in any public school in America, to drum up votes for their favored politicians. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is hoping to ride his crusade against academic freedom all the way to the White House. In New Jersey, our school board elections are supposed to be non-partisan. But last year, Republican politicians worked with national right wing groups to elect school board candidates trying to bring Florida-style censorship to our state. They told lies that I consider unforgivable — falsely accusing our elementary school teachers of sexually grooming and teaching pornography to kids. Some of these candidates won, and in some districts, we're already seeing teachers and administrators leaving because of the hateful vitriol they're facing. New Jersey has the best public schools in America. We should keep our schools great, not lower ourselves to the standards of Florida or Texas. We have real problems, too — a shortage of teachers, learning loss due to COVID closures, mental health issues, and more. These are the challenges we should be debating, instead of getting sucked into crazy culture wars. Districts for Democracy will promote freedom of expression and educational excellence in New Jersey and beyond, by encouraging reasoned public debate of these issues, holding school board members and elected officials accountable, and recruiting and supporting candidates committed to democratic values. I strongly believe in keeping partisanship out of our schools — and I would oppose attempts at censorship by the left as well as the right. So we will work with and support all who uphold these principles, regardless of party. The good news is that the vast majority of our students and parents have zero tolerance for censorship in our schools. As a member of Congress, I spoke to thousands of students at dozens of local schools. They are incredibly smart, eager to learn about and debate difficult topics. They asked me to protect them from guns, not from ideas! And if anyone tries to ban a book in our state, I'm confident ten times as many kids will want to read it. These wonderful young people need our organized support. Our country needs us to stand up for the ideals we've taught them to cherish. I hope I can count on your help in the days ahead. Thank you, Tom Malinowski * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. This is urgent, friend: The Postal Service could collapse if it continues on this path and with the GOP controlling the House, this is a real possibility. We can't let that happen. Families rely on the USPS for lifesaving medications and critical deliveries. AND many Americans use vote-by-mail to exercise their right to vote. That's why we're calling on Democrats like you. We're running an official poll, and we NEED 83 more responses from your area to reach statistical significance. Please, let us know ASAP: ** | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Thank you, Tammy!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=31%2E35263%2Es1Qtl4 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter — Since yesterday’s announcement, we’ve received
overwhelming support for Tammy’s reintroduction of the Women’s Health
Protection Act in the Senate.

Today, we want to express our gratitude to Tammy for working day in and
day out to secure our rights.

In a time when our country faces an unprecedented crisis in the fight for
reproductive freedom, Tammy has fought tooth and nail to defend our
fundamental rights and ensure everyone has the ability to make their own
healthcare decisions.

Tammy has taken on big fights in the Senate — from marriage equality to
abortion rights and so much more. She's working every day to achieve the
progress the majority of Americans want and deserve — including
legislation like the Women’s Health Protection Act. She will continue to
deliver on her promise of change for as long as this team has her back.

Thank you for supporting Tammy’s work in the Senate. But as she’s
defending our freedoms, Republicans are trying to defeat her next year.
While she’s taking on these tough fights for our rights, let’s show her we
have her back.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/158?t=1004&akid=31%2E35263%2Es1Qtl4 ]If you stand with Tammy, please consider pitching in $3 — or whatever
works best for you — right now to support our campaign. Every dollar makes
a difference when there’s so much on the line.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/159?t=1005&akid=31%2E35263%2Es1Qtl4 ]CHIP IN $3 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/158?t=1010&akid=31%2E35263%2Es1Qtl4 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your support — it truly means so much to know you’re a part
of this grassroots movement. Now more than ever, we need all hands on deck
to rise to the challenge and defend our rights from those who are
hell-bent on taking them away.

— Team Baldwin

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

subject: Investing in community projects to improve NM-02
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59941809/395555770/1285749846?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230309cpf_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY4NTBlNi1jN2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBzyPBNIlyEgfxTSArZygguYRLqDGv9qmkoZBDulPAE=)
---
Team, Soon, Congress will vote on a 2024 federal budget and decide how our country should allocate funding for federal agencies and programs. Every year, U.S. representatives have the opportunity to request Community Project Funding: federal dollars that are allocated to projects and services that would benefit the people of their district. **When my far-right opponent Yvette Herrell represented NM-02 in Congress, she failed to bring ANY federal funding for community projects to our district.** That’s right. She secured zero dollars and zero cents in Community Project Funding during her entire tenure in office. As your new member of Congress, I’ve started the search process for community projects to improve New Mexico’s 2nd District — _and I’ve already secured more funding than Herrell did in her two-year term._ **[As long as I’m in Congress, I’ll always work to invest in our local communities and bring back as much funding as possible to improve the lives of New Mexicans. Will you support my re-election today by pitching in $10 (it’ll be $10 more than Herrell ever got us) to refuel our grassroots campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59941813/395555774/1285749846?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230309cpf_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY4NTBlNi1jN2JlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBzyPBNIlyEgfxTSArZygguYRLqDGv9qmkoZBDulPAE=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, Soon, Congress will vote on a 2024 federal budget and decide how our country should allocate funding for federal agencies and programs. Every year, U.S. representatives have the opportunity to request Community Project Funding: federal dollars that are allocated to projects and services that would benefit the people of their district. When my far-right opponent Yvette Herrell represented NM-02 in Congress, she failed to bring ANY federal funding for community projects to our district. That’s right. She secured zero dollars and zero cents in Community Project Funding during her entire tenure in office. As your new member of Congress, I’ve started the search process for community projects to improve New Mexico’s 2nd District — and I’ve already secured more funding than Herrell did in her two-year term. = **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = I’ll be in touch with updates on what Community Project Requests I submit and we win funding for! — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

the permitting rules to fast-track new fossil fuel projects.

name: Team TNDP
subject: TNGOP: Do as I say, not as I do 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

We have a message for Tennessee Republicans: it's ok to be gay 🏳️🌈 If you haven't seen the recent news, here's a recap. A photo of Governor Bill Lee from his high school yearbook surfaced showing him in drag [https://www.thedailybeast.com/anti-drag-tennessee-governor-bill-lee-may-have-done-drag-himself] , and Lt. Gov. Randy McNally was found to have been leaving spicy comments [https://www.nbcnews.com/nbc-out/out-politics-and-policy/tennessee-lieutenant-governor-79-comments-young-gay-mans-racy-instagra-rcna74182] on a young gay man's revealing Instagram pictures.

All of this on top of Republicans outlawing drag and revoking the rights of LGBTQ+ Tennesseans.

Doing drag and being gay obviously aren't the issues — it's the hypocrisy. Instead of passing policies that support the LGBTQ+ community, Tennessee Republicans are hiding their own actions while trying to shove the rest of the queer community back into the closet. It's disgusting.

We've got to get these hypocrites out of office. Can you donate $20 now to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We're once again making national news for all the wrong reasons. As the Republicans in our legislature become more and more extreme, the more our vulnerable communities, including LGBTQ+ people, will suffer. It's up to us to fight back.

Can we count on your support in our fight to elect more Democrats to the state legislature so we can oust these hypocritical Republicans?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

We can do this,

Team TNDP

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party.Carol V. Abney, Treasurer.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea17caaecc3d417cadb168ee30c225d4&_e=dGcFTZ-dMJ9KSqkr-znOYlQEDdTqrFryA-_kmHee0wodTkrKi1I4DCvQG_eCwIZ6tZ9OTCpUBOYI8kRselAQk3Q3TP9CE9SN5tcTsP-nutJisCqKGHWu93360fo1iXv6aCSm-KtNDzit1l-EbQeJbtknq7ElkaV5bGJ-6oClcaA5u0cMdyMiuxjl8Fd9A0Vh7hfMzCVxUX-6vKHAvy22xRaSX3SHN6feBebrRQ1_NpSyd36tKNeYsfaR-pDl_bI3XKzIBwB98RzPmmKUBzNgKX_vMj7MNbJI2HXJypseiIB-8ebHEf4C5pIuEAxFg7wWmBTjqXD4_U4q4_wxk8PX7eGEYcuPZBvSTrIm6drawtf02dQtu0d-NT9ZDOWquEaFULGaEgDGgipW9TuBUmER-A%3D%3D "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Why I wear a canary pin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59943433/395561527/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk9-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzNhN2RjZi1jZWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IQVkrjB6MuSF-jdaidD7Q1ZhindPhaqXNa5pSlHANA0=)
Friend,

On the lapel of my suits (suits that I admit are sometimes rumpled), I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a birdcage. It was given to me decades ago by a Lorain steelworker at a Workers' Memorial Day rally – and to this day**, I wear this canary instead of the official Senate pin. Let me tell you why:**
In the early days of the 20th century, coal miners would bring canaries deep into the mines to warn them of poisonous gasses. Back then, workers didn't have a union strong enough or a government that _cared enough_ to protect them.
Together, we changed that. We passed worker safety laws and overtime pay. We banned child labor. We passed clean air and safe drinking water laws. We enacted Social Security and Medicare, and workers’ rights and women’s rights and civil rights. Because when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work, friend.
**I wear my canary pin as a symbol of all the progress we've made and as a reminder that our fight for the Dignity of Work – _all_ work – is far from over. ****This fight is why I'm running for reelection.**
**To defend my seat and keep up this important fight, I need grassroots support from folks like you. That's why I'm personally asking: **[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue making progress for workers and families across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59943445/395561536/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk9-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzNhN2RjZi1jZWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IQVkrjB6MuSF-jdaidD7Q1ZhindPhaqXNa5pSlHANA0=)
Thank you. I'm humbled to have folks like you standing alongside me in this fight.

In solidarity,

Sherrod
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59943453/395561546/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk9-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzNhN2RjZi1jZWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IQVkrjB6MuSF-jdaidD7Q1ZhindPhaqXNa5pSlHANA0=)

name: Heather W., DLCC
subject: There are no off-years for the DLCC
body:
There are no off-years for the DLCC | | |
---
| | TO: Interested Parties
FROM: DLCC Interim President Heather Williams
RE: There are no off-years for the DLCC
DATE: March 1, 2023
* * *
In the last few weeks, the DLCC won three special elections in Pennsylvania that upheld the will of the people and secured control for Democrats in the Pennsylvania House. On the heels of this victory, the DLCC won a critical special election in New Hampshire’s HD-Strafford 8, bringing Democrats just three seats away from an outright majority in the Granite State’s 400-seat chamber. In Virginia, just after the new year, Aaron Rouse flipped a Senate seat from red to blue — boosting Democrats’ margins as we work to defend control of the chamber ahead of elections in November. Our wins in Pennsylvania, Virginia, and New Hampshire happened because the DLCC invested early and continuously in these states as a part of our [Path to The Majority strategy.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGlyFEPfIQqTPhAJ7ICxnKFx_3JsPxAoxaIZF03yisqj5Szmjmsvk0uRDm2pYPaCUQrDlxUBEiO9enCFdinEpckhsJJJf7rCIi-G9Bp12k4D5bLSUDOi89BX4IO1E91eB3Bva_edhsffIZNLJWNTaSmQwWn0DPKwskUXUSoosDZRaMnJ7BmUxtDiS_DO21rzjzZQNabULgo9YUQ7hnGiM0S1CDFSbPu9A9L6KzeGo1EP8sWCwlLjynnc-RjX4VxWSxy15gKCuUKN-zdtLXK-KExtJM3w52naHPmcJvUuvVlINoYH0kY9dmVdiME5BZvQkUjBAKZ1wYJygnaScI9EVcLaIjzGHYEpRyzMfrMuHF__iVebe5xk9AoF5vrhyxg0jCq2CMbhNRAgRMY_k90hYAmja2ecZM2_WdvyGbiZrhrn/3uc/xFXvxNi6SkmSJVCKIl4b_w/h0/wiJ33PYssJ_RIIKNtzo2xWjv54kSMAFa4XtFnO4ORaI) But here’s the reality: **if we want to keep capitalizing on opportunities to win big in what some see as an off-year, we need significantly more resources from our donors to rebuild our war chest, leverage our strategy, and help our candidates across the finish line.** [We need the full support of this grassroots movement standing with us right now. Will you invest in our work today to help build Democratic power in state legislatures this year and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mGxkNxgibyoo98DaZxhyT4SFWhNrtcvVNHlXgn3FWuivy-SfhAguwaja61-NgeA5VMSPdhpkMKDWrGy8bGWWGNi0Gc7o4RyQQH4o2jBaPIMLRbJpOqeKUD0Ov97Av-FEwEKzDEinEhEJtxGA1WzhyYLVAP17zOTiGst5-Q-zWTqgV_5uNo5iNEHTprD66F89OtrNtst1wH9aGss0Dr_GElKASE5OPfHs4aD4WlIN2i-6Q1Vxb1VsK5WQZCWm8kiNddZE5RcPuMtN_BSk1NHwD5w9q_wBp5caNpwhdP6AG14lGYh_mjitqD9F5A0tww7jC-9IKxMgdBMTsxbXIIuUPBSCtLsdPnGaDf8_hzj-BiJij/3uc/xFXvxNi6SkmSJVCKIl4b_w/h1/qNWiGm3n5utSei5WV6xtzN5GLcxjbHb2GXvJN5EZLeQ) In the 2024 cycle, other levels of the ballot will see their maps shrink while the state legislative maps for this decade offer us opportunities that span dozens of states and chambers. There will be fewer competitive races at the statewide and federal level of the ballot, while the DLCC is within striking distance of multiple GOP chambers and defending razor-thin new Democratic legislative majorities. To capitalize on these opportunities, we need to raise $10 million more than what is currently projected. Doing so would allow us to fund the work needed to build Democratic power through special elections, Virginia’s general election this fall, and give our battleground states an advantage over the MAGA GOP in 2024. The DLCC is undefeated in competitive special elections this year thanks to our ability to identify specific campaigns and other levers of power that can move the needle on progress. This strategic approach has shut out MAGA Republicans and sent Democrats to the halls of their state capitol. **Because there are no off-years in state legislative politics, we know that legislative majorities are won on the margins — every single move matters.** As a result — we remain nimble. We provided our campaigns with critical political guidance, strategic communications planning, data analysis, and research support for earned and paid media. [But we can’t continue to give state Democrats the resources they need to defeat their Republican opponents without the help of our most dedicated grassroots supporters, so we need you to step up today. Chip in $7 now to give Democrats the key support they need to win →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mGxkNxgibyoo98DaZxhyT4SFWhNrtcvVNHlXgn3FWuivy-SfhAguwaja61-NgeA5VMSPdhpkMKDWrGy8bGWWGNi0Gc7o4RyQQH4o2jBaPIMLRbJpOqeKUD0Ov97Av-FEwEKzDEinEhEJtxGA1WzhyYLVH5iY2ErTVZwExeBgu0Hbqx8vMxidLloC4hbTBNkFX3IBa0l5PNL8kl2dh2T2ZyBNldxRqbhJnKRIcBOvZ878xyzQ7Yo4NawfOfpeWJ4sKue9gBfc3rFapmXKdi2fO1IXBQpYYYteQqnQ5eBqs8b_Ljk2MPZtS4z8wfVGG_ZSBhvoQUY-ljZV_MrZhVR994WrA8-ElvM-qwwf-R3IKpEuZ/3uc/xFXvxNi6SkmSJVCKIl4b_w/h2/zSw0qD2O_eEgRWBRVeoRc_Ts0FhJyw8jQ7aWc9EH3P8) Our wrap-around services alongside millions of dollars in contributions is why the DLCC was able to fend off big Republican spending in 2022, the first midterm election year since at least 1934 that the party in power didn’t lose a single legislative chamber. But now is the time to take full advantage of our momentum and work to seize every opportunity to build Democratic power that comes our way. Unlike federal committees, we don’t have the luxury of an off-year. While they are using this year to rebuild, strategize, and keep their powder dry, we have to drastically increase our spending to compete in these special elections. Make no mistake – the DLCC can only continue building Democratic majorities across the country with the help of supporters like you, who are stepping up and doubling-down on investing in this committee. Making these investments in 2023 allows the DLCC to get a jump start on keeping MAGA Republicans out of power while setting Democrats up for another round of unprecedented wins in 2024. Doing so would rid Republicans of their grip on battleground states while we continue to build back power in the states, protect the path to the presidency, and ensure Democratic governors have the power to veto extreme Republican legislation. But as of now, we're not getting the support we need to power this work. We also simply don’t have the resources of our Republican counterparts, who can call up any of Karl Rove’s billionaire pals to supplement their funding. This, paired with the fact that state legislatures don’t get as much investment as federal races, creates the perfect storm for us to fall behind – and we can’t let that happen. Without question, the DLCC delivered the best midterm year for Democrats holding the White House in nearly a century. But we have a rare opportunity to keep our momentum going to flip more chambers and defend our razor-thin new majorities across the country. With more support, we can shore up Democratic majorities, advance the president’s agenda despite a gridlocked Congress, keep pressure on Republicans and even flip their chambers by seizing strategic opportunities as they arise. Democrats won and lost chambers by razor-thin margins: meaning that the balance of power within state legislatures is on the line in the off-year. **We’re fighting to keep up our momentum in 2023 — but we need your support to do it.** [ Will you chip in $7 or $25 right now to help power state Democrats to more historic victories this cycle?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mGxkNxgibyoo98DaZxhyT4SFWhNrtcvVNHlXgn3FWuivy-SfhAguwaja61-NgeA5VMSPdhpkMKDWrGy8bGWWGNi0Gc7o4RyQQH4o2jBaPIMLRbJpOqeKUD0Ov97Av-FEwEKzDEinEhEJtxGA1WzhyYLUImGixGtYVGsJNHwj4iFuVWDT1QGH77TTGYKJUS7bIdknzaKgI6tF_qg4ZtCNQ9v2PFQRhzQr9gHb9JnUL6-74PC2RE5L32rvj8diGWbJl0CgD7l_anKz1bEyDkHYlnqwuveJO_dZpng7U7H4MZFh2fX6GMpN08VEy4uUTAOFqhunNoxT-Iz5XE7Igaq3o0DTJCgwVlSR0LX_sJtgDeutI/3uc/xFXvxNi6SkmSJVCKIl4b_w/h3/BwvDijXsiOsi3UL-Dp3eMcPxR522GGDi7-yMzbV2EI8) Together, Heather Williams

clean_body: There are no off-years for the DLCC | | | | | TO: Interested Parties FROM: DLCC Interim President Heather Williams RE: There are no off-years for the DLCC DATE: March 1, 2023 In the last few weeks, the DLCC won three special elections in Pennsylvania that upheld the will of the people and secured control for Democrats in the Pennsylvania House. On the heels of this victory, the DLCC won a critical special election in New Hampshire’s HD-Strafford 8, bringing Democrats just three seats away from an outright majority in the Granite State’s 400-seat chamber. In Virginia, just after the new year, Aaron Rouse flipped a Senate seat from red to blue — boosting Democrats’ margins as we work to defend control of the chamber ahead of elections in November. Our wins in Pennsylvania, Virginia, and New Hampshire happened because the DLCC invested early and continuously in these states as a part of our But here’s the reality: if we want to keep capitalizing on opportunities to win big in what some see as an off-year, we need significantly more resources from our donors to rebuild our war chest, leverage our strategy, and help our candidates across the finish line. In the 2024 cycle, other levels of the ballot will see their maps shrink while the state legislative maps for this decade offer us opportunities that span dozens of states and chambers. There will be fewer competitive races at the statewide and federal level of the ballot, while the DLCC is within striking distance of multiple GOP chambers and defending razor-thin new Democratic legislative majorities. To capitalize on these opportunities, we need to raise $10 million more than what is currently projected. Doing so would allow us to fund the work needed to build Democratic power through special elections, Virginia’s general election this fall, and give our battleground states an advantage over the MAGA GOP in 2024. The DLCC is undefeated in competitive special elections this year thanks to our ability to identify specific campaigns and other levers of power that can move the needle on progress. This strategic approach has shut out MAGA Republicans and sent Democrats to the halls of their state capitol. Because there are no off-years in state legislative politics, we know that legislative majorities are won on the margins — every single move matters. As a result — we remain nimble. We provided our campaigns with critical political guidance, strategic communications planning, data analysis, and research support for earned and paid media. Our wrap-around services alongside millions of dollars in contributions is why the DLCC was able to fend off big Republican spending in 2022, the first midterm election year since at least 1934 that the party in power didn’t lose a single legislative chamber. But now is the time to take full advantage of our momentum and work to seize every opportunity to build Democratic power that comes our way. Unlike federal committees, we don’t have the luxury of an off-year. While they are using this year to rebuild, strategize, and keep their powder dry, we have to drastically increase our spending to compete in these special elections. Make no mistake – the DLCC can only continue building Democratic majorities across the country with the help of supporters like you, who are stepping up and doubling-down on investing in this committee. Making these investments in 2023 allows the DLCC to get a jump start on keeping MAGA Republicans out of power while setting Democrats up for another round of unprecedented wins in 2024. Doing so would rid Republicans of their grip on battleground states while we continue to build back power in the states, protect the path to the presidency, and ensure Democratic governors have the power to veto extreme Republican legislation. But as of now, we're not getting the support we need to power this work. We also simply don’t have the resources of our Republican counterparts, who can call up any of Karl Rove’s billionaire pals to supplement their funding. This, paired with the fact that state legislatures don’t get as much investment as federal races, creates the perfect storm for us to fall behind – and we can’t let that happen. Without question, the DLCC delivered the best midterm year for Democrats holding the White House in nearly a century. But we have a rare opportunity to keep our momentum going to flip more chambers and defend our razor-thin new majorities across the country. With more support, we can shore up Democratic majorities, advance the president’s agenda despite a gridlocked Congress, keep pressure on Republicans and even flip their chambers by seizing strategic opportunities as they arise. Democrats won and lost chambers by razor-thin margins: meaning that the balance of power within state legislatures is on the line in the off-year. We’re fighting to keep up our momentum in 2023 — but we need your support to do it. name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: We can't stay silent about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Republicans have launched a despicable campaign to demonize the transgender community.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59943679/395562566/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230309TR_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA3OGNjNi1kMGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XFF7lX_TRlwYvFAVBpTfuVljwSrYD6JMkcV6ZVc3Ui4=)
---
Friend, the GOP has thrown its chips in with a despicable campaign to attack the transgender community.

House Republicans just introduced a trans sports ban bill. Several GOP-led states have recently passed or advanced legislation that targets the healthcare of trans youth. And at CPAC this past week, a Republican speaker said that “transgenderism must be eradicated.”

**I'm disgusted by the wave of discriminatory legislation we're seeing and the alarming rhetoric that's been platformed by the far right.** This kind of hate-fueled disinformation endangers the lives and well-being of LGBTQ+ people in communities all across the country — and everyone with a public platform has a responsibility to call it out.

One of my first actions as a Congresswoman was to display a transgender pride flag outside my office. I did this to show the trans community (which includes friends and family of mine) that they are seen, heard, and not erased. **Today, we are seeing renewed efforts to erase them — and these efforts are being mainstreamed by a major political party.**

It is absolutely outrageous and terrifying to see a sustained propaganda campaign against a vulnerable community. I want LGBTQ+ folks to know that they are still loved and still valued, and that protecting their rights and dignity remains a top priority of mine in Congress.

I will keep using my platform to uplift trans visibility and call out misinformation — and I'll be urging my colleagues to do the same.

As scary as this moment is, I believe that our path still takes us to greater equality and justice. I'll be doing everything I can to keep us on that path together.

— Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59943680/395562567/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230309TR_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA3OGNjNi1kMGJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XFF7lX_TRlwYvFAVBpTfuVljwSrYD6JMkcV6ZVc3Ui4=)****
---

body:

Friend,
Our House DFL majority has been working hard to deliver on Minnesotans’ priorities and get things done, and it’s all because of you that we are able to do so. We need support from DFLers across the state to keep working on making a state that works better for everyone. Did you know you can become a grassroots donor and contribute to the House DFL majority at no cost to you? Through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund program you can donate $50 per year (or $100 per couple) and have it refunded by the state. It’s that simple!
Make your refundable donation today and show your support of our progressive House DFL majority today:
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-march23?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=030923]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-march23?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=030923]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-march23?express_lane_other=true&refcode=030923]
We’ve got a lot of work to do, friend. Extreme MAGA Republicans are already preparing for 2024. They will be working hard to flip the Minnesota House so they can enact dangerous legislation, and we need to be ready to protect our House DFL majority.
Thank you for your support of the Minnesota House DFL.
Jamie Long
Majority Leader
