name: Adam Schiff
subject: A U.S. Senator who made his fortune allegedly committing Medicare fraud wanted to sunset Medicare and Social Security after 5 years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| There are many, many appropriate ways to gain wealth in the United States. But that’s not how Republican Senator Rick Scott of Florida made his fortune.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1917%2E5257348%2ExyDCl9)
Derek,
There are many, many appropriate ways to gain wealth in the United States. But that’s not how Republican Senator Rick Scott of Florida made his fortune.
Back in the 1990s, as the CEO of a private, for-profit hospital corporation called Columbia/HCA, Rick Scott was allegedly involved in the largest Medicare and Medicaid fraud in U.S. history.
After his company received 14 felony convictions by the Justice Department, a record $1.7 billion fraud settlement for overbilling the U.S. government, and after he pled the Fifth Amendment 75 times in an official deposition, Rick Scott left Columbia/HCA with over $300 million in stock options. And it wasn’t long after that he began his Tea Party crusade against government spending.
His company bilks the government out of billions and now he says the government spends too much on health care for seniors. The hypocrisy just smacks you in your face.
Scott’s proposal to sunset **all** federal spending legislation every 5 years, including Medicare and Social Security, was so unpopular, even Mitch McConnell was taking shots at him in the media and forcing Scott to backtrack.
But Rick Scott isn’t alone. Former Vice President Mike Pence said cuts to Medicare and Social Security should be “on the table.”
Well here’s what I have to say about that: **Medicare and Social Security are absolutely off the table, and we’re not going to let a health care fraudster or Trump lackey take them away. No way, no how.**
We’re going to protect and expand these programs for generations to come, by working to pass universal health care and ensuring that everyone pays their fair share into Social Security for the next generation.
**[If you agree that Social Security and Medicare should NOT be cut, and you’re ready to take on Rick Scott, Mike Pence, and anyone else who attempts to take them away, add your name to my petition today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230309-medicare-social-security.Hor6QP&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1917%2E5257348%2ExyDCl9)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230309-medicare-social-security.Hor6QP&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1917%2E5257348%2ExyDCl9)
---
Thanks for standing up for these essential programs that we all pay into — we’re not going to let Republicans and their dark money donors win this fight.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=1917%2E5257348%2ExyDCl9)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=1917%2E5257348%2ExyDCl9)
---

subject: This team has always stepped up 😎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The end of March (specifically 11:59 PM on Friday the 31st) is our first Federal Election Commission deadline of 2023.
#
Derek,
Here's what we need you to know:
The end of March (_specifically 11:59 PM on Friday the 31st_) is our first Federal Election Commission deadline of 2023.
If you've been getting our emails for a while, you know what that means. **After the deadline we have to report every dollar we've raised publicly, for everybody to see.**
This year was off to a slow start, and we want to show strong fundraising $$ to keep up our support of John's work in the Senate. Grassroots donations are the only way we'll be able to catch up -- **[so if you're able to now, will you make a contribution so we can finish the fundraising quarter strong?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230309-1?refcode=em20230309-1-8282&refcode2=8282_434096_riwtYh&akid=8282%2E434096%2EriwtYh)**

Derek, keeping our fundraising up for every deadline matters, even in the off-years. It helps keep us prepared for anything that Republicans and their corporate PAC friends might throw our way.
Every time we've asked, this team has stepped up. **[It'd mean a lot to John + all of Team Fetterman if you could chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you right now to power our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230309-1?refcode=em20230309-1-8282&refcode2=8282_434096_riwtYh&akid=8282%2E434096%2EriwtYh)**
We know we can crush this FEC deadline -- and even if you can't chip in right now, thank you for reading these emails + being on this team. 😎
Together,
Team Fetterman 💛

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My thoughts on the filibuster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
The filibuster as it’s being used currently needs to go.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=42%2E135344%2EY-tBjS)
Friend -
I went on Lawrence O’Donnell the night I launched my Senate campaign to talk about why I’m running and also something else very specific to the Senate: the filibuster.
We need to get past the idea that a few senators can block progress on something as non-controversial as protecting our children and make it impossible to pass legislation that can improve people’s lives.
**That’s why the filibuster as it’s being used currently needs to go.**
I’m all in favor of going back to the old school standing filibuster where, if you care passionately about an issue, you can go up there and talk for a zillion hours straight if you want to.
But the idea that a handful of senators can just stop bills from even coming to the floor and getting an up or down vote just doesn’t make sense to me.
In the House, we have so many bipartisan bills that don’t even get a vote in the Senate because of these rules. And it’s a shame because we were sent to Congress to deliver results for our constituents, and this Senate rule is preventing us from making the simplest progress on critical issues.
The frustration on this issue is palpable. I’m running for Senate to help change this dynamic and return to the idea that our government will work for all of us.
[If you support that kind of no-nonsense, straightforward approach to getting things done, I hope you’ll consider chipping in $3 today to my Senate campaign and help put us on the path to keeping this seat blue in 2024.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar23.udOA3N&refcode=em230309-2-15&t=2&akid=42%2E135344%2EY-tBjS)

The working people of Pennsylvania demand accountability for how their tax dollars are spent. As your next Auditor General, I will use the office to measure and support efforts to make communities healthier and safer. We need transparency on how huge hospital nonprofits and long term care providers use state dollars. We need to analyze our approach to community safety and gun violence reduction to target investments in the things that really work to reduce crime, particularly gun crimes.
I’m asking you to join me in this fight. I’m not taking a single check from big money or corporate PACs, so I’m counting on support from folks like you to build this movement.
**[So, it doesn’t matter what you contribute — even $5 will make a huge difference — if you can afford to, I hope you’ll donate to build this campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59944266/395564744/800376446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTZiODQ1MS1kNWJlLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YrXpo2OsLQWQvBf6n0bAvZZtz32TSJGvqWbSfaQayUU=)**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Gloomier Than Ever
body:
New on CaucusRoom: React to Comments! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday! Have you noticed the new update to the website? You can now react to comments! **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-j/) **Stock Market Crash is Coming** After Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell indicated the bank isn't finished raising rates**,[one market expert has warned a crash could come in a matter of days.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-t/)** **Who Will He Pick?** [**Former President Donald Trump is pondering his running mate options for another presidential run in 2024**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-i/), and he is reportedly "strongly" considering former Arizona gubernatorial candidate Kari Lake. **You Don't Say** [**New intelligence seen by US officials suggests that a pro-Ukraine group attacked the Nord Stream 2 pipelines**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-d/) that transport natural gas from Russia to Western Europe. **Gloomier Than Ever**
## **[Americans are feeling gloomier than ever about their finances](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-h/)** : Just 31% believe their situation will improve over the next year.
**GOP to Slash Federal Programs** Hard-right House Republicans are [**readying a plan to gut the nation 's foreign aid budget and make deep cuts to health care, food assistance and housing programs for poor Americans**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-k/) in their drive to balance the federal budget. **Biden's Budget Plan** **[Biden's budget-busting blueprint will include a 5.2% raise for federal employees](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-u/), **one of the largest peacetime military budgets in recent history, and plans to save Social Security and Medicare. But zero plans to cut spending.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* Take me to your**[leader](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* The difference between **[dogs and cats](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-m/).**
* Keep this in mind when**[filing your taxes](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-c/).**
* Clean**,[healthy living](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkjiidy-trhiujldw-q/).**
